fn wrap_coord(t: f32, mode: u32) -> f32 {
    if mode == 1u {
        // Repeat
        return fract(t);
    }
    if mode == 2u {
        // Mirror: triangle wave, period 2, peak 1.
        let m = fract(t * 0.5) * 2.0;
        return 1.0 - abs(1.0 - m);
    }
    // Clamp (default)
    return clamp(t, 0.0, 1.0);
}

fn overlay_channel(a: f32, b: f32) -> f32 {
    if a < 0.5 {
        return 2.0 * a * b;
    }
    return 1.0 - 2.0 * (1.0 - a) * (1.0 - b);
}

fn safe_div(a: f32, b: f32) -> f32 {
    if abs(b) < 1.0e-6 {
        return 0.0;
    }
    return a / b;
}

fn blend_rgb(a: vec3<f32>, b: vec3<f32>, mode: u32) -> vec3<f32> {
    switch mode {
        case 0u: { return b; }
        case 1u: { return 1.0 - (1.0 - a) * (1.0 - b); }
        case 2u: { return a + b; }
        case 3u: { return max(a, b); }
        case 4u: { return a * b; }
        case 5u: { return abs(a - b); }
        case 6u: {
            return vec3<f32>(
                overlay_channel(a.x, b.x),
                overlay_channel(a.y, b.y),
                overlay_channel(a.z, b.z),
            );
        }
        case 7u: {
            return vec3<f32>(safe_div(a.x, b.x), safe_div(a.y, b.y), safe_div(a.z, b.z));
        }
        default: { return b; }
    }
}

fn n0_body(uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, cx: f32, cy: f32, scale_x: f32, scale_y: f32) -> vec4<f32> {
    let x = (uv.x - cx) * scale_x;
    let y = (uv.y - cy) * scale_y;
    return vec4<f32>(x, y, 0.0, 1.0);
}

fn n1_body(c: vec4<f32>, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>) -> vec4<f32> {
    return vec4<f32>(abs(c.r), abs(c.g), abs(c.b), c.a);
}

fn n2_body(c: vec4<f32>, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, scale: f32, offset: f32) -> vec4<f32> {
    return vec4<f32>(
        c.r * scale + offset,
        c.g * scale + offset,
        c.b * scale + offset,
        c.a,
    );
}

fn n3_body(source: texture_2d<f32>, samp: sampler, field_color: vec4<f32>, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, wrap: u32, mode: u32) -> vec4<f32> {
    let field = field_color.rg;
    let sample_uv = select(field, uv + field, mode == 1u);
    let wrapped = vec2<f32>(wrap_coord(sample_uv.x, wrap), wrap_coord(sample_uv.y, wrap));
    return textureSampleLevel(source, samp, wrapped, 0.0);
}

fn n4_body(a: vec4<f32>, b: vec4<f32>, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, amount: f32, mode: u32) -> vec4<f32> {
    let blended = blend_rgb(a.rgb, b.rgb, mode);
    let out_rgb = mix(a.rgb, blended, amount);
    // Branchless on purpose: an `if` here compiles differently in fused vs
    // standalone kernel contexts (FMA regrouping) and broke the fp32
    // bit-exact proof (precision contract §7.1's "match the exact arithmetic
    // form" gotcha). mix(x, y, 0.0) = x + (y-x)*0.0 = x exactly, so t_a = 0
    // IS alpha pass-through, in the original instruction shape.
    let t_a = select(0.0, amount, mode == 0u);
    let out_a = mix(a.a, b.a, t_a);
    return vec4<f32>(out_rgb, out_a);
}

@compute @workgroup_size(16, 16)
fn cs_main(@builtin(global_invocation_id) id: vec3<u32>) {
    let dims = textureDimensions(dst);
    if id.x >= dims.x || id.y >= dims.y {
        return;
    }
    let coord = vec2<i32>(i32(id.x), i32(id.y));
    let uv = (vec2<f32>(id.xy) + 0.5) / vec2<f32>(dims);
    let ext_0 = textureLoad(src_0, coord, 0);
    let r0 = n0_body(uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n0_cx, params.n0_cy, params.n0_scale_x, params.n0_scale_y);
    let r1 = n1_body(r0, uv, vec2<f32>(dims));
    let r2 = n2_body(r1, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n2_scale, params.n2_offset);
    let r3 = n3_body(src_0, samp, r2, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n3_wrap, params.n3_mode);
    let r4 = n4_body(ext_0, r3, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n4_amount, params.n4_mode);
    textureStore(dst, coord, r4);
}

=== effect:StylizedFeedback node:7 ===
// @static_param: n0_translate_x
// @static_param: n0_translate_y
// @static_param: n2_shape
// @static_param: n2_size
// @static_param: n2_softness
// @static_param: n2_strength
// @static_param: n3_amount
// @static_param: n3_mode
// @input_access: src_0 gather
// @input_access: src_1 coincident
struct Params {
    n0_translate_x: f32,
    n0_translate_y: f32,
    n0_scale: f32,
    n0_rotation: f32,
    n1_gain: f32,
    n2_shape: u32,
    n2_size: f32,
    n2_softness: f32,
    n2_strength: f32,
    n3_amount: f32,
    n3_mode: u32,
    _pad0: u32,
}

@group(0) @binding(0) var<uniform> params: Params;
@group(0) @binding(1) var src_0: texture_2d<f32>;
@group(0) @binding(2) var src_1: texture_2d<f32>;
@group(0) @binding(3) var samp: sampler;
@group(0) @binding(4) var dst: texture_storage_2d<rgba16float, write>;

fn q16(v: vec4<f32>) -> vec4<f32> {
    return vec4<f32>(unpack2x16float(pack2x16float(v.xy)), unpack2x16float(pack2x16float(v.zw)));
}

fn overlay_channel(a: f32, b: f32) -> f32 {
    if a < 0.5 {
        return 2.0 * a * b;
    }
    return 1.0 - 2.0 * (1.0 - a) * (1.0 - b);
}

fn safe_div(a: f32, b: f32) -> f32 {
    if abs(b) < 1.0e-6 {
        return 0.0;
    }
    return a / b;
}

fn blend_rgb(a: vec3<f32>, b: vec3<f32>, mode: u32) -> vec3<f32> {
    switch mode {
        case 0u: { return b; }
        case 1u: { return 1.0 - (1.0 - a) * (1.0 - b); }
        case 2u: { return a + b; }
        case 3u: { return max(a, b); }
        case 4u: { return a * b; }
        case 5u: { return abs(a - b); }
        case 6u: {
            return vec3<f32>(
                overlay_channel(a.x, b.x),
                overlay_channel(a.y, b.y),
                overlay_channel(a.z, b.z),
            );
        }
        case 7u: {
            return vec3<f32>(safe_div(a.x, b.x), safe_div(a.y, b.y), safe_div(a.z, b.z));
        }
        default: { return b; }
    }
}

fn n0_body(tex_in: texture_2d<f32>, s_in: sampler, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, translate_x: f32, translate_y: f32, scale: f32, rotation: f32) -> vec4<f32> {
    let aspect_ratio = dims.x / dims.y;
    let rot = -(rotation * 3.14159265358979323846 / 180.0);

    var p = uv - vec2<f32>(0.5, 0.5);

    p.x = p.x * aspect_ratio;

    let cos_r = cos(rot);
    let sin_r = sin(rot);
    p = vec2<f32>(
        p.x * cos_r - p.y * sin_r,
        p.x * sin_r + p.y * cos_r,
    );

    p.x = p.x / aspect_ratio;

    p = p / max(scale, 0.01);
    p = p - vec2<f32>(translate_x, translate_y);
    p = p + vec2<f32>(0.5, 0.5);

    if (p.x < 0.0 || p.x > 1.0 || p.y < 0.0 || p.y > 1.0) {
        return vec4<f32>(0.0, 0.0, 0.0, 0.0);
    }

    return textureSampleLevel(tex_in, s_in, p, 0.0);
}

fn n1_body(c: vec4<f32>, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, gain: f32) -> vec4<f32> {
    return vec4<f32>(c.rgb * gain, c.a);
}

fn n2_body(c: vec4<f32>, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, shape: u32, size: f32, softness: f32, strength: f32) -> vec4<f32> {
    let aspect = dims.x / dims.y;
    let centered = uv - vec2<f32>(0.5);

    var d: f32;
    if shape == 0u {
        // Circle: aspect-correct so iso-distance rings are visually circular.
        let aspect_corrected = vec2<f32>(centered.x * aspect, centered.y);
        d = length(aspect_corrected) * 2.0;
    } else if shape == 1u {
        // Ellipse: raw UV space — stretches with canvas aspect.
        d = length(centered) * 2.0;
    } else {
        // Rectangle: chebyshev distance to nearest edge (per-edge fade).
        let edge_dist = min(min(uv.x, 1.0 - uv.x), min(uv.y, 1.0 - uv.y));
        d = 1.0 - edge_dist * 2.0;
    }

    let size_inner = size - softness * 0.5;
    let size_outer = size + softness * 0.5;
    let raw_mask = 1.0 - smoothstep(size_inner, size_outer, d);
    let final_mask = mix(1.0, raw_mask, strength);

    return vec4<f32>(c.rgb * final_mask, c.a * final_mask);
}

fn n3_body(a: vec4<f32>, b: vec4<f32>, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, amount: f32, mode: u32) -> vec4<f32> {
    let blended = blend_rgb(a.rgb, b.rgb, mode);
    let out_rgb = mix(a.rgb, blended, amount);
    // Branchless on purpose: an `if` here compiles differently in fused vs
    // standalone kernel contexts (FMA regrouping) and broke the fp32
    // bit-exact proof (precision contract §7.1's "match the exact arithmetic
    // form" gotcha). mix(x, y, 0.0) = x + (y-x)*0.0 = x exactly, so t_a = 0
    // IS alpha pass-through, in the original instruction shape.
    let t_a = select(0.0, amount, mode == 0u);
    let out_a = mix(a.a, b.a, t_a);
    return vec4<f32>(out_rgb, out_a);
}

@compute @workgroup_size(16, 16)
fn cs_main(@builtin(global_invocation_id) id: vec3<u32>) {
    let dims = textureDimensions(dst);
    if id.x >= dims.x || id.y >= dims.y {
        return;
    }
    let coord = vec2<i32>(i32(id.x), i32(id.y));
    let uv = (vec2<f32>(id.xy) + 0.5) / vec2<f32>(dims);
    let ext_1 = textureLoad(src_1, coord, 0);
    let r0 = q16(n0_body(src_0, samp, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n0_translate_x, params.n0_translate_y, params.n0_scale, params.n0_rotation));
    let r1 = q16(n1_body(r0, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n1_gain));
    let r2 = q16(n2_body(r1, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n2_shape, params.n2_size, params.n2_softness, params.n2_strength));
    let r3 = q16(n3_body(ext_1, r2, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n3_amount, params.n3_mode));
    textureStore(dst, coord, r3);
}

=== effect:VoronoiPrism node:16 ===
// @static_param: n0_direction
// @static_param: n10_mode
// @static_param: n1_jitter
// @static_param: n1_offset_x
// @static_param: n1_offset_y
// @static_param: n1_out_scale
// @static_param: n2_mode
// @static_param: n2_seed_x
// @static_param: n2_seed_y
// @static_param: n3_offset
// @static_param: n3_scale
// @static_param: n4_amount
// @static_param: n4_mode
// @static_param: n5_mode
// @static_param: n5_wrap
// @static_param: n6_mode
// @static_param: n6_seed_x
// @static_param: n6_seed_y
// @static_param: n7_high
// @static_param: n7_low
// @static_param: n9_amount
// @static_param: n9_mode
// @input_access: src_0 gather
struct Params {
    n0_width: f32,
    n0_direction: u32,
    n1_scale: f32,
    n1_offset_x: f32,
    n1_offset_y: f32,
    n1_jitter: f32,
    n1_out_scale: f32,
    n2_seed: f32,
    n2_seed_x: f32,
    n2_seed_y: f32,
    n2_mode: u32,
    n3_scale: f32,
    n3_offset: f32,
    n4_amount: f32,
    n4_mode: u32,
    n5_wrap: u32,
    n5_mode: u32,
    n6_seed: f32,
    n6_seed_x: f32,
    n6_seed_y: f32,
    n6_mode: u32,
    n7_low: f32,
    n7_high: f32,
    n8_gain: f32,
    n9_amount: f32,
    n9_mode: u32,
    n10_amount: f32,
    n10_mode: u32,
}

@group(0) @binding(0) var<uniform> params: Params;
@group(0) @binding(1) var src_0: texture_2d<f32>;
@group(0) @binding(2) var samp: sampler;
@group(0) @binding(3) var dst: texture_storage_2d<rgba16float, write>;

struct N1BodyOutputs {
    out: vec4<f32>,
    cell_id: vec4<f32>,
}


fn wang_hash(seed_in: u32) -> u32 {
    var seed = seed_in;
    seed = (seed ^ 61u) ^ (seed >> 16u);
    seed = seed * 9u;
    seed = seed ^ (seed >> 4u);
    seed = seed * 0x27d4eb2du;
    seed = seed ^ (seed >> 15u);
    return seed;
}

fn voronoi_cell_point(cell: vec2<i32>, jitter: f32) -> vec2<f32> {
    // Two independent hashes for X and Y jitter.
    let hx = wang_hash(u32(cell.x + 10000) * 73856093u ^ u32(cell.y + 10000) * 19349663u);
    let hy = wang_hash(u32(cell.x + 10000) * 83492791u ^ u32(cell.y + 10000) * 28411627u);
    let jx = f32(hx & 0xFFFFu) / 65535.0;
    let jy = f32(hy & 0xFFFFu) / 65535.0;
    return vec2<f32>(cell) + vec2<f32>(0.5, 0.5) + (vec2<f32>(jx, jy) - 0.5) * jitter;
}

fn hfs_hash2(p: vec2<f32>) -> vec2<f32> {
    let q = vec2<f32>(
        dot(p, vec2<f32>(127.1, 311.7)),
        dot(p, vec2<f32>(269.5, 183.3)),
    );
    return fract(sin(q) * 43758.5453);
}

fn hfs_hash1(p: vec2<f32>) -> f32 {
    return fract(sin(dot(p, vec2<f32>(41.7, 289.3))) * 18743.291);
}

fn overlay_channel(a: f32, b: f32) -> f32 {
    if a < 0.5 {
        return 2.0 * a * b;
    }
    return 1.0 - 2.0 * (1.0 - a) * (1.0 - b);
}

fn safe_div(a: f32, b: f32) -> f32 {
    if abs(b) < 1.0e-6 {
        return 0.0;
    }
    return a / b;
}

fn blend_rgb(a: vec3<f32>, b: vec3<f32>, mode: u32) -> vec3<f32> {
    switch mode {
        case 0u: { return b; }
        case 1u: { return 1.0 - (1.0 - a) * (1.0 - b); }
        case 2u: { return a + b; }
        case 3u: { return max(a, b); }
        case 4u: { return a * b; }
        case 5u: { return abs(a - b); }
        case 6u: {
            return vec3<f32>(
                overlay_channel(a.x, b.x),
                overlay_channel(a.y, b.y),
                overlay_channel(a.z, b.z),
            );
        }
        case 7u: {
            return vec3<f32>(safe_div(a.x, b.x), safe_div(a.y, b.y), safe_div(a.z, b.z));
        }
        default: { return b; }
    }
}

fn wrap_coord(t: f32, mode: u32) -> f32 {
    if mode == 1u {
        // Repeat
        return fract(t);
    }
    if mode == 2u {
        // Mirror: triangle wave, period 2, peak 1.
        let m = fract(t * 0.5) * 2.0;
        return 1.0 - abs(1.0 - m);
    }
    // Clamp (default)
    return clamp(t, 0.0, 1.0);
}

fn n0_body(uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, width: f32, mode: u32) -> vec4<f32> {
    let half_width = width * 0.5;
    let lo = 0.5 - half_width;
    let hi = 0.5 + half_width;

    var s = uv;
    if mode == 0u || mode == 2u {
        s.x = clamp(uv.x, lo, hi);
    }
    if mode == 1u || mode == 2u {
        s.y = clamp(uv.y, lo, hi);
    }
    return vec4<f32>(s.x, s.y, 0.0, 1.0);
}

fn n1_body(uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, scale: f32, offset_x: f32, offset_y: f32, jitter: f32, out_scale: f32) -> N1BodyOutputs {
    let p = uv * scale + vec2<f32>(offset_x, offset_y);
    let cell = vec2<i32>(floor(p));

    var f1 = 1e9;
    var f2 = 1e9;
    var f1_cell = cell;
    for (var dy = -1; dy <= 1; dy = dy + 1) {
        for (var dx = -1; dx <= 1; dx = dx + 1) {
            let neighbor = cell + vec2<i32>(dx, dy);
            let fp = voronoi_cell_point(neighbor, jitter);
            let d = length(p - fp);
            if d < f1 {
                f2 = f1;
                f1 = d;
                f1_cell = neighbor;
            } else if d < f2 {
                f2 = d;
            }
        }
    }

    // Per-cell stable random — independent hash mix from the jitter hashes so
    // cell_hash decorrelates from the per-cell jitter offset.
    let cell_hash = f32(wang_hash(
        u32(f1_cell.x + 10000) * 12345701u ^ u32(f1_cell.y + 10000) * 39916801u,
    ) & 0xFFFFu) / 65535.0;

    let r = f1 * out_scale;
    let g = f2 * out_scale;
    let b = (f2 - f1) * out_scale;

    return N1BodyOutputs(
        vec4<f32>(r, g, b, cell_hash),
        vec4<f32>(f32(f1_cell.x), f32(f1_cell.y), 0.0, 1.0),
    );
}

fn n2_body(c_field: vec4<f32>, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, seed: f32, seed_x: f32, seed_y: f32, mode: u32) -> vec4<f32> {
    let field = c_field.rg;
    let seeded = field + seed * vec2<f32>(seed_x, seed_y);

    if mode == 1u {
        let h = hfs_hash1(seeded);
        return vec4<f32>(h, h, h, 1.0);
    }
    let h2 = hfs_hash2(seeded);
    return vec4<f32>(h2.x, h2.y, 0.0, 1.0);
}

fn n3_body(c: vec4<f32>, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, scale: f32, offset: f32) -> vec4<f32> {
    return vec4<f32>(
        c.r * scale + offset,
        c.g * scale + offset,
        c.b * scale + offset,
        c.a,
    );
}

fn n4_body(a: vec4<f32>, b: vec4<f32>, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, amount: f32, mode: u32) -> vec4<f32> {
    let blended = blend_rgb(a.rgb, b.rgb, mode);
    let out_rgb = mix(a.rgb, blended, amount);
    // Branchless on purpose: an `if` here compiles differently in fused vs
    // standalone kernel contexts (FMA regrouping) and broke the fp32
    // bit-exact proof (precision contract §7.1's "match the exact arithmetic
    // form" gotcha). mix(x, y, 0.0) = x + (y-x)*0.0 = x exactly, so t_a = 0
    // IS alpha pass-through, in the original instruction shape.
    let t_a = select(0.0, amount, mode == 0u);
    let out_a = mix(a.a, b.a, t_a);
    return vec4<f32>(out_rgb, out_a);
}

fn n5_body(source: texture_2d<f32>, samp: sampler, field_color: vec4<f32>, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, wrap: u32, mode: u32) -> vec4<f32> {
    let field = field_color.rg;
    let sample_uv = select(field, uv + field, mode == 1u);
    let wrapped = vec2<f32>(wrap_coord(sample_uv.x, wrap), wrap_coord(sample_uv.y, wrap));
    return textureSampleLevel(source, samp, wrapped, 0.0);
}

fn n6_body(c_field: vec4<f32>, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, seed: f32, seed_x: f32, seed_y: f32, mode: u32) -> vec4<f32> {
    let field = c_field.rg;
    let seeded = field + seed * vec2<f32>(seed_x, seed_y);

    if mode == 1u {
        let h = hfs_hash1(seeded);
        return vec4<f32>(h, h, h, 1.0);
    }
    let h2 = hfs_hash2(seeded);
    return vec4<f32>(h2.x, h2.y, 0.0, 1.0);
}

fn n7_body(c: vec4<f32>, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, low: f32, high: f32) -> vec4<f32> {
    return vec4<f32>(
        smoothstep(low, high, c.r),
        smoothstep(low, high, c.g),
        smoothstep(low, high, c.b),
        c.a,
    );
}

fn n8_body(c: vec4<f32>, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, gain: f32) -> vec4<f32> {
    return vec4<f32>(c.rgb * gain, c.a);
}

fn n9_body(a: vec4<f32>, b: vec4<f32>, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, amount: f32, mode: u32) -> vec4<f32> {
    let blended = blend_rgb(a.rgb, b.rgb, mode);
    let out_rgb = mix(a.rgb, blended, amount);
    // Branchless on purpose: an `if` here compiles differently in fused vs
    // standalone kernel contexts (FMA regrouping) and broke the fp32
    // bit-exact proof (precision contract §7.1's "match the exact arithmetic
    // form" gotcha). mix(x, y, 0.0) = x + (y-x)*0.0 = x exactly, so t_a = 0
    // IS alpha pass-through, in the original instruction shape.
    let t_a = select(0.0, amount, mode == 0u);
    let out_a = mix(a.a, b.a, t_a);
    return vec4<f32>(out_rgb, out_a);
}

fn n10_body(a: vec4<f32>, b: vec4<f32>, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, amount: f32, mode: u32) -> vec4<f32> {
    let blended = blend_rgb(a.rgb, b.rgb, mode);
    let out_rgb = mix(a.rgb, blended, amount);
    // Branchless on purpose: an `if` here compiles differently in fused vs
    // standalone kernel contexts (FMA regrouping) and broke the fp32
    // bit-exact proof (precision contract §7.1's "match the exact arithmetic
    // form" gotcha). mix(x, y, 0.0) = x + (y-x)*0.0 = x exactly, so t_a = 0
    // IS alpha pass-through, in the original instruction shape.
    let t_a = select(0.0, amount, mode == 0u);
    let out_a = mix(a.a, b.a, t_a);
    return vec4<f32>(out_rgb, out_a);
}

@compute @workgroup_size(16, 16)
fn cs_main(@builtin(global_invocation_id) id: vec3<u32>) {
    let dims = textureDimensions(dst);
    if id.x >= dims.x || id.y >= dims.y {
        return;
    }
    let coord = vec2<i32>(i32(id.x), i32(id.y));
    let uv = (vec2<f32>(id.xy) + 0.5) / vec2<f32>(dims);
    let ext_0 = textureLoad(src_0, coord, 0);
    let r0 = n0_body(uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n0_width, params.n0_direction);
    let r1 = n1_body(uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n1_scale, params.n1_offset_x, params.n1_offset_y, params.n1_jitter, params.n1_out_scale);
    let r2 = n2_body(r1.cell_id, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n2_seed, params.n2_seed_x, params.n2_seed_y, params.n2_mode);
    let r3 = n3_body(r2, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n3_scale, params.n3_offset);
    let r4 = n4_body(r0, r3, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n4_amount, params.n4_mode);
    let r5 = n5_body(src_0, samp, r4, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n5_wrap, params.n5_mode);
    let r6 = n6_body(r1.cell_id, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n6_seed, params.n6_seed_x, params.n6_seed_y, params.n6_mode);
    let r7 = n7_body(r6, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n7_low, params.n7_high);
    let r8 = n8_body(r7, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n8_gain);
    let r9 = n9_body(r5, r8, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n9_amount, params.n9_mode);
    let r10 = n10_body(ext_0, r9, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n10_amount, params.n10_mode);
    textureStore(dst, coord, r10);
}

=== effect:Watercolor node:17 ===
// @static_param: n1_amount
// @static_param: n1_mode
// @input_access: src_0 coincident
// @input_access: src_1 coincident
struct Params {
    n0_gain: f32,
    n1_amount: f32,
    n1_mode: u32,
    _pad0: u32,
}

@group(0) @binding(0) var<uniform> params: Params;
@group(0) @binding(1) var src_0: texture_2d<f32>;
@group(0) @binding(2) var src_1: texture_2d<f32>;
@group(0) @binding(3) var dst: texture_storage_2d<rgba16float, write>;

fn q16(v: vec4<f32>) -> vec4<f32> {
    return vec4<f32>(unpack2x16float(pack2x16float(v.xy)), unpack2x16float(pack2x16float(v.zw)));
}

fn overlay_channel(a: f32, b: f32) -> f32 {
    if a < 0.5 {
        return 2.0 * a * b;
    }
    return 1.0 - 2.0 * (1.0 - a) * (1.0 - b);
}

fn safe_div(a: f32, b: f32) -> f32 {
    if abs(b) < 1.0e-6 {
        return 0.0;
    }
    return a / b;
}

fn blend_rgb(a: vec3<f32>, b: vec3<f32>, mode: u32) -> vec3<f32> {
    switch mode {
        case 0u: { return b; }
        case 1u: { return 1.0 - (1.0 - a) * (1.0 - b); }
        case 2u: { return a + b; }
        case 3u: { return max(a, b); }
        case 4u: { return a * b; }
        case 5u: { return abs(a - b); }
        case 6u: {
            return vec3<f32>(
                overlay_channel(a.x, b.x),
                overlay_channel(a.y, b.y),
                overlay_channel(a.z, b.z),
            );
        }
        case 7u: {
            return vec3<f32>(safe_div(a.x, b.x), safe_div(a.y, b.y), safe_div(a.z, b.z));
        }
        default: { return b; }
    }
}

fn n0_body(c: vec4<f32>, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, gain: f32) -> vec4<f32> {
    return vec4<f32>(c.rgb * gain, c.a);
}

fn n1_body(a: vec4<f32>, b: vec4<f32>, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, amount: f32, mode: u32) -> vec4<f32> {
    let blended = blend_rgb(a.rgb, b.rgb, mode);
    let out_rgb = mix(a.rgb, blended, amount);
    // Branchless on purpose: an `if` here compiles differently in fused vs
    // standalone kernel contexts (FMA regrouping) and broke the fp32
    // bit-exact proof (precision contract §7.1's "match the exact arithmetic
    // form" gotcha). mix(x, y, 0.0) = x + (y-x)*0.0 = x exactly, so t_a = 0
    // IS alpha pass-through, in the original instruction shape.
    let t_a = select(0.0, amount, mode == 0u);
    let out_a = mix(a.a, b.a, t_a);
    return vec4<f32>(out_rgb, out_a);
}

@compute @workgroup_size(16, 16)
fn cs_main(@builtin(global_invocation_id) id: vec3<u32>) {
    let dims = textureDimensions(dst);
    if id.x >= dims.x || id.y >= dims.y {
        return;
    }
    let coord = vec2<i32>(i32(id.x), i32(id.y));
    let uv = (vec2<f32>(id.xy) + 0.5) / vec2<f32>(dims);
    let ext_0 = textureLoad(src_0, coord, 0);
    let ext_1 = textureLoad(src_1, coord, 0);
    let r0 = q16(n0_body(ext_0, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n0_gain));
    let r1 = q16(n1_body(ext_1, r0, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n1_amount, params.n1_mode));
    textureStore(dst, coord, r1);
}

=== effect:Watercolor node:18 ===
// @static_param: n0_resolution
// @static_param: n0_time
// @static_param: n0_warp_scale
// @static_param: n0_z_scale
// @static_param: n1_offset
// @static_param: n1_scale
struct Params {
    n0_time: f32,
    n0_z_scale: f32,
    n0_warp_scale: f32,
    n0_resolution: u32,
    n1_scale: f32,
    n1_offset: f32,
    _pad0: u32,
    _pad1: u32,
}

@group(0) @binding(0) var<uniform> params: Params;
@group(0) @binding(1) var dst_0: texture_storage_2d<rgba16float, write>;
@group(0) @binding(2) var dst_1: texture_storage_2d<rgba16float, write>;

fn ffn_wang_hash(seed_in: u32) -> u32 {
    var seed = seed_in;
    seed = (seed ^ 61u) ^ (seed >> 16u);
    seed = seed * 9u;
    seed = seed ^ (seed >> 4u);
    seed = seed * 0x27d4eb2du;
    seed = seed ^ (seed >> 15u);
    return seed;
}

fn ffn_perlin3_hash(ix: i32, iy: i32, iz: i32) -> u32 {
    let x = u32(ix + 10000) * 73856093u;
    let y = u32(iy + 10000) * 19349663u;
    let z = u32(iz + 10000) * 83492791u;
    return ffn_wang_hash(x ^ y ^ z);
}

fn ffn_perlin3_grad(h: u32) -> vec3<f32> {
    let sel = h & 15u;
    switch sel {
        case 0u:  { return vec3<f32>( 1.0,  1.0,  0.0); }
        case 1u:  { return vec3<f32>(-1.0,  1.0,  0.0); }
        case 2u:  { return vec3<f32>( 1.0, -1.0,  0.0); }
        case 3u:  { return vec3<f32>(-1.0, -1.0,  0.0); }
        case 4u:  { return vec3<f32>( 1.0,  0.0,  1.0); }
        case 5u:  { return vec3<f32>(-1.0,  0.0,  1.0); }
        case 6u:  { return vec3<f32>( 1.0,  0.0, -1.0); }
        case 7u:  { return vec3<f32>(-1.0,  0.0, -1.0); }
        case 8u:  { return vec3<f32>( 0.0,  1.0,  1.0); }
        case 9u:  { return vec3<f32>( 0.0, -1.0,  1.0); }
        case 10u: { return vec3<f32>( 0.0,  1.0, -1.0); }
        case 11u: { return vec3<f32>( 0.0, -1.0, -1.0); }
        case 12u: { return vec3<f32>( 1.0,  1.0,  0.0); }
        case 13u: { return vec3<f32>(-1.0,  1.0,  0.0); }
        case 14u: { return vec3<f32>( 0.0, -1.0,  1.0); }
        default:  { return vec3<f32>( 0.0, -1.0, -1.0); }
    }
}

fn ffn_fade(t: f32) -> f32 { return t * t * t * (t * (t * 6.0 - 15.0) + 10.0); }

fn ffn_perlin3(p: vec3<f32>) -> f32 {
    let i = vec3<i32>(floor(p));
    let f = p - floor(p);
    let u = vec3<f32>(ffn_fade(f.x), ffn_fade(f.y), ffn_fade(f.z));

    let g000 = ffn_perlin3_grad(ffn_perlin3_hash(i.x,     i.y,     i.z    ));
    let g100 = ffn_perlin3_grad(ffn_perlin3_hash(i.x + 1, i.y,     i.z    ));
    let g010 = ffn_perlin3_grad(ffn_perlin3_hash(i.x,     i.y + 1, i.z    ));
    let g110 = ffn_perlin3_grad(ffn_perlin3_hash(i.x + 1, i.y + 1, i.z    ));
    let g001 = ffn_perlin3_grad(ffn_perlin3_hash(i.x,     i.y,     i.z + 1));
    let g101 = ffn_perlin3_grad(ffn_perlin3_hash(i.x + 1, i.y,     i.z + 1));
    let g011 = ffn_perlin3_grad(ffn_perlin3_hash(i.x,     i.y + 1, i.z + 1));
    let g111 = ffn_perlin3_grad(ffn_perlin3_hash(i.x + 1, i.y + 1, i.z + 1));

    let n000 = dot(g000, f - vec3<f32>(0.0, 0.0, 0.0));
    let n100 = dot(g100, f - vec3<f32>(1.0, 0.0, 0.0));
    let n010 = dot(g010, f - vec3<f32>(0.0, 1.0, 0.0));
    let n110 = dot(g110, f - vec3<f32>(1.0, 1.0, 0.0));
    let n001 = dot(g001, f - vec3<f32>(0.0, 0.0, 1.0));
    let n101 = dot(g101, f - vec3<f32>(1.0, 0.0, 1.0));
    let n011 = dot(g011, f - vec3<f32>(0.0, 1.0, 1.0));
    let n111 = dot(g111, f - vec3<f32>(1.0, 1.0, 1.0));

    let nx00 = mix(n000, n100, u.x);
    let nx10 = mix(n010, n110, u.x);
    let nx01 = mix(n001, n101, u.x);
    let nx11 = mix(n011, n111, u.x);
    let nxy0 = mix(nx00, nx10, u.y);
    let nxy1 = mix(nx01, nx11, u.y);
    return mix(nxy0, nxy1, u.z);
}

fn ffn_fbm(p: vec3<f32>) -> f32 {
    var total = 0.0;
    var amplitude = 1.0;
    var freq = 1.0;
    for (var i = 0; i < 4; i++) {
        total += ffn_perlin3(p * freq) * amplitude;
        amplitude *= 0.5;
        freq *= 2.0;
    }
    return total;
}

fn ffn_flow_noise(uv: vec2<f32>, z: f32, warp_scale: f32) -> vec2<f32> {
    let p = vec3<f32>(uv * 4.0, z);
    var pw = p;
    if (warp_scale != 0.0) {
        let warp = vec2<f32>(ffn_fbm(p), ffn_fbm(p + vec3<f32>(5.2, 1.3, 0.0))) * warp_scale;
        pw = p + vec3<f32>(warp, 0.0);
    }
    return vec2<f32>(
        ffn_fbm(pw + vec3<f32>(1.7, 9.2, 0.0)),
        ffn_fbm(pw + vec3<f32>(8.3, 2.8, 0.0)),
    );
}

fn n0_body(uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, time: f32, z_scale: f32, warp_scale: f32, resolution: u32) -> vec4<f32> {
    let z = time * z_scale;
    let flow = ffn_flow_noise(uv, z, warp_scale);
    return vec4<f32>(flow.x, 0.0, flow.y, 1.0);
}

fn n1_body(c: vec4<f32>, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, scale: f32, offset: f32) -> vec4<f32> {
    return vec4<f32>(
        c.r * scale + offset,
        c.g * scale + offset,
        c.b * scale + offset,
        c.a,
    );
}

@compute @workgroup_size(16, 16)
fn cs_main(@builtin(global_invocation_id) id: vec3<u32>) {
    let dims = textureDimensions(dst_0);
    if id.x >= dims.x || id.y >= dims.y {
        return;
    }
    let coord = vec2<i32>(i32(id.x), i32(id.y));
    let uv = (vec2<f32>(id.xy) + 0.5) / vec2<f32>(dims);
    let r0 = n0_body(uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n0_time, params.n0_z_scale, params.n0_warp_scale, params.n0_resolution);
    let r1 = n1_body(r0, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n1_scale, params.n1_offset);
    textureStore(dst_0, coord, r0);
    textureStore(dst_1, coord, r1);
}

=== effect:Watercolor node:19 ===
// @static_param: n0_address_mode
// @static_param: n0_axis
// @static_param: n0_kernel_size
// @static_param: n0_radius_mode
// @static_param: n0_step
// @static_param: n1_bias
// @input_access: src_0 gather
// @input_access: src_1 coincident
struct Params {
    n0_kernel_size: u32,
    n0_axis: u32,
    n0_step: f32,
    n0_radius_mode: u32,
    n0_radius: f32,
    n0_address_mode: u32,
    n1_weight: f32,
    n1_bias: f32,
}

@group(0) @binding(0) var<uniform> params: Params;
@group(0) @binding(1) var src_0: texture_2d<f32>;
@group(0) @binding(2) var src_1: texture_2d<f32>;
@group(0) @binding(3) var samp: sampler;
@group(0) @binding(4) var dst: texture_storage_2d<rgba16float, write>;

const SG_K9_0: f32 = 0.16501;
const SG_K9_1: f32 = 0.15019;
const SG_K9_2: f32 = 0.11325;
const SG_K9_3: f32 = 0.07076;
const SG_K9_4: f32 = 0.03664;
const SG_K17_0: f32 = 0.10315;
const SG_K17_1: f32 = 0.09998;
const SG_K17_2: f32 = 0.09103;
const SG_K17_3: f32 = 0.07786;
const SG_K17_4: f32 = 0.06257;
const SG_K17_5: f32 = 0.04723;
const SG_K17_6: f32 = 0.03350;
const SG_K17_7: f32 = 0.02232;
const SG_K17_8: f32 = 0.01396;
const SG_K25_0:  f32 = 0.07087;
const SG_K25_1:  f32 = 0.06947;
const SG_K25_2:  f32 = 0.06540;
const SG_K25_3:  f32 = 0.05917;
const SG_K25_4:  f32 = 0.05148;
const SG_K25_5:  f32 = 0.04307;
const SG_K25_6:  f32 = 0.03465;
const SG_K25_7:  f32 = 0.02680;
const SG_K25_8:  f32 = 0.01995;
const SG_K25_9:  f32 = 0.01428;
const SG_K25_10: f32 = 0.00983;
const SG_K25_11: f32 = 0.00651;
const SG_K25_12: f32 = 0.00415;

fn q16(v: vec4<f32>) -> vec4<f32> {
    return vec4<f32>(unpack2x16float(pack2x16float(v.xy)), unpack2x16float(pack2x16float(v.zw)));
}

fn n0_vsrc_in(t: vec2<i32>, vd: vec2<f32>) -> vec4<f32> {
    let di = vec2<i32>(vd);
    let ti = clamp(t, vec2<i32>(0), di - vec2<i32>(1));
    let vuv = (vec2<f32>(ti) + vec2<f32>(0.5)) / vd;
    let v1 = n1_body(src_0, samp, textureSampleLevel(src_1, samp, vuv, 0.0), vuv, vd, params.n1_weight, params.n1_bias);
    return q16(v1);
}

fn n0_fetch_in(c: vec2<f32>) -> vec4<f32> {
    let vd = vec2<f32>(textureDimensions(dst));
    let x = c * vd - vec2<f32>(0.5);
    let f = fract(x);
    let i0 = vec2<i32>(floor(x));
    let c00 = n0_vsrc_in(i0, vd);
    let c10 = n0_vsrc_in(i0 + vec2<i32>(1, 0), vd);
    let c01 = n0_vsrc_in(i0 + vec2<i32>(0, 1), vd);
    let c11 = n0_vsrc_in(i0 + vec2<i32>(1, 1), vd);
    return mix(mix(c00, c10, f.x), mix(c01, c11, f.x), f.y);
}

fn n0_sg_blur_9(uv: vec2<f32>, d: vec2<f32>) -> vec4<f32> {
    var acc = n0_fetch_in(uv) * SG_K9_0;
    acc += (n0_fetch_in(uv + d      ) + n0_fetch_in(uv - d      )) * SG_K9_1;
    acc += (n0_fetch_in(uv + d * 2.0) + n0_fetch_in(uv - d * 2.0)) * SG_K9_2;
    acc += (n0_fetch_in(uv + d * 3.0) + n0_fetch_in(uv - d * 3.0)) * SG_K9_3;
    acc += (n0_fetch_in(uv + d * 4.0) + n0_fetch_in(uv - d * 4.0)) * SG_K9_4;
    return acc;
}

fn n0_sg_blur_17(uv: vec2<f32>, d: vec2<f32>) -> vec4<f32> {
    var acc = n0_fetch_in(uv) * SG_K17_0;
    acc += (n0_fetch_in(uv + d      ) + n0_fetch_in(uv - d      )) * SG_K17_1;
    acc += (n0_fetch_in(uv + d * 2.0) + n0_fetch_in(uv - d * 2.0)) * SG_K17_2;
    acc += (n0_fetch_in(uv + d * 3.0) + n0_fetch_in(uv - d * 3.0)) * SG_K17_3;
    acc += (n0_fetch_in(uv + d * 4.0) + n0_fetch_in(uv - d * 4.0)) * SG_K17_4;
    acc += (n0_fetch_in(uv + d * 5.0) + n0_fetch_in(uv - d * 5.0)) * SG_K17_5;
    acc += (n0_fetch_in(uv + d * 6.0) + n0_fetch_in(uv - d * 6.0)) * SG_K17_6;
    acc += (n0_fetch_in(uv + d * 7.0) + n0_fetch_in(uv - d * 7.0)) * SG_K17_7;
    acc += (n0_fetch_in(uv + d * 8.0) + n0_fetch_in(uv - d * 8.0)) * SG_K17_8;
    return acc;
}

fn n0_sg_blur_25(uv: vec2<f32>, d: vec2<f32>) -> vec4<f32> {
    var acc = n0_fetch_in(uv) * SG_K25_0;
    acc += (n0_fetch_in(uv + d       ) + n0_fetch_in(uv - d       )) * SG_K25_1;
    acc += (n0_fetch_in(uv + d *  2.0) + n0_fetch_in(uv - d *  2.0)) * SG_K25_2;
    acc += (n0_fetch_in(uv + d *  3.0) + n0_fetch_in(uv - d *  3.0)) * SG_K25_3;
    acc += (n0_fetch_in(uv + d *  4.0) + n0_fetch_in(uv - d *  4.0)) * SG_K25_4;
    acc += (n0_fetch_in(uv + d *  5.0) + n0_fetch_in(uv - d *  5.0)) * SG_K25_5;
    acc += (n0_fetch_in(uv + d *  6.0) + n0_fetch_in(uv - d *  6.0)) * SG_K25_6;
    acc += (n0_fetch_in(uv + d *  7.0) + n0_fetch_in(uv - d *  7.0)) * SG_K25_7;
    acc += (n0_fetch_in(uv + d *  8.0) + n0_fetch_in(uv - d *  8.0)) * SG_K25_8;
    acc += (n0_fetch_in(uv + d *  9.0) + n0_fetch_in(uv - d *  9.0)) * SG_K25_9;
    acc += (n0_fetch_in(uv + d * 10.0) + n0_fetch_in(uv - d * 10.0)) * SG_K25_10;
    acc += (n0_fetch_in(uv + d * 11.0) + n0_fetch_in(uv - d * 11.0)) * SG_K25_11;
    acc += (n0_fetch_in(uv + d * 12.0) + n0_fetch_in(uv - d * 12.0)) * SG_K25_12;
    return acc;
}

// Dynamic-radius separable Gaussian — bit-exact port of the legacy fluid-sim
// blur. Bilinear tap-pair optimisation: adjacent samples (j, j+1) collapse to one
// bilinear fetch at their weighted midpoint.

fn n0_sg_blur_dynamic(uv: vec2<f32>, axis_dir: vec2<f32>, radius: f32) -> vec4<f32> {
    let sigma = max(radius / 3.0, 1.0);
    let inv_two_sigma_sq = 1.0 / (2.0 * sigma * sigma);

    var result = n0_fetch_in(uv);
    var total_weight = 1.0;

    let radius_int = i32(radius);
    var j: i32 = 1;
    loop {
        if j > radius_int { break; }

        let fj = f32(j);
        let w_a = exp(-(fj * fj) * inv_two_sigma_sq);

        if j + 1 <= radius_int {
            let fj1 = f32(j + 1);
            let w_b = exp(-(fj1 * fj1) * inv_two_sigma_sq);
            let w_ab = w_a + w_b;
            let offset = fj + w_b / w_ab;

            result += n0_fetch_in(uv + axis_dir * offset) * w_ab;
            result += n0_fetch_in(uv - axis_dir * offset) * w_ab;
            total_weight += w_ab * 2.0;
        } else {
            result += n0_fetch_in(uv + axis_dir * fj) * w_a;
            result += n0_fetch_in(uv - axis_dir * fj) * w_a;
            total_weight += w_a * 2.0;
        }

        j += 2;
    }

    return result / total_weight;
}

// Linear-radius separable Gaussian — exact port of node.blur's per-axis pass
// (blur.wgsl mode 0): sigma = max(radius/2, 0.5), one tap per integer offset
// -r..r (no tap-pair trick), normalized by the running weight sum, radius
// clamped to 32. radius <= 0 collapses to a single center sample. Taps land on
// texel centers, so fusing through this mode is filter-exact by construction.

fn n0_sg_blur_linear(uv: vec2<f32>, axis_dir: vec2<f32>, radius: f32) -> vec4<f32> {
    // Single-exit on purpose: an early return here leaves unreachable blocks
    // that abort spirv-opt's merge-return pass, and the whole fused kernel
    // then ships UNOPTIMIZED (no inlining/DCE — measured slow enough to flip
    // the perf gate). Same arithmetic, same order, just one return.
    let r_int = min(i32(radius), 32);
    var result: vec4<f32>;
    if r_int <= 0 {
        result = n0_fetch_in(uv);
    } else {
        let sigma = max(radius * 0.5, 0.5);
        let two_sigma_sq = 2.0 * sigma * sigma;

        var sum = vec4<f32>(0.0);
        var weight_sum = 0.0;
        for (var d: i32 = -r_int; d <= r_int; d = d + 1) {
            let s = n0_fetch_in(uv + axis_dir * f32(d));
            let dist_sq = f32(d * d);
            let w = exp(-dist_sq / two_sigma_sq);
            sum = sum + s * w;
            weight_sum = weight_sum + w;
        }
        result = sum / max(weight_sum, 1e-6);
    }
    return result;
}

fn n0_body(uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, kernel_size: u32, axis: u32, step: f32, radius_mode: u32, radius: f32, address_mode: u32) -> vec4<f32> {
    let texel = vec2<f32>(1.0) / dims;

    var result: vec4<f32>;
    if radius_mode == 1u || radius_mode == 2u {
        var axis_dir: vec2<f32>;
        if axis == 0u {
            axis_dir = vec2<f32>(texel.x, 0.0);
        } else {
            axis_dir = vec2<f32>(0.0, texel.y);
        }
        if radius_mode == 2u {
            result = n0_sg_blur_linear(uv, axis_dir, radius);
        } else {
            result = n0_sg_blur_dynamic(uv, axis_dir, radius);
        }
    } else {
        var d: vec2<f32>;
        if axis == 0u {
            d = vec2<f32>(texel.x * step, 0.0);
        } else {
            d = vec2<f32>(0.0, texel.y * step);
        }
        if kernel_size == 0u {
            result = n0_sg_blur_9(uv, d);
        } else if kernel_size == 1u {
            result = n0_sg_blur_17(uv, d);
        } else {
            result = n0_sg_blur_25(uv, d);
        }
    }

    return result;
}

fn n1_body(source: texture_2d<f32>, samp: sampler, flow: vec4<f32>, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, weight: f32, bias: f32) -> vec4<f32> {
    let offset = (vec2<f32>(flow.r, flow.b) - vec2<f32>(bias)) * weight;
    let sampled_uv = uv + offset;
    return textureSampleLevel(source, samp, sampled_uv, 0.0);
}

@compute @workgroup_size(16, 16)
fn cs_main(@builtin(global_invocation_id) id: vec3<u32>) {
    let dims = textureDimensions(dst);
    if id.x >= dims.x || id.y >= dims.y {
        return;
    }
    let coord = vec2<i32>(i32(id.x), i32(id.y));
    let uv = (vec2<f32>(id.xy) + 0.5) / vec2<f32>(dims);
    let r0 = q16(n0_body(uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n0_kernel_size, params.n0_axis, params.n0_step, params.n0_radius_mode, params.n0_radius, params.n0_address_mode));
    textureStore(dst, coord, r0);
}

=== effect:Watercolor node:20 ===
// @static_param: n0_address_mode
// @static_param: n0_axis
// @static_param: n0_kernel_size
// @static_param: n0_radius
// @static_param: n0_radius_mode
// @static_param: n0_step
// @static_param: n1_amount
// @static_param: n2_max
// @static_param: n2_min
// @static_param: n3_mode
// @input_access: src_0 gather
// @input_access: src_1 coincident
// @input_access: src_2 coincident
// @input_access: src_3 coincident
struct Params {
    n0_kernel_size: u32,
    n0_axis: u32,
    n0_step: f32,
    n0_radius_mode: u32,
    n0_radius: f32,
    n0_address_mode: u32,
    n1_amount: f32,
    n2_min: f32,
    n2_max: f32,
    n3_amount: f32,
    n3_mode: u32,
    _pad0: u32,
}

@group(0) @binding(0) var<uniform> params: Params;
@group(0) @binding(1) var src_0: texture_2d<f32>;
@group(0) @binding(2) var src_1: texture_2d<f32>;
@group(0) @binding(3) var src_2: texture_2d<f32>;
@group(0) @binding(4) var src_3: texture_2d<f32>;
@group(0) @binding(5) var samp: sampler;
@group(0) @binding(6) var dst_0: texture_storage_2d<rgba16float, write>;
@group(0) @binding(7) var dst_1: texture_storage_2d<rgba16float, write>;

const SG_K9_0: f32 = 0.16501;
const SG_K9_1: f32 = 0.15019;
const SG_K9_2: f32 = 0.11325;
const SG_K9_3: f32 = 0.07076;
const SG_K9_4: f32 = 0.03664;
const SG_K17_0: f32 = 0.10315;
const SG_K17_1: f32 = 0.09998;
const SG_K17_2: f32 = 0.09103;
const SG_K17_3: f32 = 0.07786;
const SG_K17_4: f32 = 0.06257;
const SG_K17_5: f32 = 0.04723;
const SG_K17_6: f32 = 0.03350;
const SG_K17_7: f32 = 0.02232;
const SG_K17_8: f32 = 0.01396;
const SG_K25_0:  f32 = 0.07087;
const SG_K25_1:  f32 = 0.06947;
const SG_K25_2:  f32 = 0.06540;
const SG_K25_3:  f32 = 0.05917;
const SG_K25_4:  f32 = 0.05148;
const SG_K25_5:  f32 = 0.04307;
const SG_K25_6:  f32 = 0.03465;
const SG_K25_7:  f32 = 0.02680;
const SG_K25_8:  f32 = 0.01995;
const SG_K25_9:  f32 = 0.01428;
const SG_K25_10: f32 = 0.00983;
const SG_K25_11: f32 = 0.00651;
const SG_K25_12: f32 = 0.00415;

fn q16(v: vec4<f32>) -> vec4<f32> {
    return vec4<f32>(unpack2x16float(pack2x16float(v.xy)), unpack2x16float(pack2x16float(v.zw)));
}

fn overlay_channel(a: f32, b: f32) -> f32 {
    if a < 0.5 {
        return 2.0 * a * b;
    }
    return 1.0 - 2.0 * (1.0 - a) * (1.0 - b);
}

fn safe_div(a: f32, b: f32) -> f32 {
    if abs(b) < 1.0e-6 {
        return 0.0;
    }
    return a / b;
}

fn blend_rgb(a: vec3<f32>, b: vec3<f32>, mode: u32) -> vec3<f32> {
    switch mode {
        case 0u: { return b; }
        case 1u: { return 1.0 - (1.0 - a) * (1.0 - b); }
        case 2u: { return a + b; }
        case 3u: { return max(a, b); }
        case 4u: { return a * b; }
        case 5u: { return abs(a - b); }
        case 6u: {
            return vec3<f32>(
                overlay_channel(a.x, b.x),
                overlay_channel(a.y, b.y),
                overlay_channel(a.z, b.z),
            );
        }
        case 7u: {
            return vec3<f32>(safe_div(a.x, b.x), safe_div(a.y, b.y), safe_div(a.z, b.z));
        }
        default: { return b; }
    }
}

fn n0_fetch_in(c: vec2<f32>) -> vec4<f32> {
    return textureSampleLevel(src_0, samp, c, 0.0);
}

fn n0_sg_blur_9(uv: vec2<f32>, d: vec2<f32>) -> vec4<f32> {
    var acc = n0_fetch_in(uv) * SG_K9_0;
    acc += (n0_fetch_in(uv + d      ) + n0_fetch_in(uv - d      )) * SG_K9_1;
    acc += (n0_fetch_in(uv + d * 2.0) + n0_fetch_in(uv - d * 2.0)) * SG_K9_2;
    acc += (n0_fetch_in(uv + d * 3.0) + n0_fetch_in(uv - d * 3.0)) * SG_K9_3;
    acc += (n0_fetch_in(uv + d * 4.0) + n0_fetch_in(uv - d * 4.0)) * SG_K9_4;
    return acc;
}

fn n0_sg_blur_17(uv: vec2<f32>, d: vec2<f32>) -> vec4<f32> {
    var acc = n0_fetch_in(uv) * SG_K17_0;
    acc += (n0_fetch_in(uv + d      ) + n0_fetch_in(uv - d      )) * SG_K17_1;
    acc += (n0_fetch_in(uv + d * 2.0) + n0_fetch_in(uv - d * 2.0)) * SG_K17_2;
    acc += (n0_fetch_in(uv + d * 3.0) + n0_fetch_in(uv - d * 3.0)) * SG_K17_3;
    acc += (n0_fetch_in(uv + d * 4.0) + n0_fetch_in(uv - d * 4.0)) * SG_K17_4;
    acc += (n0_fetch_in(uv + d * 5.0) + n0_fetch_in(uv - d * 5.0)) * SG_K17_5;
    acc += (n0_fetch_in(uv + d * 6.0) + n0_fetch_in(uv - d * 6.0)) * SG_K17_6;
    acc += (n0_fetch_in(uv + d * 7.0) + n0_fetch_in(uv - d * 7.0)) * SG_K17_7;
    acc += (n0_fetch_in(uv + d * 8.0) + n0_fetch_in(uv - d * 8.0)) * SG_K17_8;
    return acc;
}

fn n0_sg_blur_25(uv: vec2<f32>, d: vec2<f32>) -> vec4<f32> {
    var acc = n0_fetch_in(uv) * SG_K25_0;
    acc += (n0_fetch_in(uv + d       ) + n0_fetch_in(uv - d       )) * SG_K25_1;
    acc += (n0_fetch_in(uv + d *  2.0) + n0_fetch_in(uv - d *  2.0)) * SG_K25_2;
    acc += (n0_fetch_in(uv + d *  3.0) + n0_fetch_in(uv - d *  3.0)) * SG_K25_3;
    acc += (n0_fetch_in(uv + d *  4.0) + n0_fetch_in(uv - d *  4.0)) * SG_K25_4;
    acc += (n0_fetch_in(uv + d *  5.0) + n0_fetch_in(uv - d *  5.0)) * SG_K25_5;
    acc += (n0_fetch_in(uv + d *  6.0) + n0_fetch_in(uv - d *  6.0)) * SG_K25_6;
    acc += (n0_fetch_in(uv + d *  7.0) + n0_fetch_in(uv - d *  7.0)) * SG_K25_7;
    acc += (n0_fetch_in(uv + d *  8.0) + n0_fetch_in(uv - d *  8.0)) * SG_K25_8;
    acc += (n0_fetch_in(uv + d *  9.0) + n0_fetch_in(uv - d *  9.0)) * SG_K25_9;
    acc += (n0_fetch_in(uv + d * 10.0) + n0_fetch_in(uv - d * 10.0)) * SG_K25_10;
    acc += (n0_fetch_in(uv + d * 11.0) + n0_fetch_in(uv - d * 11.0)) * SG_K25_11;
    acc += (n0_fetch_in(uv + d * 12.0) + n0_fetch_in(uv - d * 12.0)) * SG_K25_12;
    return acc;
}

// Dynamic-radius separable Gaussian — bit-exact port of the legacy fluid-sim
// blur. Bilinear tap-pair optimisation: adjacent samples (j, j+1) collapse to one
// bilinear fetch at their weighted midpoint.

fn n0_sg_blur_dynamic(uv: vec2<f32>, axis_dir: vec2<f32>, radius: f32) -> vec4<f32> {
    let sigma = max(radius / 3.0, 1.0);
    let inv_two_sigma_sq = 1.0 / (2.0 * sigma * sigma);

    var result = n0_fetch_in(uv);
    var total_weight = 1.0;

    let radius_int = i32(radius);
    var j: i32 = 1;
    loop {
        if j > radius_int { break; }

        let fj = f32(j);
        let w_a = exp(-(fj * fj) * inv_two_sigma_sq);

        if j + 1 <= radius_int {
            let fj1 = f32(j + 1);
            let w_b = exp(-(fj1 * fj1) * inv_two_sigma_sq);
            let w_ab = w_a + w_b;
            let offset = fj + w_b / w_ab;

            result += n0_fetch_in(uv + axis_dir * offset) * w_ab;
            result += n0_fetch_in(uv - axis_dir * offset) * w_ab;
            total_weight += w_ab * 2.0;
        } else {
            result += n0_fetch_in(uv + axis_dir * fj) * w_a;
            result += n0_fetch_in(uv - axis_dir * fj) * w_a;
            total_weight += w_a * 2.0;
        }

        j += 2;
    }

    return result / total_weight;
}

// Linear-radius separable Gaussian — exact port of node.blur's per-axis pass
// (blur.wgsl mode 0): sigma = max(radius/2, 0.5), one tap per integer offset
// -r..r (no tap-pair trick), normalized by the running weight sum, radius
// clamped to 32. radius <= 0 collapses to a single center sample. Taps land on
// texel centers, so fusing through this mode is filter-exact by construction.

fn n0_sg_blur_linear(uv: vec2<f32>, axis_dir: vec2<f32>, radius: f32) -> vec4<f32> {
    // Single-exit on purpose: an early return here leaves unreachable blocks
    // that abort spirv-opt's merge-return pass, and the whole fused kernel
    // then ships UNOPTIMIZED (no inlining/DCE — measured slow enough to flip
    // the perf gate). Same arithmetic, same order, just one return.
    let r_int = min(i32(radius), 32);
    var result: vec4<f32>;
    if r_int <= 0 {
        result = n0_fetch_in(uv);
    } else {
        let sigma = max(radius * 0.5, 0.5);
        let two_sigma_sq = 2.0 * sigma * sigma;

        var sum = vec4<f32>(0.0);
        var weight_sum = 0.0;
        for (var d: i32 = -r_int; d <= r_int; d = d + 1) {
            let s = n0_fetch_in(uv + axis_dir * f32(d));
            let dist_sq = f32(d * d);
            let w = exp(-dist_sq / two_sigma_sq);
            sum = sum + s * w;
            weight_sum = weight_sum + w;
        }
        result = sum / max(weight_sum, 1e-6);
    }
    return result;
}

fn n0_body(uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, kernel_size: u32, axis: u32, step: f32, radius_mode: u32, radius: f32, address_mode: u32) -> vec4<f32> {
    let texel = vec2<f32>(1.0) / dims;

    var result: vec4<f32>;
    if radius_mode == 1u || radius_mode == 2u {
        var axis_dir: vec2<f32>;
        if axis == 0u {
            axis_dir = vec2<f32>(texel.x, 0.0);
        } else {
            axis_dir = vec2<f32>(0.0, texel.y);
        }
        if radius_mode == 2u {
            result = n0_sg_blur_linear(uv, axis_dir, radius);
        } else {
            result = n0_sg_blur_dynamic(uv, axis_dir, radius);
        }
    } else {
        var d: vec2<f32>;
        if axis == 0u {
            d = vec2<f32>(texel.x * step, 0.0);
        } else {
            d = vec2<f32>(0.0, texel.y * step);
        }
        if kernel_size == 0u {
            result = n0_sg_blur_9(uv, d);
        } else if kernel_size == 1u {
            result = n0_sg_blur_17(uv, d);
        } else {
            result = n0_sg_blur_25(uv, d);
        }
    }

    return result;
}

fn n1_body(a: vec4<f32>, b: vec4<f32>, mask: vec4<f32>, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, amount: f32) -> vec4<f32> {
    let weight = clamp(mask.r * amount, 0.0, 1.0);
    return mix(a, b, weight);
}

fn n2_body(c: vec4<f32>, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, min_v: f32, max_v: f32) -> vec4<f32> {
    return vec4<f32>(clamp(c.rgb, vec3<f32>(min_v), vec3<f32>(max_v)), c.a);
}

fn n3_body(a: vec4<f32>, b: vec4<f32>, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, amount: f32, mode: u32) -> vec4<f32> {
    let blended = blend_rgb(a.rgb, b.rgb, mode);
    let out_rgb = mix(a.rgb, blended, amount);
    // Branchless on purpose: an `if` here compiles differently in fused vs
    // standalone kernel contexts (FMA regrouping) and broke the fp32
    // bit-exact proof (precision contract §7.1's "match the exact arithmetic
    // form" gotcha). mix(x, y, 0.0) = x + (y-x)*0.0 = x exactly, so t_a = 0
    // IS alpha pass-through, in the original instruction shape.
    let t_a = select(0.0, amount, mode == 0u);
    let out_a = mix(a.a, b.a, t_a);
    return vec4<f32>(out_rgb, out_a);
}

@compute @workgroup_size(16, 16)
fn cs_main(@builtin(global_invocation_id) id: vec3<u32>) {
    let dims = textureDimensions(dst_0);
    if id.x >= dims.x || id.y >= dims.y {
        return;
    }
    let coord = vec2<i32>(i32(id.x), i32(id.y));
    let uv = (vec2<f32>(id.xy) + 0.5) / vec2<f32>(dims);
    let ext_1 = textureLoad(src_1, coord, 0);
    let ext_2 = textureSampleLevel(src_2, samp, uv, 0.0);
    let ext_3 = textureLoad(src_3, coord, 0);
    let r0 = q16(n0_body(uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n0_kernel_size, params.n0_axis, params.n0_step, params.n0_radius_mode, params.n0_radius, params.n0_address_mode));
    let r1 = q16(n1_body(ext_1, r0, ext_2, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n1_amount));
    let r2 = q16(n2_body(r1, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n2_min, params.n2_max));
    let r3 = n3_body(ext_3, r2, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n3_amount, params.n3_mode);
    textureStore(dst_0, coord, r2);
    textureStore(dst_1, coord, r3);
}

=== generator:Cymatics node:45 ===
// @static_param: n1_a
// @static_param: n1_b
// @static_param: n1_c
// @static_param: n1_freq_scale
// @static_param: n1_time
// @static_param: n1_time_scale
// @static_param: n2_a
// @static_param: n2_b
// @static_param: n2_c
// @static_param: n2_freq_scale
// @static_param: n2_time
// @static_param: n2_time_scale
// @static_param: n3_amount
// @static_param: n3_mode
// @static_param: n4_a
// @static_param: n4_b
// @static_param: n4_c
// @static_param: n4_freq_scale
// @static_param: n4_time
// @static_param: n4_time_scale
// @static_param: n5_a
// @static_param: n5_b
// @static_param: n5_c
// @static_param: n5_freq_scale
// @static_param: n5_time
// @static_param: n5_time_scale
// @static_param: n6_amount
// @static_param: n6_mode
// @static_param: n7_amount
// @static_param: n7_mode
// @static_param: n9_amount
// @static_param: n9_mode
struct Params {
    n1_a: f32,
    n1_b: f32,
    n1_c: f32,
    n1_freq: f32,
    n1_freq_scale: f32,
    n1_time: f32,
    n1_time_scale: f32,
    n2_a: f32,
    n2_b: f32,
    n2_c: f32,
    n2_freq: f32,
    n2_freq_scale: f32,
    n2_time: f32,
    n2_time_scale: f32,
    n3_amount: f32,
    n3_mode: u32,
    n4_a: f32,
    n4_b: f32,
    n4_c: f32,
    n4_freq: f32,
    n4_freq_scale: f32,
    n4_time: f32,
    n4_time_scale: f32,
    n5_a: f32,
    n5_b: f32,
    n5_c: f32,
    n5_freq: f32,
    n5_freq_scale: f32,
    n5_time: f32,
    n5_time_scale: f32,
    n6_amount: f32,
    n6_mode: u32,
    n7_amount: f32,
    n7_mode: u32,
    n9_amount: f32,
    n9_mode: u32,
}

@group(0) @binding(0) var<uniform> params: Params;
@group(0) @binding(1) var dst_0: texture_storage_2d<rgba16float, write>;
@group(0) @binding(2) var dst_1: texture_storage_2d<rgba16float, write>;

fn overlay_channel(a: f32, b: f32) -> f32 {
    if a < 0.5 {
        return 2.0 * a * b;
    }
    return 1.0 - 2.0 * (1.0 - a) * (1.0 - b);
}

fn safe_div(a: f32, b: f32) -> f32 {
    if abs(b) < 1.0e-6 {
        return 0.0;
    }
    return a / b;
}

fn blend_rgb(a: vec3<f32>, b: vec3<f32>, mode: u32) -> vec3<f32> {
    switch mode {
        case 0u: { return b; }
        case 1u: { return 1.0 - (1.0 - a) * (1.0 - b); }
        case 2u: { return a + b; }
        case 3u: { return max(a, b); }
        case 4u: { return a * b; }
        case 5u: { return abs(a - b); }
        case 6u: {
            return vec3<f32>(
                overlay_channel(a.x, b.x),
                overlay_channel(a.y, b.y),
                overlay_channel(a.z, b.z),
            );
        }
        case 7u: {
            return vec3<f32>(safe_div(a.x, b.x), safe_div(a.y, b.y), safe_div(a.z, b.z));
        }
        default: { return b; }
    }
}

fn n0_body(uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>) -> vec4<f32> {
    return vec4<f32>(uv.x, uv.y, 0.0, 1.0);
}

fn n1_body(
    field: vec4<f32>,
    uv: vec2<f32>,
    dims: vec2<f32>,
    a: f32,
    b: f32,
    c: f32,
    freq: f32,
    freq_scale: f32,
    time: f32,
    time_scale: f32,
) -> vec4<f32> {
    let proj = a * field.r + b * field.g + c;
    let phase = time * time_scale;
    let fr = freq * freq_scale;
    let v = sin(proj * fr + phase);
    return vec4<f32>(v, v, v, 1.0);
}

fn n2_body(
    field: vec4<f32>,
    uv: vec2<f32>,
    dims: vec2<f32>,
    a: f32,
    b: f32,
    c: f32,
    freq: f32,
    freq_scale: f32,
    time: f32,
    time_scale: f32,
) -> vec4<f32> {
    let proj = a * field.r + b * field.g + c;
    let phase = time * time_scale;
    let fr = freq * freq_scale;
    let v = sin(proj * fr + phase);
    return vec4<f32>(v, v, v, 1.0);
}

fn n3_body(a: vec4<f32>, b: vec4<f32>, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, amount: f32, mode: u32) -> vec4<f32> {
    let blended = blend_rgb(a.rgb, b.rgb, mode);
    let out_rgb = mix(a.rgb, blended, amount);
    // Branchless on purpose: an `if` here compiles differently in fused vs
    // standalone kernel contexts (FMA regrouping) and broke the fp32
    // bit-exact proof (precision contract §7.1's "match the exact arithmetic
    // form" gotcha). mix(x, y, 0.0) = x + (y-x)*0.0 = x exactly, so t_a = 0
    // IS alpha pass-through, in the original instruction shape.
    let t_a = select(0.0, amount, mode == 0u);
    let out_a = mix(a.a, b.a, t_a);
    return vec4<f32>(out_rgb, out_a);
}

fn n4_body(
    field: vec4<f32>,
    uv: vec2<f32>,
    dims: vec2<f32>,
    a: f32,
    b: f32,
    c: f32,
    freq: f32,
    freq_scale: f32,
    time: f32,
    time_scale: f32,
) -> vec4<f32> {
    let proj = a * field.r + b * field.g + c;
    let phase = time * time_scale;
    let fr = freq * freq_scale;
    let v = sin(proj * fr + phase);
    return vec4<f32>(v, v, v, 1.0);
}

fn n5_body(
    field: vec4<f32>,
    uv: vec2<f32>,
    dims: vec2<f32>,
    a: f32,
    b: f32,
    c: f32,
    freq: f32,
    freq_scale: f32,
    time: f32,
    time_scale: f32,
) -> vec4<f32> {
    let proj = a * field.r + b * field.g + c;
    let phase = time * time_scale;
    let fr = freq * freq_scale;
    let v = sin(proj * fr + phase);
    return vec4<f32>(v, v, v, 1.0);
}

fn n6_body(a: vec4<f32>, b: vec4<f32>, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, amount: f32, mode: u32) -> vec4<f32> {
    let blended = blend_rgb(a.rgb, b.rgb, mode);
    let out_rgb = mix(a.rgb, blended, amount);
    // Branchless on purpose: an `if` here compiles differently in fused vs
    // standalone kernel contexts (FMA regrouping) and broke the fp32
    // bit-exact proof (precision contract §7.1's "match the exact arithmetic
    // form" gotcha). mix(x, y, 0.0) = x + (y-x)*0.0 = x exactly, so t_a = 0
    // IS alpha pass-through, in the original instruction shape.
    let t_a = select(0.0, amount, mode == 0u);
    let out_a = mix(a.a, b.a, t_a);
    return vec4<f32>(out_rgb, out_a);
}

fn n7_body(a: vec4<f32>, b: vec4<f32>, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, amount: f32, mode: u32) -> vec4<f32> {
    let blended = blend_rgb(a.rgb, b.rgb, mode);
    let out_rgb = mix(a.rgb, blended, amount);
    // Branchless on purpose: an `if` here compiles differently in fused vs
    // standalone kernel contexts (FMA regrouping) and broke the fp32
    // bit-exact proof (precision contract §7.1's "match the exact arithmetic
    // form" gotcha). mix(x, y, 0.0) = x + (y-x)*0.0 = x exactly, so t_a = 0
    // IS alpha pass-through, in the original instruction shape.
    let t_a = select(0.0, amount, mode == 0u);
    let out_a = mix(a.a, b.a, t_a);
    return vec4<f32>(out_rgb, out_a);
}

fn n8_body(c: vec4<f32>, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>) -> vec4<f32> {
    return vec4<f32>(abs(c.r), abs(c.g), abs(c.b), c.a);
}

fn n9_body(a: vec4<f32>, b: vec4<f32>, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, amount: f32, mode: u32) -> vec4<f32> {
    let blended = blend_rgb(a.rgb, b.rgb, mode);
    let out_rgb = mix(a.rgb, blended, amount);
    // Branchless on purpose: an `if` here compiles differently in fused vs
    // standalone kernel contexts (FMA regrouping) and broke the fp32
    // bit-exact proof (precision contract §7.1's "match the exact arithmetic
    // form" gotcha). mix(x, y, 0.0) = x + (y-x)*0.0 = x exactly, so t_a = 0
    // IS alpha pass-through, in the original instruction shape.
    let t_a = select(0.0, amount, mode == 0u);
    let out_a = mix(a.a, b.a, t_a);
    return vec4<f32>(out_rgb, out_a);
}

fn n10_body(c: vec4<f32>, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>) -> vec4<f32> {
    return vec4<f32>(abs(c.r), abs(c.g), abs(c.b), c.a);
}

@compute @workgroup_size(16, 16)
fn cs_main(@builtin(global_invocation_id) id: vec3<u32>) {
    let dims = textureDimensions(dst_0);
    if id.x >= dims.x || id.y >= dims.y {
        return;
    }
    let coord = vec2<i32>(i32(id.x), i32(id.y));
    let uv = (vec2<f32>(id.xy) + 0.5) / vec2<f32>(dims);
    let r0 = n0_body(uv, vec2<f32>(dims));
    let r1 = n1_body(r0, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n1_a, params.n1_b, params.n1_c, params.n1_freq, params.n1_freq_scale, params.n1_time, params.n1_time_scale);
    let r2 = n2_body(r0, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n2_a, params.n2_b, params.n2_c, params.n2_freq, params.n2_freq_scale, params.n2_time, params.n2_time_scale);
    let r3 = n3_body(r1, r2, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n3_amount, params.n3_mode);
    let r4 = n4_body(r0, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n4_a, params.n4_b, params.n4_c, params.n4_freq, params.n4_freq_scale, params.n4_time, params.n4_time_scale);
    let r5 = n5_body(r0, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n5_a, params.n5_b, params.n5_c, params.n5_freq, params.n5_freq_scale, params.n5_time, params.n5_time_scale);
    let r6 = n6_body(r4, r5, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n6_amount, params.n6_mode);
    let r7 = n7_body(r3, r6, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n7_amount, params.n7_mode);
    let r8 = n8_body(r7, uv, vec2<f32>(dims));
    let r9 = n9_body(r3, r6, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n9_amount, params.n9_mode);
    let r10 = n10_body(r9, uv, vec2<f32>(dims));
    textureStore(dst_0, coord, r8);
    textureStore(dst_1, coord, r10);
}

=== generator:Cymatics node:46 ===
struct Element {
    position: vec3<f32>,
    velocity: vec3<f32>,
    life: f32,
    age: f32,
    color: vec4<f32>,
}

struct Element2 {
    x: f32,
    y: f32,
}

struct Params {
    n0_strength: f32,
    n0_active_count: i32,
    n1_active_count: i32,
    n2_active_count: i32,
    n2_speed: f32,
    n3_active_count: i32,
    n0_frame_count: u32,
    n2_dt_scaled: f32,
}

// @derived_uniform_member: n0_frame_count words=1 node.anti_clump_particles
// @derived_uniform_member: n2_dt_scaled words=1 node.move_particles
@group(0) @binding(0) var<uniform> params: Params;
@group(0) @binding(1) var<storage, read_write> src_0: array<Element>;
@group(0) @binding(2) var src_1: texture_2d<f32>;
@group(0) @binding(3) var src_2: texture_2d<f32>;
@group(0) @binding(4) var samp: sampler;

fn acp_wang_hash(seed_in: u32) -> u32 {
    var seed = seed_in;
    seed = (seed ^ 61u) ^ (seed >> 16u);
    seed = seed * 9u;
    seed = seed ^ (seed >> 4u);
    seed = seed * 0x27d4eb2du;
    seed = seed ^ (seed >> 15u);
    return seed;
}

fn acp_hash_float2(seed: u32) -> vec2<f32> {
    let h1 = acp_wang_hash(seed);
    let h2 = acp_wang_hash(h1);
    return vec2<f32>(f32(h1), f32(h2)) / 4294967296.0;
}

fn n0_body(
    idx: u32,
    count: u32,
    e_in: Element,
    tex_strength_modulator: texture_2d<f32>,
    samp: sampler,
    strength: f32,
    active_count: i32,
    frame_count: u32,
    use_strength_modulator: u32,
) -> Element {
    var p = e_in;
    if strength <= 0.0 {
        return p;
    }
    if p.life <= 0.0 {
        return p;
    }

    let uv = vec2<f32>(p.position.x, p.position.y);
    var weight: f32 = 1.0;
    if use_strength_modulator != 0u {
        let m = textureSampleLevel(tex_strength_modulator, samp, uv, 0.0).r;
        weight = m / (1.0 + m);
    }

    let seed = idx * 1664525u + frame_count * 747796405u;
    let kick = (acp_hash_float2(seed) - 0.5) * strength * weight;

    p.position = vec3<f32>(p.position.x + kick.x, p.position.y + kick.y, 0.0);
    return p;
}

fn n1_body(
    idx: u32,
    count: u32,
    e_particles: Element,
    tex_in: texture_2d<f32>,
    samp: sampler,
    active_count: i32,
) -> Element2 {
    let uv = vec2<f32>(e_particles.position.x, e_particles.position.y);
    let sample = textureSampleLevel(tex_in, samp, uv, 0.0);
    return Element2(sample.x, sample.y);
}

fn n2_body(
    idx: u32,
    count: u32,
    e_in: Element,
    e_forces: Element2,
    active_count: i32,
    speed: f32,
    dt_scaled: f32,
) -> Element {
    var p = e_in;
    if p.life <= 0.0 {
        return p;
    }
    let step = vec2<f32>(e_forces.x, e_forces.y) * speed * dt_scaled;
    p.position = vec3<f32>(p.position.x + step.x, p.position.y + step.y, 0.0);
    return p;
}

fn n3_body(idx: u32, count: u32, e_in: Element, active_count: i32) -> Element {
    var p = e_in;
    if p.life <= 0.0 {
        return p;
    }
    p.position = vec3<f32>(
        fract(p.position.x + 1.0),
        fract(p.position.y + 1.0),
        0.0,
    );
    return p;
}

@compute @workgroup_size(256)
fn cs_main(@builtin(global_invocation_id) gid: vec3<u32>) {
    let idx = gid.x;
    let count = arrayLength(&src_0);
    if idx >= count {
        return;
    }
    let e_0 = src_0[idx];
    let r0 = n0_body(idx, count, e_0, src_1, samp, params.n0_strength, params.n0_active_count, params.n0_frame_count, 1u);
    let r1 = n1_body(idx, count, e_0, src_2, samp, params.n1_active_count);
    let r2 = n2_body(idx, count, r0, r1, params.n2_active_count, params.n2_speed, params.n2_dt_scaled);
    let r3 = n3_body(idx, count, r2, params.n3_active_count);
    src_0[idx] = r3;
}

=== generator:DigitalPlants node:38 ===
struct Element {
    pos_scale: vec4<f32>,
    rot: vec4<f32>,
}

struct Element2 {
    x: f32,
    y: f32,
}

struct Params {
    n0_frequency: f32,
    n0_amplitude: f32,
    n0_time_uvx_drift: f32,
    n0_z_coord: f32,
    n0_axis_seed: f32,
    n1_frequency: f32,
    n1_amplitude: f32,
    n1_time_uvx_drift: f32,
    n1_z_coord: f32,
    n1_axis_seed: f32,
    n2_t: f32,
    n3_amplitude: f32,
}

@group(0) @binding(0) var<uniform> params: Params;
@group(0) @binding(1) var<storage, read> src_0: array<Element>;
@group(0) @binding(2) var<storage, read> src_1: array<Element2>;
@group(0) @binding(3) var<storage, read> src_2: array<Element>;
// @fused_output
@group(0) @binding(4) var<storage, read_write> dst: array<Element>;

// noise_common.wgsl — Shared noise library for MANIFOLD generators.
//
// Include via string concatenation at pipeline creation time:
//   let source = format!("{}\n{}", NOISE_COMMON, MAIN_SHADER);
//
// Contains: Ashima Arts simplex 3D, FBM, and deterministic hashing.
// No entry points — pure library.

// ─── Simplex 3D Noise (Ashima Arts, MIT license) ──────────────────────

fn mod289_3(x: vec3<f32>) -> vec3<f32> { return x - floor(x * (1.0 / 289.0)) * 289.0; }
fn mod289_4(x: vec4<f32>) -> vec4<f32> { return x - floor(x * (1.0 / 289.0)) * 289.0; }
fn permute(x: vec4<f32>) -> vec4<f32> { return mod289_4(((x * 34.0) + 10.0) * x); }
fn taylor_inv_sqrt(r: vec4<f32>) -> vec4<f32> { return 1.79284291400159 - 0.85373472095314 * r; }

fn simplex3d(v: vec3<f32>) -> f32 {
    let C = vec2<f32>(1.0 / 6.0, 1.0 / 3.0);
    let D = vec4<f32>(0.0, 0.5, 1.0, 2.0);

    // First corner
    var i = floor(v + dot(v, vec3(C.y)));
    let x0 = v - i + dot(i, vec3(C.x));

    // Other corners
    let g = step(x0.yzx, x0.xyz);
    let l = 1.0 - g;
    let i1 = min(g.xyz, l.zxy);
    let i2 = max(g.xyz, l.zxy);

    let x1 = x0 - i1 + C.x;
    let x2 = x0 - i2 + C.y;
    let x3 = x0 - D.yyy;

    // Permutations
    i = mod289_3(i);
    let p = permute(permute(permute(
        i.z + vec4<f32>(0.0, i1.z, i2.z, 1.0))
      + i.y + vec4<f32>(0.0, i1.y, i2.y, 1.0))
      + i.x + vec4<f32>(0.0, i1.x, i2.x, 1.0));

    // Gradients: 7x7 points over a square, mapped onto an octahedron.
    let ns = vec3<f32>(0.285714285714, -0.928571428571, 0.142857142857);
    let j = p - 49.0 * floor(p * ns.z * ns.z);

    let x_ = floor(j * ns.z);
    let y_ = floor(j - 7.0 * x_);

    let x = x_ * ns.x + ns.y;
    let y = y_ * ns.x + ns.y;
    let h = 1.0 - abs(x) - abs(y);

    let b0 = vec4<f32>(x.xy, y.xy);
    let b1 = vec4<f32>(x.zw, y.zw);

    let s0 = floor(b0) * 2.0 + 1.0;
    let s1 = floor(b1) * 2.0 + 1.0;
    let sh = -step(h, vec4<f32>(0.0));

    let a0 = b0.xzyw + s0.xzyw * sh.xxyy;
    let a1 = b1.xzyw + s1.xzyw * sh.zzww;

    var p0 = vec3<f32>(a0.xy, h.x);
    var p1 = vec3<f32>(a0.zw, h.y);
    var p2 = vec3<f32>(a1.xy, h.z);
    var p3 = vec3<f32>(a1.zw, h.w);

    // Normalise gradients
    let norm = taylor_inv_sqrt(vec4<f32>(dot(p0, p0), dot(p1, p1), dot(p2, p2), dot(p3, p3)));
    p0 *= norm.x;
    p1 *= norm.y;
    p2 *= norm.z;
    p3 *= norm.w;

    // Mix final noise value
    var m = max(0.5 - vec4<f32>(dot(x0, x0), dot(x1, x1), dot(x2, x2), dot(x3, x3)), vec4(0.0));
    m = m * m;
    return 105.0 * dot(m * m, vec4<f32>(dot(p0, x0), dot(p1, x1), dot(p2, x2), dot(p3, x3)));
}

// ─── FBM (Fractal Brownian Motion) ────────────────────────────────────
// 5 octaves, lacunarity 1.5, gain 0.8

fn fbm(p: vec3<f32>) -> f32 {
    var val = 0.0;
    var amp = 1.0;
    var freq = 1.0;
    var total_amp = 0.0;
    for (var i = 0u; i < 5u; i++) {
        val += simplex3d(p * freq) * amp;
        total_amp += amp;
        freq *= 1.5;
        amp *= 0.8;
    }
    return val / total_amp;
}

// ─── Deterministic pseudo-random from index ───────────────────────────

fn hash_u32(n: u32) -> f32 {
    var x = n;
    x ^= x >> 16u;
    x *= 0x45d9f3bu;
    x ^= x >> 16u;
    x *= 0x45d9f3bu;
    x ^= x >> 16u;
    return f32(x) / 4294967295.0;
}

fn random_rotation(idx: u32) -> vec3<f32> {
    let TAU = 6.283185307;
    return vec3<f32>(
        hash_u32(idx * 3u + 0u) * TAU,
        hash_u32(idx * 3u + 1u) * TAU,
        hash_u32(idx * 3u + 2u) * TAU,
    );
}

fn n0_body(
    idx: u32,
    count: u32,
    e_instances: Element,
    e_uv: Element2,
    frequency: f32,
    amplitude: f32,
    time_uvx_drift: f32,
    z_coord: f32,
    axis_seed: f32,
) -> Element {
    let base = vec3<f32>(
        e_uv.x * frequency + time_uvx_drift,
        e_uv.y * frequency,
        z_coord,
    );

    let dx = simplex3d(base);
    let dy = simplex3d(base + vec3<f32>(axis_seed, 0.0, 0.0));
    let dz = simplex3d(base + vec3<f32>(0.0, axis_seed, 0.0));

    var pos = e_instances.pos_scale.xyz;
    pos = pos + vec3<f32>(dx, dy, dz) * amplitude;

    return Element(
        vec4<f32>(pos, e_instances.pos_scale.w),
        e_instances.rot,
    );
}

fn n1_body(
    idx: u32,
    count: u32,
    e_instances: Element,
    e_uv: Element2,
    frequency: f32,
    amplitude: f32,
    time_uvx_drift: f32,
    z_coord: f32,
    axis_seed: f32,
) -> Element {
    let base = vec3<f32>(
        e_uv.x * frequency + time_uvx_drift,
        e_uv.y * frequency,
        z_coord,
    );

    let dx = simplex3d(base);
    let dy = simplex3d(base + vec3<f32>(axis_seed, 0.0, 0.0));
    let dz = simplex3d(base + vec3<f32>(0.0, axis_seed, 0.0));

    var pos = e_instances.pos_scale.xyz;
    pos = pos + vec3<f32>(dx, dy, dz) * amplitude;

    return Element(
        vec4<f32>(pos, e_instances.pos_scale.w),
        e_instances.rot,
    );
}

fn n2_body(idx: u32, count: u32, e_a: Element, e_b: Element, t: f32) -> Element {
    let inv_t = 1.0 - t;
    return Element(
        e_a.pos_scale * inv_t + e_b.pos_scale * t,
        e_a.rot * inv_t + e_b.rot * t,
    );
}

fn n3_body(idx: u32, count: u32, e_instances: Element, amplitude: f32) -> Element {
    let rx = (hash_u32(idx * 3u + 0u) - 0.5) * amplitude;
    let ry = (hash_u32(idx * 3u + 1u) - 0.5) * amplitude;
    let rz = (hash_u32(idx * 3u + 2u) - 0.5) * amplitude;

    let new_rot = e_instances.rot.xyz + vec3<f32>(rx, ry, rz);
    return Element(
        e_instances.pos_scale,
        vec4<f32>(new_rot, e_instances.rot.w),
    );
}

@compute @workgroup_size(256)
fn cs_main(@builtin(global_invocation_id) gid: vec3<u32>) {
    let idx = gid.x;
    let count = min(min(arrayLength(&src_0), arrayLength(&src_1)), arrayLength(&src_2));
    if idx >= count {
        return;
    }
    let e_0 = src_0[idx];
    let e_1 = src_1[idx];
    let e_2 = src_2[idx];
    let r0 = n0_body(idx, count, e_0, e_1, params.n0_frequency, params.n0_amplitude, params.n0_time_uvx_drift, params.n0_z_coord, params.n0_axis_seed);
    let r1 = n1_body(idx, count, e_2, e_1, params.n1_frequency, params.n1_amplitude, params.n1_time_uvx_drift, params.n1_z_coord, params.n1_axis_seed);
    let r2 = n2_body(idx, count, r1, r0, params.n2_t);
    let r3 = n3_body(idx, count, r2, params.n3_amplitude);
    dst[idx] = r3;
}

=== generator:FluidSim2D node:34 ===
// @reset_gated
// FluidSim2D seed pattern — open family.
// Writes a single-channel density texture; node.spawn_from_image
// performs exact placement (every bright texel → a particle, sub-texel
// jitter for stacks). Crisp hard-edged patterns matching the legacy Unity
// FluidSim 7-pattern set: tight cluster, 6 H-lines, 6 V-lines, 3 rings,
// diagonal X, Archimedean spiral, edge ring.
// Add an 8th pattern by appending a `case` to pattern_density's switch.

struct U {
    pattern: u32,
    _pad0: u32,
    _pad1: u32,
    _pad2: u32,
};

@group(0) @binding(0) var<uniform> u: U;
@group(0) @binding(1) var density: texture_storage_2d<r32float, write>;

const TAU: f32 = 6.28318530718;
// Half-width of every line/ring/arm in UV space. 0.0025 ≈ 5 px on a
// 1080-tall canvas — crisp at viewing distance, wide enough that the
// downstream compact pass finds enough texels for ~2M-particle round-robin.
const LINE_W: f32 = 0.0025;

fn cluster(uv: vec2<f32>) -> f32 {
    // Tight central disk. Legacy was a CLT Gaussian (spread 0.052);
    // the disk gives the same visual stack with crisper boundary.
    let d = distance(uv, vec2<f32>(0.5));
    return select(0.0, 1.0, d < 0.06);
}

fn h_lines(uv: vec2<f32>) -> f32 {
    // 6 horizontal lines at y = (k + 0.5) / 6 — legacy parity.
    let bands = 6.0;
    let nearest_y = (floor(uv.y * bands) + 0.5) / bands;
    return select(0.0, 1.0, abs(uv.y - nearest_y) < LINE_W);
}

fn v_lines(uv: vec2<f32>) -> f32 {
    // 6 vertical lines at x = (k + 0.5) / 6.
    let bands = 6.0;
    let nearest_x = (floor(uv.x * bands) + 0.5) / bands;
    return select(0.0, 1.0, abs(uv.x - nearest_x) < LINE_W);
}

fn rings(uv: vec2<f32>) -> f32 {
    // 3 concentric rings at r = 0.1, 0.2, 0.3 — legacy parity.
    let d = distance(uv, vec2<f32>(0.5));
    let on_ring = abs(d - 0.1) < LINE_W
        || abs(d - 0.2) < LINE_W
        || abs(d - 0.3) < LINE_W;
    return select(0.0, 1.0, on_ring);
}

fn cross_shape(uv: vec2<f32>) -> f32 {
    // Diagonal X — two bands at y = x and y = 1 - x. Legacy parity (NOT a + sign).
    // Multiply line width by sqrt(2) because the band runs at 45°, so the
    // perpendicular distance threshold is wider than an axis-aligned line.
    let line_w = LINE_W * 1.41421356;
    return select(0.0, 1.0,
        abs(uv.y - uv.x) < line_w || abs(uv.y - (1.0 - uv.x)) < line_w);
}

fn spiral(uv: vec2<f32>) -> f32 {
    // Archimedean spiral, 4 turns from center to r = 0.4 — legacy parity.
    // Locus: theta + k·TAU = r · 10 · TAU (for integer k), with r ≤ 0.4.
    let c = uv - vec2<f32>(0.5);
    let r = length(c);
    if r > 0.4 || r < 0.002 { return 0.0; }
    let theta = atan2(c.y, c.x);
    let k = round(r * 10.0 - theta / TAU);
    let expected_theta = r * 10.0 * TAU - k * TAU;
    let arc_dist = r * abs(theta - expected_theta);
    return select(0.0, 1.0, arc_dist < LINE_W);
}

fn edge_ring(uv: vec2<f32>) -> f32 {
    // Single ring at r = 0.45 — legacy parity.
    let d = distance(uv, vec2<f32>(0.5));
    return select(0.0, 1.0, abs(d - 0.45) < LINE_W);
}

fn pattern_density(uv: vec2<f32>, pat: u32) -> f32 {
    switch pat {
        case 0u: { return cluster(uv); }
        case 1u: { return h_lines(uv); }
        case 2u: { return v_lines(uv); }
        case 3u: { return rings(uv); }
        case 4u: { return cross_shape(uv); }
        case 5u: { return spiral(uv); }
        case 6u: { return edge_ring(uv); }
        default: { return cluster(uv); }
    }
}

@compute @workgroup_size(16, 16)
fn cs_main(@builtin(global_invocation_id) id: vec3<u32>) {
    let dims = textureDimensions(density);
    if id.x >= dims.x || id.y >= dims.y { return; }
    let uv = (vec2<f32>(id.xy) + vec2<f32>(0.5)) / vec2<f32>(dims);
    let d = pattern_density(uv, u.pattern);
    textureStore(density, vec2<i32>(id.xy), vec4<f32>(d, 0.0, 0.0, 1.0));
}

=== generator:FluidSim2D node:57 ===
struct Element {
    position: vec3<f32>,
    velocity: vec3<f32>,
    life: f32,
    age: f32,
    color: vec4<f32>,
}

struct Element2 {
    x: f32,
    y: f32,
}

struct Params {
    n0_strength: f32,
    n0_active_count: i32,
    n1_active_count: i32,
    n2_amplitude: f32,
    n2_modulator_gain: f32,
    n2_z: f32,
    n2_noise_scale: f32,
    n2_active_count: i32,
    n3_active_count: i32,
    n3_speed: f32,
    n4_active_count: i32,
    n0_frame_count: u32,
    n3_dt_scaled: f32,
    _pad0: u32,
    _pad1: u32,
    _pad2: u32,
}

// @derived_uniform_member: n0_frame_count words=1 node.anti_clump_particles
// @derived_uniform_member: n3_dt_scaled words=1 node.move_particles
@group(0) @binding(0) var<uniform> params: Params;
@group(0) @binding(1) var<storage, read_write> src_0: array<Element>;
@group(0) @binding(2) var src_1: texture_2d<f32>;
@group(0) @binding(3) var src_2: texture_2d<f32>;
@group(0) @binding(4) var samp: sampler;
// @dispatch_count_param: n0_active_count

const SNF_SIMPLEX_GRAD2_X: array<f32, 8> = array<f32, 8>(
     1.0,  0.7071,  0.0, -0.7071,
    -1.0, -0.7071,  0.0,  0.7071
);
const SNF_SIMPLEX_GRAD2_Y: array<f32, 8> = array<f32, 8>(
     0.0,  0.7071,  1.0,  0.7071,
     0.0, -0.7071, -1.0, -0.7071
);

fn acp_wang_hash(seed_in: u32) -> u32 {
    var seed = seed_in;
    seed = (seed ^ 61u) ^ (seed >> 16u);
    seed = seed * 9u;
    seed = seed ^ (seed >> 4u);
    seed = seed * 0x27d4eb2du;
    seed = seed ^ (seed >> 15u);
    return seed;
}

fn acp_hash_float2(seed: u32) -> vec2<f32> {
    let h1 = acp_wang_hash(seed);
    let h2 = acp_wang_hash(h1);
    return vec2<f32>(f32(h1), f32(h2)) / 4294967296.0;
}

fn snf_wang_hash(seed_in: u32) -> u32 {
    var seed = seed_in;
    seed = (seed ^ 61u) ^ (seed >> 16u);
    seed = seed * 9u;
    seed = seed ^ (seed >> 4u);
    seed = seed * 0x27d4eb2du;
    seed = seed ^ (seed >> 15u);
    return seed;
}

fn snf_simplex_noise_2d(v: vec2<f32>) -> f32 {
    let F2: f32 = 0.36602540378;
    let G2: f32 = 0.21132486540;

    let s = (v.x + v.y) * F2;
    let i = floor(v + s);
    let t = (i.x + i.y) * G2;
    let x0 = v - (i - t);

    let i1 = select(vec2<f32>(0.0, 1.0), vec2<f32>(1.0, 0.0), x0.x > x0.y);
    let x1 = x0 - i1 + G2;
    let x2 = x0 - 1.0 + 2.0 * G2;

    let h0 = snf_wang_hash(u32(i.x + 10000.0) * 73856093u ^ u32(i.y + 10000.0) * 19349663u);
    let h1 = snf_wang_hash(u32(i.x + i1.x + 10000.0) * 73856093u ^ u32(i.y + i1.y + 10000.0) * 19349663u);
    let h2 = snf_wang_hash(u32(i.x + 1.0 + 10000.0) * 73856093u ^ u32(i.y + 1.0 + 10000.0) * 19349663u);

    let g0 = vec2<f32>(SNF_SIMPLEX_GRAD2_X[h0 & 7u], SNF_SIMPLEX_GRAD2_Y[h0 & 7u]);
    let g1 = vec2<f32>(SNF_SIMPLEX_GRAD2_X[h1 & 7u], SNF_SIMPLEX_GRAD2_Y[h1 & 7u]);
    let g2 = vec2<f32>(SNF_SIMPLEX_GRAD2_X[h2 & 7u], SNF_SIMPLEX_GRAD2_Y[h2 & 7u]);

    let t0 = 0.5 - dot(x0, x0);
    let t1 = 0.5 - dot(x1, x1);
    let t2 = 0.5 - dot(x2, x2);

    let n0 = select(t0 * t0 * t0 * t0 * dot(g0, x0), 0.0, t0 < 0.0);
    let n1 = select(t1 * t1 * t1 * t1 * dot(g1, x1), 0.0, t1 < 0.0);
    let n2 = select(t2 * t2 * t2 * t2 * dot(g2, x2), 0.0, t2 < 0.0);

    return clamp((n0 + n1 + n2) * 35.0 + 0.5, 0.0, 1.0);
}

fn n0_body(
    idx: u32,
    count: u32,
    e_in: Element,
    tex_strength_modulator: texture_2d<f32>,
    samp: sampler,
    strength: f32,
    active_count: i32,
    frame_count: u32,
    use_strength_modulator: u32,
) -> Element {
    var p = e_in;
    if strength <= 0.0 {
        return p;
    }
    if p.life <= 0.0 {
        return p;
    }

    let uv = vec2<f32>(p.position.x, p.position.y);
    var weight: f32 = 1.0;
    if use_strength_modulator != 0u {
        let m = textureSampleLevel(tex_strength_modulator, samp, uv, 0.0).r;
        weight = m / (1.0 + m);
    }

    let seed = idx * 1664525u + frame_count * 747796405u;
    let kick = (acp_hash_float2(seed) - 0.5) * strength * weight;

    p.position = vec3<f32>(p.position.x + kick.x, p.position.y + kick.y, 0.0);
    return p;
}

fn n1_body(
    idx: u32,
    count: u32,
    e_particles: Element,
    tex_in: texture_2d<f32>,
    samp: sampler,
    active_count: i32,
) -> Element2 {
    let uv = vec2<f32>(e_particles.position.x, e_particles.position.y);
    let sample = textureSampleLevel(tex_in, samp, uv, 0.0);
    return Element2(sample.x, sample.y);
}

fn n2_body(
    idx: u32,
    count: u32,
    e_in: Element2,
    e_particles: Element,
    tex_amplitude_modulator: texture_2d<f32>,
    samp: sampler,
    amplitude: f32,
    modulator_gain: f32,
    z: f32,
    noise_scale: f32,
    active_count: i32,
    use_amplitude_modulator: u32,
) -> Element2 {
    if e_particles.life <= 0.0 {
        return e_in;
    }

    let uv = vec2<f32>(e_particles.position.x, e_particles.position.y);
    var local_amp = amplitude;
    if use_amplitude_modulator != 0u {
        let m = textureSampleLevel(tex_amplitude_modulator, samp, uv, 0.0).r;
        let capped = m / (1.0 + m);
        local_amp = amplitude * (1.0 + capped * modulator_gain);
    }

    let noise_uv = uv * noise_scale + z;
    let n_x = snf_simplex_noise_2d(noise_uv);
    let n_y = snf_simplex_noise_2d(noise_uv + 100.0);
    let noise_force = (vec2<f32>(n_x, n_y) - 0.5) * 2.0 * local_amp;

    return Element2(e_in.x + noise_force.x, e_in.y + noise_force.y);
}

fn n3_body(
    idx: u32,
    count: u32,
    e_in: Element,
    e_forces: Element2,
    active_count: i32,
    speed: f32,
    dt_scaled: f32,
) -> Element {
    var p = e_in;
    if p.life <= 0.0 {
        return p;
    }
    let step = vec2<f32>(e_forces.x, e_forces.y) * speed * dt_scaled;
    p.position = vec3<f32>(p.position.x + step.x, p.position.y + step.y, 0.0);
    return p;
}

fn n4_body(idx: u32, count: u32, e_in: Element, active_count: i32) -> Element {
    var p = e_in;
    if p.life <= 0.0 {
        return p;
    }
    p.position = vec3<f32>(
        fract(p.position.x + 1.0),
        fract(p.position.y + 1.0),
        0.0,
    );
    return p;
}

@compute @workgroup_size(256)
fn cs_main(@builtin(global_invocation_id) gid: vec3<u32>) {
    let idx = gid.x;
    let count = arrayLength(&src_0);
    if idx >= count {
        return;
    }
    if idx >= u32(max(params.n0_active_count, 0)) {
        return;
    }
    let e_0 = src_0[idx];
    let r0 = n0_body(idx, count, e_0, src_1, samp, params.n0_strength, params.n0_active_count, params.n0_frame_count, 1u);
    let r1 = n1_body(idx, count, r0, src_2, samp, params.n1_active_count);
    let r2 = n2_body(idx, count, r1, r0, src_1, samp, params.n2_amplitude, params.n2_modulator_gain, params.n2_z, params.n2_noise_scale, params.n2_active_count, 1u);
    let r3 = n3_body(idx, count, r0, r2, params.n3_active_count, params.n3_speed, params.n3_dt_scaled);
    let r4 = n4_body(idx, count, r3, params.n4_active_count);
    src_0[idx] = r4;
}

=== generator:FluidSim2D node:58 ===
// @static_param: n0_rotation
// @static_param: n0_translate_x
// @static_param: n0_translate_y
// @static_param: n1_curve
// @input_access: src_0 gather
struct Params {
    n0_translate_x: f32,
    n0_translate_y: f32,
    n0_scale: f32,
    n0_rotation: f32,
    n1_intensity: f32,
    n1_contrast: f32,
    n1_curve: u32,
    _pad0: u32,
}

@group(0) @binding(0) var<uniform> params: Params;
@group(0) @binding(1) var src_0: texture_2d<f32>;
@group(0) @binding(2) var samp: sampler;
@group(0) @binding(3) var dst: texture_storage_2d<rgba16float, write>;

fn n0_body(tex_in: texture_2d<f32>, s_in: sampler, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, translate_x: f32, translate_y: f32, scale: f32, rotation: f32) -> vec4<f32> {
    let aspect_ratio = dims.x / dims.y;
    let rot = -(rotation * 3.14159265358979323846 / 180.0);
