    var p = uv - vec2<f32>(0.5, 0.5);

    p.x = p.x * aspect_ratio;

    let cos_r = cos(rot);
    let sin_r = sin(rot);
    p = vec2<f32>(
        p.x * cos_r - p.y * sin_r,
        p.x * sin_r + p.y * cos_r,
    );

    p.x = p.x / aspect_ratio;

    p = p / max(scale, 0.01);
    p = p - vec2<f32>(translate_x, translate_y);
    p = p + vec2<f32>(0.5, 0.5);

    if (p.x < 0.0 || p.x > 1.0 || p.y < 0.0 || p.y > 1.0) {
        return vec4<f32>(0.0, 0.0, 0.0, 0.0);
    }

    return textureSampleLevel(tex_in, s_in, p, 0.0);
}

fn n1_body(c: vec4<f32>, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, intensity: f32, contrast: f32, curve: u32) -> vec4<f32> {
    let x = c.rgb * intensity * contrast;
    var mapped: vec3<f32>;
    if curve == 2u {
        mapped = log2(vec3<f32>(1.0) + x) / log2(65.0);
    } else if curve == 1u {
        mapped = x / (x + vec3<f32>(1.0));
    } else {
        mapped = x * (1.0 + x / vec3<f32>(9.0)) / (1.0 + x);
    }
    return vec4<f32>(mapped, c.a);
}

@compute @workgroup_size(16, 16)
fn cs_main(@builtin(global_invocation_id) id: vec3<u32>) {
    let dims = textureDimensions(dst);
    if id.x >= dims.x || id.y >= dims.y {
        return;
    }
    let coord = vec2<i32>(i32(id.x), i32(id.y));
    let uv = (vec2<f32>(id.xy) + 0.5) / vec2<f32>(dims);
    let r0 = n0_body(src_0, samp, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n0_translate_x, params.n0_translate_y, params.n0_scale, params.n0_rotation);
    let r1 = n1_body(r0, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n1_intensity, params.n1_contrast, params.n1_curve);
    textureStore(dst, coord, r1);
}

=== generator:FluidSim3D node:28 ===
// @reset_gated
// FluidSim3D seed pattern — open family (8 patterns, JSON-editable).
// Writes initial 3D particle positions for one of 8 patterns into an
// aliased Array<Particle> (allocated by node.spawn_particles upstream).
// Add a 9th pattern by appending a `case` to the switch.
//
// Patterns: 0 center cluster, 1 H planes, 2 V planes, 3 shells,
// 4 diagonal cross, 5 helix, 6 surface sphere, 7+ random fill.
// Container-aware: positions outside the SDF are pulled back inside.
// (Camera flatten is applied per-frame by node.flatten_to_camera_plane,
// so the seed itself does not flatten.)

struct U {
    active_count: u32,
    pattern: u32,
    trigger_count: u32,
    container: u32,
    ctr_scale: f32,
    _pad0: f32,
    _pad1: f32,
    _pad2: f32,
};

struct Particle {
    position: vec3<f32>,
    velocity: vec3<f32>,
    life: f32,
    age: f32,
    color: vec4<f32>,
};

@group(0) @binding(0) var<uniform> u: U;
@group(0) @binding(1) var<storage, read_write> particles: array<Particle>;

fn wang_hash(seed_in: u32) -> u32 {
    var seed = seed_in;
    seed = (seed ^ 61u) ^ (seed >> 16u);
    seed = seed * 9u;
    seed = seed ^ (seed >> 4u);
    seed = seed * 0x27d4eb2du;
    seed = seed ^ (seed >> 15u);
    return seed;
}

fn hash_float(seed: u32) -> f32 {
    return f32(wang_hash(seed)) / 4294967296.0;
}

// Independent lanes (seed XOR distinct constants) — the chained form
// (h1 = hash(h0), h2 = hash(h1)) correlated x/y/z at 0.5-0.75, smearing
// every 'random' pattern along the main diagonal (BUG-066: the seed
// cluster was a corner-to-corner cigar, not a sphere).
fn hash_float3(seed: u32) -> vec3<f32> {
    return vec3<f32>(
        f32(wang_hash(seed)) / 4294967296.0,
        f32(wang_hash(seed ^ 0x68bc21ebu)) / 4294967296.0,
        f32(wang_hash(seed ^ 0x02e5be93u)) / 4294967296.0,
    );
}

fn sd_box(p: vec3<f32>, half_size: vec3<f32>) -> f32 {
    let d = abs(p) - half_size;
    return length(max(d, vec3<f32>(0.0))) + min(max(d.x, max(d.y, d.z)), 0.0);
}

fn sd_sphere(p: vec3<f32>, r: f32) -> f32 {
    return length(p) - r;
}

fn sd_torus(p: vec3<f32>, big_r: f32, small_r: f32) -> f32 {
    let q = vec2<f32>(length(p.xz) - big_r, p.y);
    return length(q) - small_r;
}

fn container_sdf(p: vec3<f32>, ctype: u32, scale: f32) -> f32 {
    let centered = p - 0.5;
    switch ctype {
        case 1u: { return sd_box(centered, vec3<f32>(scale * 0.5)); }
        case 2u: { return sd_sphere(centered, scale * 0.5); }
        case 3u: { return sd_torus(centered, scale * 0.3, scale * 0.18); }
        default: { return -1.0; }
    }
}

fn container_gradient(p: vec3<f32>, ctype: u32, scale: f32) -> vec3<f32> {
    let eps: f32 = 0.002;
    return normalize(vec3<f32>(
        container_sdf(p + vec3<f32>(eps, 0.0, 0.0), ctype, scale) - container_sdf(p - vec3<f32>(eps, 0.0, 0.0), ctype, scale),
        container_sdf(p + vec3<f32>(0.0, eps, 0.0), ctype, scale) - container_sdf(p - vec3<f32>(0.0, eps, 0.0), ctype, scale),
        container_sdf(p + vec3<f32>(0.0, 0.0, eps), ctype, scale) - container_sdf(p - vec3<f32>(0.0, 0.0, eps), ctype, scale),
    ));
}

@compute @workgroup_size(256, 1, 1)
fn cs_main(@builtin(global_invocation_id) id: vec3<u32>) {
    let i = id.x;
    if i >= u.active_count {
        return;
    }

    let pattern_seed = u.trigger_count * 7919u;
    let seed = i * 1664525u + pattern_seed * 747796405u;
    var pos: vec3<f32>;

    switch u.pattern {
        case 0u: {
            var sum = vec3<f32>(0.0);
            var s = seed;
            for (var j: i32 = 0; j < 4; j++) {
                sum += hash_float3(s);
                s = wang_hash(s);
            }
            pos = 0.5 + (sum - 2.0) * 0.052;
        }
        case 1u: {
            let slab_idx = i % 6u;
            let xz = hash_float3(seed).xy;
            pos = vec3<f32>(xz.x, (f32(slab_idx) + 0.5) / 6.0, xz.y);
        }
        case 2u: {
            let slab_idx = i % 6u;
            let yz = hash_float3(seed).xy;
            pos = vec3<f32>((f32(slab_idx) + 0.5) / 6.0, yz.x, yz.y);
        }
        case 3u: {
            let shell_idx = i % 3u;
            let h = hash_float3(seed).xy;
            let theta = h.x * 6.28318530718;
            let phi = acos(1.0 - 2.0 * h.y);
            let radius = 0.1 + f32(shell_idx) * 0.1;
            pos = vec3<f32>(
                0.5 + sin(phi) * cos(theta) * radius,
                0.5 + sin(phi) * sin(theta) * radius,
                0.5 + cos(phi) * radius,
            );
        }
        case 4u: {
            let t = hash_float(seed);
            let spread = hash_float(seed + 1u) * 0.03;
            let axis = i % 3u;
            if axis == 0u {
                pos = vec3<f32>(t, t + spread, 0.5 + spread);
            } else if axis == 1u {
                pos = vec3<f32>(t, 0.5 + spread, t + spread);
            } else {
                pos = vec3<f32>(0.5 + spread, t, t + spread);
            }
        }
        case 5u: {
            let norm = f32(i) / f32(u.active_count);
            let angle = norm * 6.0 * 6.28318530718;
            let y = norm;
            let radius: f32 = 0.15;
            let spread = hash_float(seed) * 0.015;
            let helix_side = select(0.0, 3.14159, (i & 1u) != 0u);
            pos = vec3<f32>(
                0.5 + cos(angle + helix_side) * (radius + spread),
                y,
                0.5 + sin(angle + helix_side) * (radius + spread),
            );
        }
        case 6u: {
            let h = hash_float3(seed).xy;
            let theta = h.x * 6.28318530718;
            let phi = acos(1.0 - 2.0 * h.y);
            let spread = (hash_float(seed + 1u) - 0.5) * 0.03;
            let radius = 0.45 + spread;
            pos = vec3<f32>(
                0.5 + sin(phi) * cos(theta) * radius,
                0.5 + sin(phi) * sin(theta) * radius,
                0.5 + cos(phi) * radius,
            );
        }
        default: {
            pos = hash_float3(seed);
        }
    }

    pos = clamp(pos, vec3<f32>(0.001), vec3<f32>(0.999));

    if u.container > 0u {
        if container_sdf(pos, u.container, u.ctr_scale) > 0.0 {
            let n = container_gradient(pos, u.container, u.ctr_scale);
            let d = container_sdf(pos, u.container, u.ctr_scale);
            pos -= n * (d + 0.01);
            pos = clamp(pos, vec3<f32>(0.001), vec3<f32>(0.999));
        }
    }

    var out_p: Particle;
    out_p.position = pos;
    out_p.velocity = vec3<f32>(0.0);
    out_p.life = 1.0;
    out_p.age = -1.0;
    out_p.color = vec4<f32>(0.005, 0.005, 0.005, 1.0);
    particles[i] = out_p;
}

=== generator:FluidSim3D node:94 ===
struct Element {
    position: vec3<f32>,
    velocity: vec3<f32>,
    life: f32,
    age: f32,
    color: vec4<f32>,
}

struct Element2 {
    x: f32,
    y: f32,
    z: f32,
}

struct Params {
    n0_active_count: i32,
    n1_turbulence: f32,
    n1_anti_clump: f32,
    n1_turb_scale: f32,
    n1_active_count: i32,
    n2_diffusion: f32,
    n2_active_count: i32,
    n3_container: u32,
    n3_ctr_scale: f32,
    n3_active_count: i32,
    n4_active_count: i32,
    n4_speed: f32,
    n5_container: u32,
    n5_ctr_scale: f32,
    n5_active_count: i32,
    n6_flatten: f32,
    n6_active_count: i32,
    n7_inject_index: i32,
    n7_inject_force: f32,
    n7_inject_phase: f32,
    n7_active_count: i32,
    n1_time2: f32,
    n2_frame_count: u32,
    n4_dt_scaled: f32,
    n6_cam_fwd_x: f32,
    n6_cam_fwd_y: f32,
    n6_cam_fwd_z: f32,
    n7_time2: f32,
    n7_dt_scaled: f32,
    _pad0: u32,
    _pad1: u32,
    _pad2: u32,
}

// @camera_external: camera_ext_0
// @derived_uniform_member: n1_time2 words=1 node.turbulence_3d
// @derived_uniform_member: n2_frame_count words=1 node.spread_out_3d
// @derived_uniform_member: n4_dt_scaled words=1 node.move_particles_3d
// @derived_uniform_member: n6_cam_fwd_x words=3 node.flatten_to_camera_plane camera_ext_0
// @derived_uniform_member: n7_time2 words=2 node.add_burst_3d
@group(0) @binding(0) var<uniform> params: Params;
@group(0) @binding(1) var<storage, read_write> src_0: array<Element>;
@group(0) @binding(2) var src_1: texture_3d<f32>;
@group(0) @binding(3) var src_2: texture_3d<f32>;
@group(0) @binding(4) var samp: sampler;
// @dispatch_count_param: n0_active_count

const SNF3_SIMPLEX_GRAD2_X: array<f32, 8> = array<f32, 8>(
     1.0,  0.7071,  0.0, -0.7071,
    -1.0, -0.7071,  0.0,  0.7071
);
const SNF3_SIMPLEX_GRAD2_Y: array<f32, 8> = array<f32, 8>(
     0.0,  0.7071,  1.0,  0.7071,
     0.0, -0.7071, -1.0, -0.7071
);
const ARB3_INJECT_POINTS_3D: array<vec3<f32>, 4> = array<vec3<f32>, 4>(
    vec3<f32>(0.644, 0.644, 0.644),
    vec3<f32>(0.644, 0.356, 0.356),
    vec3<f32>(0.356, 0.644, 0.356),
    vec3<f32>(0.356, 0.356, 0.644),
);
const ARB3_INJECT_FORCE_RADIUS_3D: f32 = 0.25;
const ARB3_SIMPLEX_GRAD2_X: array<f32, 8> = array<f32, 8>(
     1.0,  0.7071,  0.0, -0.7071,
    -1.0, -0.7071,  0.0,  0.7071
);
const ARB3_SIMPLEX_GRAD2_Y: array<f32, 8> = array<f32, 8>(
     0.0,  0.7071,  1.0,  0.7071,
     0.0, -0.7071, -1.0, -0.7071
);

fn snf3_wang_hash(seed_in: u32) -> u32 {
    var seed = seed_in;
    seed = (seed ^ 61u) ^ (seed >> 16u);
    seed = seed * 9u;
    seed = seed ^ (seed >> 4u);
    seed = seed * 0x27d4eb2du;
    seed = seed ^ (seed >> 15u);
    return seed;
}

fn snf3_simplex_noise_2d(v: vec2<f32>) -> f32 {
    let F2: f32 = 0.36602540378;
    let G2: f32 = 0.21132486540;

    let s = (v.x + v.y) * F2;
    let i = floor(v + s);
    let t = (i.x + i.y) * G2;
    let x0 = v - (i - t);

    let i1 = select(vec2<f32>(0.0, 1.0), vec2<f32>(1.0, 0.0), x0.x > x0.y);
    let x1 = x0 - i1 + G2;
    let x2 = x0 - 1.0 + 2.0 * G2;

    let h0 = snf3_wang_hash(u32(i.x + 10000.0) * 73856093u ^ u32(i.y + 10000.0) * 19349663u);
    let h1 = snf3_wang_hash(u32(i.x + i1.x + 10000.0) * 73856093u ^ u32(i.y + i1.y + 10000.0) * 19349663u);
    let h2 = snf3_wang_hash(u32(i.x + 1.0 + 10000.0) * 73856093u ^ u32(i.y + 1.0 + 10000.0) * 19349663u);

    let g0 = vec2<f32>(SNF3_SIMPLEX_GRAD2_X[h0 & 7u], SNF3_SIMPLEX_GRAD2_Y[h0 & 7u]);
    let g1 = vec2<f32>(SNF3_SIMPLEX_GRAD2_X[h1 & 7u], SNF3_SIMPLEX_GRAD2_Y[h1 & 7u]);
    let g2 = vec2<f32>(SNF3_SIMPLEX_GRAD2_X[h2 & 7u], SNF3_SIMPLEX_GRAD2_Y[h2 & 7u]);

    let t0 = 0.5 - dot(x0, x0);
    let t1 = 0.5 - dot(x1, x1);
    let t2 = 0.5 - dot(x2, x2);

    let n0 = select(t0 * t0 * t0 * t0 * dot(g0, x0), 0.0, t0 < 0.0);
    let n1 = select(t1 * t1 * t1 * t1 * dot(g1, x1), 0.0, t1 < 0.0);
    let n2 = select(t2 * t2 * t2 * t2 * dot(g2, x2), 0.0, t2 < 0.0);

    return clamp((n0 + n1 + n2) * 35.0 + 0.5, 0.0, 1.0);
}

fn dfp_wang_hash(seed_in: u32) -> u32 {
    var seed = seed_in;
    seed = (seed ^ 61u) ^ (seed >> 16u);
    seed = seed * 9u;
    seed = seed ^ (seed >> 4u);
    seed = seed * 0x27d4eb2du;
    seed = seed ^ (seed >> 15u);
    return seed;
}

// Independent lanes per component (seed XOR distinct constants). The previous
// chained form (h1 = hash(h0), h2 = hash(h1)) correlates the three components
// (corr ≈ 0.5–0.75 measured), so every "random" kick leaned along the main
// diagonal — one input to BUG-066's deterministic corner anisotropy.

fn dfp_hash_float3(seed: u32) -> vec3<f32> {
    return vec3<f32>(
        f32(dfp_wang_hash(seed)) / 4294967296.0,
        f32(dfp_wang_hash(seed ^ 0x68bc21ebu)) / 4294967296.0,
        f32(dfp_wang_hash(seed ^ 0x02e5be93u)) / 4294967296.0,
    );
}

fn crf_sd_box(p: vec3<f32>, half_size: vec3<f32>) -> f32 {
    let d = abs(p) - half_size;
    return length(max(d, vec3<f32>(0.0))) + min(max(d.x, max(d.y, d.z)), 0.0);
}

fn crf_sd_sphere(p: vec3<f32>, r: f32) -> f32 {
    return length(p) - r;
}

fn crf_sd_torus(p: vec3<f32>, big_r: f32, small_r: f32) -> f32 {
    let q = vec2<f32>(length(p.xz) - big_r, p.y);
    return length(q) - small_r;
}

fn crf_container_sdf(p: vec3<f32>, ctype: u32, scale: f32) -> f32 {
    let centered = p - 0.5;
    switch ctype {
        case 1u: { return crf_sd_box(centered, vec3<f32>(scale * 0.5)); }
        case 2u: { return crf_sd_sphere(centered, scale * 0.5); }
        // tube 0.12 -> 0.18 (2026-07-10): 4.4x volume, hole kept — the
        // geometry half of the torus density normalization.
        case 3u: { return crf_sd_torus(centered, scale * 0.3, scale * 0.18); }
        default: { return -1.0; }
    }
}

fn crf_container_gradient(p: vec3<f32>, ctype: u32, scale: f32) -> vec3<f32> {
    let eps: f32 = 0.002;
    return normalize(vec3<f32>(
        crf_container_sdf(p + vec3<f32>(eps, 0.0, 0.0), ctype, scale) - crf_container_sdf(p - vec3<f32>(eps, 0.0, 0.0), ctype, scale),
        crf_container_sdf(p + vec3<f32>(0.0, eps, 0.0), ctype, scale) - crf_container_sdf(p - vec3<f32>(0.0, eps, 0.0), ctype, scale),
        crf_container_sdf(p + vec3<f32>(0.0, 0.0, eps), ctype, scale) - crf_container_sdf(p - vec3<f32>(0.0, 0.0, eps), ctype, scale),
    ));
}

fn cb3_sd_box(p: vec3<f32>, half_size: vec3<f32>) -> f32 {
    let d = abs(p) - half_size;
    return length(max(d, vec3<f32>(0.0))) + min(max(d.x, max(d.y, d.z)), 0.0);
}

fn cb3_sd_sphere(p: vec3<f32>, r: f32) -> f32 {
    return length(p) - r;
}

fn cb3_sd_torus(p: vec3<f32>, big_r: f32, small_r: f32) -> f32 {
    let q = vec2<f32>(length(p.xz) - big_r, p.y);
    return length(q) - small_r;
}

fn cb3_container_sdf(p: vec3<f32>, ctype: u32, scale: f32) -> f32 {
    let centered = p - 0.5;
    switch ctype {
        case 1u: { return cb3_sd_box(centered, vec3<f32>(scale * 0.5)); }
        case 2u: { return cb3_sd_sphere(centered, scale * 0.5); }
        // tube 0.12 -> 0.18 (2026-07-10): 4.4x volume, hole kept — the
        // geometry half of the torus density normalization.
        case 3u: { return cb3_sd_torus(centered, scale * 0.3, scale * 0.18); }
        default: { return -1.0; }
    }
}

fn cb3_container_gradient(p: vec3<f32>, ctype: u32, scale: f32) -> vec3<f32> {
    let eps: f32 = 0.002;
    return normalize(vec3<f32>(
        cb3_container_sdf(p + vec3<f32>(eps, 0.0, 0.0), ctype, scale) - cb3_container_sdf(p - vec3<f32>(eps, 0.0, 0.0), ctype, scale),
        cb3_container_sdf(p + vec3<f32>(0.0, eps, 0.0), ctype, scale) - cb3_container_sdf(p - vec3<f32>(0.0, eps, 0.0), ctype, scale),
        cb3_container_sdf(p + vec3<f32>(0.0, 0.0, eps), ctype, scale) - cb3_container_sdf(p - vec3<f32>(0.0, 0.0, eps), ctype, scale),
    ));
}

fn arb3_wang_hash(seed_in: u32) -> u32 {
    var seed = seed_in;
    seed = (seed ^ 61u) ^ (seed >> 16u);
    seed = seed * 9u;
    seed = seed ^ (seed >> 4u);
    seed = seed * 0x27d4eb2du;
    seed = seed ^ (seed >> 15u);
    return seed;
}

fn arb3_simplex_noise_2d(v: vec2<f32>) -> f32 {
    let F2: f32 = 0.36602540378;
    let G2: f32 = 0.21132486540;

    let s = (v.x + v.y) * F2;
    let i = floor(v + s);
    let t = (i.x + i.y) * G2;
    let x0 = v - (i - t);

    let i1 = select(vec2<f32>(0.0, 1.0), vec2<f32>(1.0, 0.0), x0.x > x0.y);
    let x1 = x0 - i1 + G2;
    let x2 = x0 - 1.0 + 2.0 * G2;

    let h0 = arb3_wang_hash(u32(i.x + 10000.0) * 73856093u ^ u32(i.y + 10000.0) * 19349663u);
    let h1 = arb3_wang_hash(u32(i.x + i1.x + 10000.0) * 73856093u ^ u32(i.y + i1.y + 10000.0) * 19349663u);
    let h2 = arb3_wang_hash(u32(i.x + 1.0 + 10000.0) * 73856093u ^ u32(i.y + 1.0 + 10000.0) * 19349663u);

    let g0 = vec2<f32>(ARB3_SIMPLEX_GRAD2_X[h0 & 7u], ARB3_SIMPLEX_GRAD2_Y[h0 & 7u]);
    let g1 = vec2<f32>(ARB3_SIMPLEX_GRAD2_X[h1 & 7u], ARB3_SIMPLEX_GRAD2_Y[h1 & 7u]);
    let g2 = vec2<f32>(ARB3_SIMPLEX_GRAD2_X[h2 & 7u], ARB3_SIMPLEX_GRAD2_Y[h2 & 7u]);

    let t0 = 0.5 - dot(x0, x0);
    let t1 = 0.5 - dot(x1, x1);
    let t2 = 0.5 - dot(x2, x2);

    let n0 = select(t0 * t0 * t0 * t0 * dot(g0, x0), 0.0, t0 < 0.0);
    let n1 = select(t1 * t1 * t1 * t1 * dot(g1, x1), 0.0, t1 < 0.0);
    let n2 = select(t2 * t2 * t2 * t2 * dot(g2, x2), 0.0, t2 < 0.0);

    return clamp((n0 + n1 + n2) * 35.0 + 0.5, 0.0, 1.0);
}

fn n0_body(
    idx: u32,
    count: u32,
    e_particles: Element,
    tex_field: texture_3d<f32>,
    samp: sampler,
    active_count: i32,
) -> Element2 {
    let sample = textureSampleLevel(tex_field, samp, e_particles.position, 0.0).xyz;
    return Element2(sample.x, sample.y, sample.z);
}

fn n1_body(
    idx: u32,
    count: u32,
    e_in: Element2,
    e_particles: Element,
    tex_density: texture_3d<f32>,
    samp: sampler,
    turbulence: f32,
    anti_clump: f32,
    turb_scale: f32,
    active_count: i32,
    time2: f32,
) -> Element2 {
    if e_particles.life <= 0.0 {
        return e_in;
    }

    let pos = e_particles.position;
    let local_density = textureSampleLevel(tex_density, samp, pos, 0.0).r;
    let capped_density = local_density / (1.0 + local_density);
    let adaptive_amp = turbulence * (1.0 + capped_density * anti_clump);

    let noise_time = time2 * 0.1;
    // turb_scale = noise lattice cells across the unit volume. At the legacy
    // constant 2.0 the pattern is screen-scale architecture (one cell reads
    // as a quadrant of the sim — BUG-066); higher values read as texture.
    let noise_pos = pos * turb_scale;
    let nx = (snf3_simplex_noise_2d(noise_pos.yz + vec2<f32>(noise_time)) - 0.5) * 2.0;
    let ny = (snf3_simplex_noise_2d(noise_pos.xz + vec2<f32>(noise_time + 100.0)) - 0.5) * 2.0;
    let nz = (snf3_simplex_noise_2d(noise_pos.xy + vec2<f32>(noise_time + 200.0)) - 0.5) * 2.0;
    let noise_force = vec3<f32>(nx, ny, nz) * adaptive_amp;

    var f = e_in;
    f.x = f.x + noise_force.x;
    f.y = f.y + noise_force.y;
    f.z = f.z + noise_force.z;
    return f;
}

fn n2_body(
    idx: u32,
    count: u32,
    e_in: Element2,
    e_particles: Element,
    tex_density: texture_3d<f32>,
    samp: sampler,
    diffusion: f32,
    active_count: i32,
    frame_count: u32,
) -> Element2 {
    if diffusion <= 0.0 {
        return e_in;
    }
    if e_particles.life <= 0.0 {
        return e_in;
    }

    let local_density = textureSampleLevel(tex_density, samp, e_particles.position, 0.0).r;
    let capped_density = local_density / (1.0 + local_density);

    let diff_seed = idx * 1664525u + frame_count * 747796405u;
    let kick = (dfp_hash_float3(diff_seed) - 0.5) * diffusion * capped_density;

    var f = e_in;
    f.x = f.x + kick.x;
    f.y = f.y + kick.y;
    f.z = f.z + kick.z;
    return f;
}

fn n3_body(
    idx: u32,
    count: u32,
    e_in: Element2,
    e_particles: Element,
    container: u32,
    ctr_scale: f32,
    active_count: i32,
) -> Element2 {
    if container == 0u {
        return e_in;
    }
    if e_particles.life <= 0.0 {
        return e_in;
    }

    let pos = e_particles.position;
    let d = crf_container_sdf(pos, container, ctr_scale);
    let margin: f32 = 0.1;
    var f = e_in;
    if d > -margin {
        let n = crf_container_gradient(pos, container, ctr_scale);
        let t = clamp((d + margin) / margin, 0.0, 1.0);
        let push = n * (t * t * 0.15);
        f.x = f.x - push.x;
        f.y = f.y - push.y;
        f.z = f.z - push.z;
    }
    return f;
}

fn n4_body(
    idx: u32,
    count: u32,
    e_in: Element,
    e_forces: Element2,
    active_count: i32,
    speed: f32,
    dt_scaled: f32,
) -> Element {
    var p = e_in;
    if p.life <= 0.0 {
        return p;
    }
    let force = vec3<f32>(e_forces.x, e_forces.y, e_forces.z);
    p.position = p.position + force * speed * dt_scaled;
    return p;
}

fn n5_body(
    idx: u32,
    count: u32,
    e_in: Element,
    container: u32,
    ctr_scale: f32,
    active_count: i32,
) -> Element {
    var p = e_in;
    if p.life <= 0.0 {
        return p;
    }

    var new_pos = p.position;
    if container == 0u {
        // No container: toroidal wrap on all 3 axes.
        new_pos = fract(new_pos + 1.0);
    } else {
        let d = cb3_container_sdf(new_pos, container, ctr_scale);
        if d > 0.0 {
            let normal = cb3_container_gradient(new_pos, container, ctr_scale);
            new_pos -= normal * (d + 0.001);
        }
        new_pos = clamp(new_pos, vec3<f32>(0.001), vec3<f32>(0.999));
    }

    p.position = new_pos;
    return p;
}

fn n6_body(
    idx: u32,
    count: u32,
    e_in: Element,
    flatten: f32,
    active_count: i32,
    cam_fwd_x: f32,
    cam_fwd_y: f32,
    cam_fwd_z: f32,
) -> Element {
    var p = e_in;
    if flatten <= 0.0 {
        return p;
    }
    if p.life <= 0.0 {
        return p;
    }

    let cam_fwd = vec3<f32>(cam_fwd_x, cam_fwd_y, cam_fwd_z);
    let depth_from_center = dot(p.position - 0.5, cam_fwd);
    p.position = p.position - cam_fwd * depth_from_center * flatten * 0.1;
    return p;
}

fn n7_body(
    idx: u32,
    count: u32,
    e_in: Element,
    inject_index: i32,
    inject_force: f32,
    inject_phase: f32,
    active_count: i32,
    time2: f32,
    dt_scaled: f32,
) -> Element {
    var p = e_in;
    if inject_index < 0 {
        return p;
    }
    if p.life <= 0.0 {
        return p;
    }

    let ipos = p.position;
    let idx_inject = u32(inject_index);
    let delta = ipos - ARB3_INJECT_POINTS_3D[idx_inject];
    let dist2 = dot(delta, delta);
    let force_r2 = ARB3_INJECT_FORCE_RADIUS_3D * ARB3_INJECT_FORCE_RADIUS_3D;

    // Force envelope: fast attack (~10% of burst), exponential decay.
    let attack = clamp(inject_phase * 10.0, 0.0, 1.0);
    let decay2 = exp(-inject_phase * 3.0);
    let envelope = attack * decay2;

    if dist2 < force_r2 && dist2 > 0.0001 && envelope > 0.001 {
        let dist = sqrt(dist2);
        let t2 = dist / ARB3_INJECT_FORCE_RADIUS_3D;
        let radial = delta / dist;

        // Spatial falloff: smooth quartic.
        let ff = (1.0 - t2 * t2);
        let falloff = ff * ff;

        // Noise perturbation: breaks spherical symmetry.
        let noise_angle1 = arb3_simplex_noise_2d(ipos.xy * 8.0 + vec2<f32>(time2 * 0.3)) * 6.28318;
        let noise_angle2 = arb3_simplex_noise_2d(ipos.yz * 8.0 + vec2<f32>(time2 * 0.3 + 50.0)) * 6.28318;
        let noise_dir = vec3<f32>(cos(noise_angle1), sin(noise_angle1) * cos(noise_angle2), sin(noise_angle2));
        let perturbed_radial = normalize(radial + noise_dir * 0.4 * t2);

        // Vortex ring via cross product.
        var tangent = normalize(cross(radial, vec3<f32>(0.0, 1.0, 0.0)));
        if length(cross(radial, vec3<f32>(0.0, 1.0, 0.0))) < 0.001 {
            tangent = normalize(cross(radial, vec3<f32>(1.0, 0.0, 0.0)));
        }
        let curl_profile = t2 * (1.0 - t2) * 4.0;
        let curl_force_v = tangent * curl_profile;

        let strength = inject_force * envelope * falloff * dt_scaled;
        let push = perturbed_radial * strength + curl_force_v * strength * 0.5;
        p.position = clamp(ipos + push, vec3<f32>(0.001), vec3<f32>(0.999));
    }

    return p;
}

@compute @workgroup_size(256)
fn cs_main(@builtin(global_invocation_id) gid: vec3<u32>) {
    let idx = gid.x;
    let count = arrayLength(&src_0);
    if idx >= count {
        return;
    }
    if idx >= u32(max(params.n0_active_count, 0)) {
        return;
    }
    let e_0 = src_0[idx];
    let r0 = n0_body(idx, count, e_0, src_1, samp, params.n0_active_count);
    let r1 = n1_body(idx, count, r0, e_0, src_2, samp, params.n1_turbulence, params.n1_anti_clump, params.n1_turb_scale, params.n1_active_count, params.n1_time2);
    let r2 = n2_body(idx, count, r1, e_0, src_2, samp, params.n2_diffusion, params.n2_active_count, params.n2_frame_count);
    let r3 = n3_body(idx, count, r2, e_0, params.n3_container, params.n3_ctr_scale, params.n3_active_count);
    let r4 = n4_body(idx, count, e_0, r3, params.n4_active_count, params.n4_speed, params.n4_dt_scaled);
    let r5 = n5_body(idx, count, r4, params.n5_container, params.n5_ctr_scale, params.n5_active_count);
    let r6 = n6_body(idx, count, r5, params.n6_flatten, params.n6_active_count, params.n6_cam_fwd_x, params.n6_cam_fwd_y, params.n6_cam_fwd_z);
    let r7 = n7_body(idx, count, r6, params.n7_inject_index, params.n7_inject_force, params.n7_inject_phase, params.n7_active_count, params.n7_time2, params.n7_dt_scaled);
    src_0[idx] = r7;
}

=== generator:FluidSim3D node:95 ===
// @static_param: n0_rotation
// @static_param: n0_translate_x
// @static_param: n0_translate_y
// @static_param: n1_curve
// @input_access: src_0 gather
struct Params {
    n0_translate_x: f32,
    n0_translate_y: f32,
    n0_scale: f32,
    n0_rotation: f32,
    n1_intensity: f32,
    n1_contrast: f32,
    n1_curve: u32,
    _pad0: u32,
}

@group(0) @binding(0) var<uniform> params: Params;
@group(0) @binding(1) var src_0: texture_2d<f32>;
@group(0) @binding(2) var samp: sampler;
@group(0) @binding(3) var dst: texture_storage_2d<rgba16float, write>;

fn n0_body(tex_in: texture_2d<f32>, s_in: sampler, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, translate_x: f32, translate_y: f32, scale: f32, rotation: f32) -> vec4<f32> {
    let aspect_ratio = dims.x / dims.y;
    let rot = -(rotation * 3.14159265358979323846 / 180.0);

    var p = uv - vec2<f32>(0.5, 0.5);

    p.x = p.x * aspect_ratio;

    let cos_r = cos(rot);
    let sin_r = sin(rot);
    p = vec2<f32>(
        p.x * cos_r - p.y * sin_r,
        p.x * sin_r + p.y * cos_r,
    );

    p.x = p.x / aspect_ratio;

    p = p / max(scale, 0.01);
    p = p - vec2<f32>(translate_x, translate_y);
    p = p + vec2<f32>(0.5, 0.5);

    if (p.x < 0.0 || p.x > 1.0 || p.y < 0.0 || p.y > 1.0) {
        return vec4<f32>(0.0, 0.0, 0.0, 0.0);
    }

    return textureSampleLevel(tex_in, s_in, p, 0.0);
}

fn n1_body(c: vec4<f32>, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, intensity: f32, contrast: f32, curve: u32) -> vec4<f32> {
    let x = c.rgb * intensity * contrast;
    var mapped: vec3<f32>;
    if curve == 2u {
        mapped = log2(vec3<f32>(1.0) + x) / log2(65.0);
    } else if curve == 1u {
        mapped = x / (x + vec3<f32>(1.0));
    } else {
        mapped = x * (1.0 + x / vec3<f32>(9.0)) / (1.0 + x);
    }
    return vec4<f32>(mapped, c.a);
}

@compute @workgroup_size(16, 16)
fn cs_main(@builtin(global_invocation_id) id: vec3<u32>) {
    let dims = textureDimensions(dst);
    if id.x >= dims.x || id.y >= dims.y {
        return;
    }
    let coord = vec2<i32>(i32(id.x), i32(id.y));
    let uv = (vec2<f32>(id.xy) + 0.5) / vec2<f32>(dims);
    let r0 = n0_body(src_0, samp, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n0_translate_x, params.n0_translate_y, params.n0_scale, params.n0_rotation);
    let r1 = n1_body(r0, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n1_intensity, params.n1_contrast, params.n1_curve);
    textureStore(dst, coord, r1);
}

=== generator:Lightning node:62 ===
// @static_param: n0_offset
// @static_param: n1_amount
// @static_param: n1_mode
// @static_param: n2_amount
// @static_param: n2_mode
// @input_access: src_0 coincident
// @input_access: src_1 coincident
// @input_access: src_2 coincident
struct Params {
    n0_scale: f32,
    n0_offset: f32,
    n1_amount: f32,
    n1_mode: u32,
    n2_amount: f32,
    n2_mode: u32,
    _pad0: u32,
    _pad1: u32,
}

@group(0) @binding(0) var<uniform> params: Params;
@group(0) @binding(1) var src_0: texture_2d<f32>;
@group(0) @binding(2) var src_1: texture_2d<f32>;
@group(0) @binding(3) var src_2: texture_2d<f32>;
@group(0) @binding(4) var dst: texture_storage_2d<rgba16float, write>;

fn q16(v: vec4<f32>) -> vec4<f32> {
    return vec4<f32>(unpack2x16float(pack2x16float(v.xy)), unpack2x16float(pack2x16float(v.zw)));
}

fn overlay_channel(a: f32, b: f32) -> f32 {
    if a < 0.5 {
        return 2.0 * a * b;
    }
    return 1.0 - 2.0 * (1.0 - a) * (1.0 - b);
}

fn safe_div(a: f32, b: f32) -> f32 {
    if abs(b) < 1.0e-6 {
        return 0.0;
    }
    return a / b;
}

fn blend_rgb(a: vec3<f32>, b: vec3<f32>, mode: u32) -> vec3<f32> {
    switch mode {
        case 0u: { return b; }
        case 1u: { return 1.0 - (1.0 - a) * (1.0 - b); }
        case 2u: { return a + b; }
        case 3u: { return max(a, b); }
        case 4u: { return a * b; }
        case 5u: { return abs(a - b); }
        case 6u: {
            return vec3<f32>(
                overlay_channel(a.x, b.x),
                overlay_channel(a.y, b.y),
                overlay_channel(a.z, b.z),
            );
        }
        case 7u: {
            return vec3<f32>(safe_div(a.x, b.x), safe_div(a.y, b.y), safe_div(a.z, b.z));
        }
        default: { return b; }
    }
}

fn n0_body(c: vec4<f32>, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, scale: f32, offset: f32) -> vec4<f32> {
    return vec4<f32>(
        c.r * scale + offset,
        c.g * scale + offset,
        c.b * scale + offset,
        c.a,
    );
}

fn n1_body(a: vec4<f32>, b: vec4<f32>, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, amount: f32, mode: u32) -> vec4<f32> {
    let blended = blend_rgb(a.rgb, b.rgb, mode);
    let out_rgb = mix(a.rgb, blended, amount);
    // Branchless on purpose: an `if` here compiles differently in fused vs
    // standalone kernel contexts (FMA regrouping) and broke the fp32
    // bit-exact proof (precision contract §7.1's "match the exact arithmetic
    // form" gotcha). mix(x, y, 0.0) = x + (y-x)*0.0 = x exactly, so t_a = 0
    // IS alpha pass-through, in the original instruction shape.
    let t_a = select(0.0, amount, mode == 0u);
    let out_a = mix(a.a, b.a, t_a);
    return vec4<f32>(out_rgb, out_a);
}

fn n2_body(a: vec4<f32>, b: vec4<f32>, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, amount: f32, mode: u32) -> vec4<f32> {
    let blended = blend_rgb(a.rgb, b.rgb, mode);
    let out_rgb = mix(a.rgb, blended, amount);
    // Branchless on purpose: an `if` here compiles differently in fused vs
    // standalone kernel contexts (FMA regrouping) and broke the fp32
    // bit-exact proof (precision contract §7.1's "match the exact arithmetic
    // form" gotcha). mix(x, y, 0.0) = x + (y-x)*0.0 = x exactly, so t_a = 0
    // IS alpha pass-through, in the original instruction shape.
    let t_a = select(0.0, amount, mode == 0u);
    let out_a = mix(a.a, b.a, t_a);
    return vec4<f32>(out_rgb, out_a);
}

@compute @workgroup_size(16, 16)
fn cs_main(@builtin(global_invocation_id) id: vec3<u32>) {
    let dims = textureDimensions(dst);
    if id.x >= dims.x || id.y >= dims.y {
        return;
    }
    let coord = vec2<i32>(i32(id.x), i32(id.y));
    let uv = (vec2<f32>(id.xy) + 0.5) / vec2<f32>(dims);
    let ext_0 = textureLoad(src_0, coord, 0);
    let ext_1 = textureLoad(src_1, coord, 0);
    let ext_2 = textureLoad(src_2, coord, 0);
    let r0 = q16(n0_body(ext_0, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n0_scale, params.n0_offset));
    let r1 = n1_body(ext_1, ext_2, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n1_amount, params.n1_mode);
    let r2 = q16(n2_body(r1, r0, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n2_amount, params.n2_mode));
    textureStore(dst, coord, r2);
}

=== generator:Lightning node:63 ===
// @static_param: n0_address_mode
// @static_param: n0_axis
// @static_param: n0_kernel_size
// @static_param: n0_radius
// @static_param: n0_radius_mode
// @static_param: n0_step
// @static_param: n1_amount
// @static_param: n1_mode
// @static_param: n2_mode
// @static_param: n3_contrast
// @static_param: n3_curve
// @static_param: n3_intensity
// @static_param: n4_alpha
// @input_access: src_0 gather
// @input_access: src_1 coincident
struct Params {
    n0_kernel_size: u32,
    n0_axis: u32,
    n0_step: f32,
    n0_radius_mode: u32,
    n0_radius: f32,
    n0_address_mode: u32,
    n1_amount: f32,
    n1_mode: u32,
    n2_amount: f32,
    n2_mode: u32,
    n3_intensity: f32,
    n3_contrast: f32,
    n3_curve: u32,
    n4_alpha: f32,
    _pad0: u32,
    _pad1: u32,
}

@group(0) @binding(0) var<uniform> params: Params;
@group(0) @binding(1) var src_0: texture_2d<f32>;
@group(0) @binding(2) var src_1: texture_2d<f32>;
@group(0) @binding(3) var samp: sampler;
@group(0) @binding(4) var dst: texture_storage_2d<rgba16float, write>;

const SG_K9_0: f32 = 0.16501;
const SG_K9_1: f32 = 0.15019;
const SG_K9_2: f32 = 0.11325;
const SG_K9_3: f32 = 0.07076;
const SG_K9_4: f32 = 0.03664;
const SG_K17_0: f32 = 0.10315;
const SG_K17_1: f32 = 0.09998;
const SG_K17_2: f32 = 0.09103;
const SG_K17_3: f32 = 0.07786;
const SG_K17_4: f32 = 0.06257;
const SG_K17_5: f32 = 0.04723;
const SG_K17_6: f32 = 0.03350;
const SG_K17_7: f32 = 0.02232;
const SG_K17_8: f32 = 0.01396;
const SG_K25_0:  f32 = 0.07087;
const SG_K25_1:  f32 = 0.06947;
const SG_K25_2:  f32 = 0.06540;
const SG_K25_3:  f32 = 0.05917;
const SG_K25_4:  f32 = 0.05148;
const SG_K25_5:  f32 = 0.04307;
const SG_K25_6:  f32 = 0.03465;
const SG_K25_7:  f32 = 0.02680;
const SG_K25_8:  f32 = 0.01995;
const SG_K25_9:  f32 = 0.01428;
const SG_K25_10: f32 = 0.00983;
const SG_K25_11: f32 = 0.00651;
const SG_K25_12: f32 = 0.00415;

fn overlay_channel(a: f32, b: f32) -> f32 {
    if a < 0.5 {
        return 2.0 * a * b;
    }
    return 1.0 - 2.0 * (1.0 - a) * (1.0 - b);
}

fn safe_div(a: f32, b: f32) -> f32 {
    if abs(b) < 1.0e-6 {
        return 0.0;
    }
    return a / b;
}

fn blend_rgb(a: vec3<f32>, b: vec3<f32>, mode: u32) -> vec3<f32> {
    switch mode {
        case 0u: { return b; }
        case 1u: { return 1.0 - (1.0 - a) * (1.0 - b); }
        case 2u: { return a + b; }
        case 3u: { return max(a, b); }
        case 4u: { return a * b; }
        case 5u: { return abs(a - b); }
        case 6u: {
            return vec3<f32>(
                overlay_channel(a.x, b.x),
                overlay_channel(a.y, b.y),
                overlay_channel(a.z, b.z),
            );
        }
        case 7u: {
            return vec3<f32>(safe_div(a.x, b.x), safe_div(a.y, b.y), safe_div(a.z, b.z));
        }
        default: { return b; }
    }
}

fn n0_fetch_in(c: vec2<f32>) -> vec4<f32> {
    return textureSampleLevel(src_0, samp, c, 0.0);
}

fn n0_sg_blur_9(uv: vec2<f32>, d: vec2<f32>) -> vec4<f32> {
    var acc = n0_fetch_in(uv) * SG_K9_0;
    acc += (n0_fetch_in(uv + d      ) + n0_fetch_in(uv - d      )) * SG_K9_1;
    acc += (n0_fetch_in(uv + d * 2.0) + n0_fetch_in(uv - d * 2.0)) * SG_K9_2;
    acc += (n0_fetch_in(uv + d * 3.0) + n0_fetch_in(uv - d * 3.0)) * SG_K9_3;
    acc += (n0_fetch_in(uv + d * 4.0) + n0_fetch_in(uv - d * 4.0)) * SG_K9_4;
    return acc;
}

fn n0_sg_blur_17(uv: vec2<f32>, d: vec2<f32>) -> vec4<f32> {
    var acc = n0_fetch_in(uv) * SG_K17_0;
    acc += (n0_fetch_in(uv + d      ) + n0_fetch_in(uv - d      )) * SG_K17_1;
    acc += (n0_fetch_in(uv + d * 2.0) + n0_fetch_in(uv - d * 2.0)) * SG_K17_2;
    acc += (n0_fetch_in(uv + d * 3.0) + n0_fetch_in(uv - d * 3.0)) * SG_K17_3;
    acc += (n0_fetch_in(uv + d * 4.0) + n0_fetch_in(uv - d * 4.0)) * SG_K17_4;
    acc += (n0_fetch_in(uv + d * 5.0) + n0_fetch_in(uv - d * 5.0)) * SG_K17_5;
    acc += (n0_fetch_in(uv + d * 6.0) + n0_fetch_in(uv - d * 6.0)) * SG_K17_6;
    acc += (n0_fetch_in(uv + d * 7.0) + n0_fetch_in(uv - d * 7.0)) * SG_K17_7;
    acc += (n0_fetch_in(uv + d * 8.0) + n0_fetch_in(uv - d * 8.0)) * SG_K17_8;
    return acc;
}

fn n0_sg_blur_25(uv: vec2<f32>, d: vec2<f32>) -> vec4<f32> {
    var acc = n0_fetch_in(uv) * SG_K25_0;
    acc += (n0_fetch_in(uv + d       ) + n0_fetch_in(uv - d       )) * SG_K25_1;
    acc += (n0_fetch_in(uv + d *  2.0) + n0_fetch_in(uv - d *  2.0)) * SG_K25_2;
    acc += (n0_fetch_in(uv + d *  3.0) + n0_fetch_in(uv - d *  3.0)) * SG_K25_3;
    acc += (n0_fetch_in(uv + d *  4.0) + n0_fetch_in(uv - d *  4.0)) * SG_K25_4;
    acc += (n0_fetch_in(uv + d *  5.0) + n0_fetch_in(uv - d *  5.0)) * SG_K25_5;
    acc += (n0_fetch_in(uv + d *  6.0) + n0_fetch_in(uv - d *  6.0)) * SG_K25_6;
    acc += (n0_fetch_in(uv + d *  7.0) + n0_fetch_in(uv - d *  7.0)) * SG_K25_7;
    acc += (n0_fetch_in(uv + d *  8.0) + n0_fetch_in(uv - d *  8.0)) * SG_K25_8;
    acc += (n0_fetch_in(uv + d *  9.0) + n0_fetch_in(uv - d *  9.0)) * SG_K25_9;
    acc += (n0_fetch_in(uv + d * 10.0) + n0_fetch_in(uv - d * 10.0)) * SG_K25_10;
    acc += (n0_fetch_in(uv + d * 11.0) + n0_fetch_in(uv - d * 11.0)) * SG_K25_11;
    acc += (n0_fetch_in(uv + d * 12.0) + n0_fetch_in(uv - d * 12.0)) * SG_K25_12;
    return acc;
}

// Dynamic-radius separable Gaussian — bit-exact port of the legacy fluid-sim
// blur. Bilinear tap-pair optimisation: adjacent samples (j, j+1) collapse to one
// bilinear fetch at their weighted midpoint.

fn n0_sg_blur_dynamic(uv: vec2<f32>, axis_dir: vec2<f32>, radius: f32) -> vec4<f32> {
    let sigma = max(radius / 3.0, 1.0);
    let inv_two_sigma_sq = 1.0 / (2.0 * sigma * sigma);

    var result = n0_fetch_in(uv);
    var total_weight = 1.0;

    let radius_int = i32(radius);
    var j: i32 = 1;
    loop {
        if j > radius_int { break; }

        let fj = f32(j);
        let w_a = exp(-(fj * fj) * inv_two_sigma_sq);

        if j + 1 <= radius_int {
            let fj1 = f32(j + 1);
            let w_b = exp(-(fj1 * fj1) * inv_two_sigma_sq);
            let w_ab = w_a + w_b;
            let offset = fj + w_b / w_ab;

            result += n0_fetch_in(uv + axis_dir * offset) * w_ab;
            result += n0_fetch_in(uv - axis_dir * offset) * w_ab;
            total_weight += w_ab * 2.0;
        } else {
            result += n0_fetch_in(uv + axis_dir * fj) * w_a;
            result += n0_fetch_in(uv - axis_dir * fj) * w_a;
            total_weight += w_a * 2.0;
        }

        j += 2;
    }

    return result / total_weight;
}

// Linear-radius separable Gaussian — exact port of node.blur's per-axis pass
// (blur.wgsl mode 0): sigma = max(radius/2, 0.5), one tap per integer offset
// -r..r (no tap-pair trick), normalized by the running weight sum, radius
// clamped to 32. radius <= 0 collapses to a single center sample. Taps land on
// texel centers, so fusing through this mode is filter-exact by construction.

fn n0_sg_blur_linear(uv: vec2<f32>, axis_dir: vec2<f32>, radius: f32) -> vec4<f32> {
    // Single-exit on purpose: an early return here leaves unreachable blocks
    // that abort spirv-opt's merge-return pass, and the whole fused kernel
    // then ships UNOPTIMIZED (no inlining/DCE — measured slow enough to flip
    // the perf gate). Same arithmetic, same order, just one return.
    let r_int = min(i32(radius), 32);
    var result: vec4<f32>;
    if r_int <= 0 {
        result = n0_fetch_in(uv);
    } else {
        let sigma = max(radius * 0.5, 0.5);
        let two_sigma_sq = 2.0 * sigma * sigma;

        var sum = vec4<f32>(0.0);
        var weight_sum = 0.0;
        for (var d: i32 = -r_int; d <= r_int; d = d + 1) {
            let s = n0_fetch_in(uv + axis_dir * f32(d));
            let dist_sq = f32(d * d);
            let w = exp(-dist_sq / two_sigma_sq);
            sum = sum + s * w;
            weight_sum = weight_sum + w;
        }
        result = sum / max(weight_sum, 1e-6);
    }
    return result;
}

fn n0_body(uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, kernel_size: u32, axis: u32, step: f32, radius_mode: u32, radius: f32, address_mode: u32) -> vec4<f32> {
    let texel = vec2<f32>(1.0) / dims;

    var result: vec4<f32>;
    if radius_mode == 1u || radius_mode == 2u {
        var axis_dir: vec2<f32>;
        if axis == 0u {
            axis_dir = vec2<f32>(texel.x, 0.0);
        } else {
            axis_dir = vec2<f32>(0.0, texel.y);
        }
        if radius_mode == 2u {
            result = n0_sg_blur_linear(uv, axis_dir, radius);
        } else {
            result = n0_sg_blur_dynamic(uv, axis_dir, radius);
        }
    } else {
        var d: vec2<f32>;
        if axis == 0u {
            d = vec2<f32>(texel.x * step, 0.0);
        } else {
            d = vec2<f32>(0.0, texel.y * step);
        }
        if kernel_size == 0u {
            result = n0_sg_blur_9(uv, d);
        } else if kernel_size == 1u {
            result = n0_sg_blur_17(uv, d);
        } else {
            result = n0_sg_blur_25(uv, d);
        }
    }

    return result;
}

fn n1_body(a: vec4<f32>, b: vec4<f32>, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, amount: f32, mode: u32) -> vec4<f32> {
    let blended = blend_rgb(a.rgb, b.rgb, mode);
    let out_rgb = mix(a.rgb, blended, amount);
    // Branchless on purpose: an `if` here compiles differently in fused vs
    // standalone kernel contexts (FMA regrouping) and broke the fp32
    // bit-exact proof (precision contract §7.1's "match the exact arithmetic
    // form" gotcha). mix(x, y, 0.0) = x + (y-x)*0.0 = x exactly, so t_a = 0
    // IS alpha pass-through, in the original instruction shape.
    let t_a = select(0.0, amount, mode == 0u);
    let out_a = mix(a.a, b.a, t_a);
    return vec4<f32>(out_rgb, out_a);
}

fn n2_body(c: vec4<f32>, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, amount: f32, mode: u32) -> vec4<f32> {
    var col = c.rgb;
    if mode == 2u {
        col = col * mix(1.0, 3.0, amount);
    } else if mode == 1u {
        col = mix(col, vec3<f32>(1.0, 1.0, 1.0), amount);
    } else {
        col = col * (1.0 - amount);
    }
    return vec4<f32>(col, c.a);
}

fn n3_body(c: vec4<f32>, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, intensity: f32, contrast: f32, curve: u32) -> vec4<f32> {
    let x = c.rgb * intensity * contrast;
    var mapped: vec3<f32>;
    if curve == 2u {
        mapped = log2(vec3<f32>(1.0) + x) / log2(65.0);
    } else if curve == 1u {
        mapped = x / (x + vec3<f32>(1.0));
    } else {
        mapped = x * (1.0 + x / vec3<f32>(9.0)) / (1.0 + x);
    }
    return vec4<f32>(mapped, c.a);
}

fn n4_body(c: vec4<f32>, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, alpha: f32) -> vec4<f32> {
    return vec4<f32>(c.rgb, alpha);
}

@compute @workgroup_size(16, 16)
fn cs_main(@builtin(global_invocation_id) id: vec3<u32>) {
    let dims = textureDimensions(dst);
    if id.x >= dims.x || id.y >= dims.y {
        return;
    }
    let coord = vec2<i32>(i32(id.x), i32(id.y));
    let uv = (vec2<f32>(id.xy) + 0.5) / vec2<f32>(dims);
    let ext_1 = textureLoad(src_1, coord, 0);
    let r0 = n0_body(uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n0_kernel_size, params.n0_axis, params.n0_step, params.n0_radius_mode, params.n0_radius, params.n0_address_mode);
    let r1 = n1_body(ext_1, r0, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n1_amount, params.n1_mode);
    let r2 = n2_body(r1, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n2_amount, params.n2_mode);
    let r3 = n3_body(r2, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n3_intensity, params.n3_contrast, params.n3_curve);
    let r4 = n4_body(r3, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n4_alpha);
    textureStore(dst, coord, r4);
}

=== generator:MetallicGlass node:44 ===
// @static_param: n0_output_channel
// @static_param: n1_offset
// @static_param: n1_scale
// @static_param: n2_amount
// @static_param: n2_mode
// @static_param: n3_mode
// @input_access: src_0 coincident
struct Params {
    n0_scale_x: f32,
    n0_scale_y: f32,
    n0_offset_x: f32,
    n0_offset_y: f32,
    n0_z: f32,
    n0_output_channel: u32,
    n1_scale: f32,
    n1_offset: f32,
    n2_amount: f32,
    n2_mode: u32,
    n3_amount: f32,
    n3_mode: u32,
}

@group(0) @binding(0) var<uniform> params: Params;
@group(0) @binding(1) var src_0: texture_2d<f32>;
@group(0) @binding(2) var dst: texture_storage_2d<rgba16float, write>;

fn q16(v: vec4<f32>) -> vec4<f32> {
    return vec4<f32>(unpack2x16float(pack2x16float(v.xy)), unpack2x16float(pack2x16float(v.zw)));
}

fn wang_hash(seed_in: u32) -> u32 {
    var seed = seed_in;
    seed = (seed ^ 61u) ^ (seed >> 16u);
    seed = seed * 9u;
    seed = seed ^ (seed >> 4u);
    seed = seed * 0x27d4eb2du;
    seed = seed ^ (seed >> 15u);
    return seed;
}

fn perlin3_hash(ix: i32, iy: i32, iz: i32) -> u32 {
    let x = u32(ix + 10000) * 73856093u;
    let y = u32(iy + 10000) * 19349663u;
    let z = u32(iz + 10000) * 83492791u;
    return wang_hash(x ^ y ^ z);
}

fn perlin3_grad(h: u32) -> vec3<f32> {
    let sel = h & 15u;
    switch sel {
        case 0u:  { return vec3<f32>( 1.0,  1.0,  0.0); }
        case 1u:  { return vec3<f32>(-1.0,  1.0,  0.0); }
        case 2u:  { return vec3<f32>( 1.0, -1.0,  0.0); }
        case 3u:  { return vec3<f32>(-1.0, -1.0,  0.0); }
        case 4u:  { return vec3<f32>( 1.0,  0.0,  1.0); }
        case 5u:  { return vec3<f32>(-1.0,  0.0,  1.0); }
        case 6u:  { return vec3<f32>( 1.0,  0.0, -1.0); }
        case 7u:  { return vec3<f32>(-1.0,  0.0, -1.0); }
        case 8u:  { return vec3<f32>( 0.0,  1.0,  1.0); }
        case 9u:  { return vec3<f32>( 0.0, -1.0,  1.0); }
        case 10u: { return vec3<f32>( 0.0,  1.0, -1.0); }
        case 11u: { return vec3<f32>( 0.0, -1.0, -1.0); }
        case 12u: { return vec3<f32>( 1.0,  1.0,  0.0); }
        case 13u: { return vec3<f32>(-1.0,  1.0,  0.0); }
        case 14u: { return vec3<f32>( 0.0, -1.0,  1.0); }
        default:  { return vec3<f32>( 0.0, -1.0, -1.0); }
    }
}

fn perlin3_grad_dot(ix: i32, iy: i32, iz: i32, fx: f32, fy: f32, fz: f32) -> f32 {
    let h = perlin3_hash(ix, iy, iz);
    let g = perlin3_grad(h);
    return g.x * fx + g.y * fy + g.z * fz;
}

fn simplex_noise_3d(p: vec3<f32>) -> f32 {
    let i = floor(p);
    let f = p - i;
    let u = f * f * f * (f * (f * 6.0 - 15.0) + 10.0);

    let ix = i32(i.x);
    let iy = i32(i.y);
    let iz = i32(i.z);

    let n000 = perlin3_grad_dot(ix,     iy,     iz,     f.x,       f.y,       f.z);
    let n100 = perlin3_grad_dot(ix + 1, iy,     iz,     f.x - 1.0, f.y,       f.z);
    let n010 = perlin3_grad_dot(ix,     iy + 1, iz,     f.x,       f.y - 1.0, f.z);
    let n110 = perlin3_grad_dot(ix + 1, iy + 1, iz,     f.x - 1.0, f.y - 1.0, f.z);
    let n001 = perlin3_grad_dot(ix,     iy,     iz + 1, f.x,       f.y,       f.z - 1.0);
    let n101 = perlin3_grad_dot(ix + 1, iy,     iz + 1, f.x - 1.0, f.y,       f.z - 1.0);
    let n011 = perlin3_grad_dot(ix,     iy + 1, iz + 1, f.x,       f.y - 1.0, f.z - 1.0);
    let n111 = perlin3_grad_dot(ix + 1, iy + 1, iz + 1, f.x - 1.0, f.y - 1.0, f.z - 1.0);

    let nx00 = mix(n000, n100, u.x);
    let nx10 = mix(n010, n110, u.x);
    let nx01 = mix(n001, n101, u.x);
    let nx11 = mix(n011, n111, u.x);
    let nxy0 = mix(nx00, nx10, u.y);
    let nxy1 = mix(nx01, nx11, u.y);
    return mix(nxy0, nxy1, u.z);
}

fn overlay_channel(a: f32, b: f32) -> f32 {
    if a < 0.5 {
        return 2.0 * a * b;
    }
    return 1.0 - 2.0 * (1.0 - a) * (1.0 - b);
}

fn safe_div(a: f32, b: f32) -> f32 {
    if abs(b) < 1.0e-6 {
        return 0.0;
    }
    return a / b;
}

fn blend_rgb(a: vec3<f32>, b: vec3<f32>, mode: u32) -> vec3<f32> {
    switch mode {
        case 0u: { return b; }
        case 1u: { return 1.0 - (1.0 - a) * (1.0 - b); }
        case 2u: { return a + b; }
        case 3u: { return max(a, b); }
        case 4u: { return a * b; }
        case 5u: { return abs(a - b); }
        case 6u: {
            return vec3<f32>(
                overlay_channel(a.x, b.x),
                overlay_channel(a.y, b.y),
                overlay_channel(a.z, b.z),
            );
        }
        case 7u: {
            return vec3<f32>(safe_div(a.x, b.x), safe_div(a.y, b.y), safe_div(a.z, b.z));
        }
        default: { return b; }
    }
}

fn n0_body(uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, scale_x: f32, scale_y: f32, offset_x: f32, offset_y: f32, z: f32, output_channel: u32) -> vec4<f32> {
    let p = vec3<f32>(
        uv.x * scale_x + offset_x,
        uv.y * scale_y + offset_y,
        z,
    );
    let n = simplex_noise_3d(p);
    var out_col = vec4<f32>(0.0, 0.0, 0.0, 1.0);
    switch output_channel {
        case 0u: { out_col.r = n; }
        case 1u: { out_col.g = n; }
        case 2u: { out_col.b = n; }
        default: { out_col.a = n; }
    }
    return out_col;
}

fn n1_body(c: vec4<f32>, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, scale: f32, offset: f32) -> vec4<f32> {
    return vec4<f32>(
        c.r * scale + offset,
        c.g * scale + offset,
        c.b * scale + offset,
        c.a,
    );
}

fn n2_body(a: vec4<f32>, b: vec4<f32>, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, amount: f32, mode: u32) -> vec4<f32> {
    let blended = blend_rgb(a.rgb, b.rgb, mode);
    let out_rgb = mix(a.rgb, blended, amount);
    // Branchless on purpose: an `if` here compiles differently in fused vs
    // standalone kernel contexts (FMA regrouping) and broke the fp32
    // bit-exact proof (precision contract §7.1's "match the exact arithmetic
    // form" gotcha). mix(x, y, 0.0) = x + (y-x)*0.0 = x exactly, so t_a = 0
    // IS alpha pass-through, in the original instruction shape.
    let t_a = select(0.0, amount, mode == 0u);
    let out_a = mix(a.a, b.a, t_a);
    return vec4<f32>(out_rgb, out_a);
}

fn n3_body(a: vec4<f32>, b: vec4<f32>, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, amount: f32, mode: u32) -> vec4<f32> {
    let blended = blend_rgb(a.rgb, b.rgb, mode);
    let out_rgb = mix(a.rgb, blended, amount);
    // Branchless on purpose: an `if` here compiles differently in fused vs
    // standalone kernel contexts (FMA regrouping) and broke the fp32
    // bit-exact proof (precision contract §7.1's "match the exact arithmetic
    // form" gotcha). mix(x, y, 0.0) = x + (y-x)*0.0 = x exactly, so t_a = 0
    // IS alpha pass-through, in the original instruction shape.
    let t_a = select(0.0, amount, mode == 0u);
    let out_a = mix(a.a, b.a, t_a);
    return vec4<f32>(out_rgb, out_a);
}

@compute @workgroup_size(16, 16)
fn cs_main(@builtin(global_invocation_id) id: vec3<u32>) {
    let dims = textureDimensions(dst);
    if id.x >= dims.x || id.y >= dims.y {
        return;
    }
    let coord = vec2<i32>(i32(id.x), i32(id.y));
    let uv = (vec2<f32>(id.xy) + 0.5) / vec2<f32>(dims);
    let ext_0 = textureLoad(src_0, coord, 0);
    let r0 = n0_body(uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n0_scale_x, params.n0_scale_y, params.n0_offset_x, params.n0_offset_y, params.n0_z, params.n0_output_channel);
    let r1 = n1_body(r0, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n1_scale, params.n1_offset);
    let r2 = q16(n2_body(r1, ext_0, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n2_amount, params.n2_mode));
    let r3 = q16(n3_body(ext_0, r2, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n3_amount, params.n3_mode));
    textureStore(dst, coord, r3);
}

=== generator:MetallicGlass node:45 ===
// @static_param: n0_address_mode
// @static_param: n0_axis
// @static_param: n0_kernel_size
// @static_param: n0_radius
// @static_param: n0_radius_mode
// @static_param: n0_step
// @static_param: n1_weights_x
// @static_param: n1_weights_y
// @static_param: n1_weights_z
// @static_param: n2_gamma
// @static_param: n2_hi
// @static_param: n2_lo
// @static_param: n2_offset
// @static_param: n2_scale
// @input_access: src_0 gather
struct Params {
    n0_kernel_size: u32,
    n0_axis: u32,
    n0_step: f32,
    n0_radius_mode: u32,
    n0_radius: f32,
    n0_address_mode: u32,
    n1_weights_x: f32,
    n1_weights_y: f32,
    n1_weights_z: f32,
    n2_scale: f32,
    n2_offset: f32,
    n2_lo: f32,
    n2_hi: f32,
    n2_gamma: f32,
    _pad0: u32,
    _pad1: u32,
}

@group(0) @binding(0) var<uniform> params: Params;
@group(0) @binding(1) var src_0: texture_2d<f32>;
@group(0) @binding(2) var samp: sampler;
@group(0) @binding(3) var dst_0: texture_storage_2d<rgba16float, write>;
@group(0) @binding(4) var dst_1: texture_storage_2d<rgba16float, write>;

const SG_K9_0: f32 = 0.16501;
const SG_K9_1: f32 = 0.15019;
const SG_K9_2: f32 = 0.11325;
const SG_K9_3: f32 = 0.07076;
const SG_K9_4: f32 = 0.03664;
const SG_K17_0: f32 = 0.10315;
const SG_K17_1: f32 = 0.09998;
const SG_K17_2: f32 = 0.09103;
const SG_K17_3: f32 = 0.07786;
const SG_K17_4: f32 = 0.06257;
const SG_K17_5: f32 = 0.04723;
const SG_K17_6: f32 = 0.03350;
const SG_K17_7: f32 = 0.02232;
const SG_K17_8: f32 = 0.01396;
const SG_K25_0:  f32 = 0.07087;
const SG_K25_1:  f32 = 0.06947;
const SG_K25_2:  f32 = 0.06540;
const SG_K25_3:  f32 = 0.05917;
const SG_K25_4:  f32 = 0.05148;
const SG_K25_5:  f32 = 0.04307;
const SG_K25_6:  f32 = 0.03465;
const SG_K25_7:  f32 = 0.02680;
const SG_K25_8:  f32 = 0.01995;
const SG_K25_9:  f32 = 0.01428;
const SG_K25_10: f32 = 0.00983;
const SG_K25_11: f32 = 0.00651;
const SG_K25_12: f32 = 0.00415;

fn q16(v: vec4<f32>) -> vec4<f32> {
    return vec4<f32>(unpack2x16float(pack2x16float(v.xy)), unpack2x16float(pack2x16float(v.zw)));
}

fn n0_fetch_in(c: vec2<f32>) -> vec4<f32> {
    return textureSampleLevel(src_0, samp, c, 0.0);
}

fn n0_sg_blur_9(uv: vec2<f32>, d: vec2<f32>) -> vec4<f32> {
    var acc = n0_fetch_in(uv) * SG_K9_0;
    acc += (n0_fetch_in(uv + d      ) + n0_fetch_in(uv - d      )) * SG_K9_1;
    acc += (n0_fetch_in(uv + d * 2.0) + n0_fetch_in(uv - d * 2.0)) * SG_K9_2;
    acc += (n0_fetch_in(uv + d * 3.0) + n0_fetch_in(uv - d * 3.0)) * SG_K9_3;
    acc += (n0_fetch_in(uv + d * 4.0) + n0_fetch_in(uv - d * 4.0)) * SG_K9_4;
    return acc;
}

fn n0_sg_blur_17(uv: vec2<f32>, d: vec2<f32>) -> vec4<f32> {
    var acc = n0_fetch_in(uv) * SG_K17_0;
    acc += (n0_fetch_in(uv + d      ) + n0_fetch_in(uv - d      )) * SG_K17_1;
    acc += (n0_fetch_in(uv + d * 2.0) + n0_fetch_in(uv - d * 2.0)) * SG_K17_2;
    acc += (n0_fetch_in(uv + d * 3.0) + n0_fetch_in(uv - d * 3.0)) * SG_K17_3;
    acc += (n0_fetch_in(uv + d * 4.0) + n0_fetch_in(uv - d * 4.0)) * SG_K17_4;
    acc += (n0_fetch_in(uv + d * 5.0) + n0_fetch_in(uv - d * 5.0)) * SG_K17_5;
    acc += (n0_fetch_in(uv + d * 6.0) + n0_fetch_in(uv - d * 6.0)) * SG_K17_6;
    acc += (n0_fetch_in(uv + d * 7.0) + n0_fetch_in(uv - d * 7.0)) * SG_K17_7;
    acc += (n0_fetch_in(uv + d * 8.0) + n0_fetch_in(uv - d * 8.0)) * SG_K17_8;
    return acc;
}

fn n0_sg_blur_25(uv: vec2<f32>, d: vec2<f32>) -> vec4<f32> {
    var acc = n0_fetch_in(uv) * SG_K25_0;
    acc += (n0_fetch_in(uv + d       ) + n0_fetch_in(uv - d       )) * SG_K25_1;
    acc += (n0_fetch_in(uv + d *  2.0) + n0_fetch_in(uv - d *  2.0)) * SG_K25_2;
    acc += (n0_fetch_in(uv + d *  3.0) + n0_fetch_in(uv - d *  3.0)) * SG_K25_3;
    acc += (n0_fetch_in(uv + d *  4.0) + n0_fetch_in(uv - d *  4.0)) * SG_K25_4;
    acc += (n0_fetch_in(uv + d *  5.0) + n0_fetch_in(uv - d *  5.0)) * SG_K25_5;
    acc += (n0_fetch_in(uv + d *  6.0) + n0_fetch_in(uv - d *  6.0)) * SG_K25_6;
    acc += (n0_fetch_in(uv + d *  7.0) + n0_fetch_in(uv - d *  7.0)) * SG_K25_7;
    acc += (n0_fetch_in(uv + d *  8.0) + n0_fetch_in(uv - d *  8.0)) * SG_K25_8;
    acc += (n0_fetch_in(uv + d *  9.0) + n0_fetch_in(uv - d *  9.0)) * SG_K25_9;
    acc += (n0_fetch_in(uv + d * 10.0) + n0_fetch_in(uv - d * 10.0)) * SG_K25_10;
    acc += (n0_fetch_in(uv + d * 11.0) + n0_fetch_in(uv - d * 11.0)) * SG_K25_11;
    acc += (n0_fetch_in(uv + d * 12.0) + n0_fetch_in(uv - d * 12.0)) * SG_K25_12;
    return acc;
}

// Dynamic-radius separable Gaussian — bit-exact port of the legacy fluid-sim
// blur. Bilinear tap-pair optimisation: adjacent samples (j, j+1) collapse to one
// bilinear fetch at their weighted midpoint.

fn n0_sg_blur_dynamic(uv: vec2<f32>, axis_dir: vec2<f32>, radius: f32) -> vec4<f32> {
    let sigma = max(radius / 3.0, 1.0);
    let inv_two_sigma_sq = 1.0 / (2.0 * sigma * sigma);

    var result = n0_fetch_in(uv);
    var total_weight = 1.0;

    let radius_int = i32(radius);
    var j: i32 = 1;
    loop {
        if j > radius_int { break; }

        let fj = f32(j);
        let w_a = exp(-(fj * fj) * inv_two_sigma_sq);

        if j + 1 <= radius_int {
            let fj1 = f32(j + 1);
            let w_b = exp(-(fj1 * fj1) * inv_two_sigma_sq);
            let w_ab = w_a + w_b;
            let offset = fj + w_b / w_ab;

            result += n0_fetch_in(uv + axis_dir * offset) * w_ab;
            result += n0_fetch_in(uv - axis_dir * offset) * w_ab;
            total_weight += w_ab * 2.0;
        } else {
            result += n0_fetch_in(uv + axis_dir * fj) * w_a;
            result += n0_fetch_in(uv - axis_dir * fj) * w_a;
            total_weight += w_a * 2.0;
        }

        j += 2;
    }

    return result / total_weight;
}

// Linear-radius separable Gaussian — exact port of node.blur's per-axis pass
// (blur.wgsl mode 0): sigma = max(radius/2, 0.5), one tap per integer offset
// -r..r (no tap-pair trick), normalized by the running weight sum, radius
// clamped to 32. radius <= 0 collapses to a single center sample. Taps land on
// texel centers, so fusing through this mode is filter-exact by construction.

fn n0_sg_blur_linear(uv: vec2<f32>, axis_dir: vec2<f32>, radius: f32) -> vec4<f32> {
    // Single-exit on purpose: an early return here leaves unreachable blocks
    // that abort spirv-opt's merge-return pass, and the whole fused kernel
    // then ships UNOPTIMIZED (no inlining/DCE — measured slow enough to flip
    // the perf gate). Same arithmetic, same order, just one return.
    let r_int = min(i32(radius), 32);
    var result: vec4<f32>;
    if r_int <= 0 {
        result = n0_fetch_in(uv);
    } else {
        let sigma = max(radius * 0.5, 0.5);
        let two_sigma_sq = 2.0 * sigma * sigma;

        var sum = vec4<f32>(0.0);
        var weight_sum = 0.0;
        for (var d: i32 = -r_int; d <= r_int; d = d + 1) {
            let s = n0_fetch_in(uv + axis_dir * f32(d));
            let dist_sq = f32(d * d);
            let w = exp(-dist_sq / two_sigma_sq);
            sum = sum + s * w;
            weight_sum = weight_sum + w;
        }
        result = sum / max(weight_sum, 1e-6);
    }
    return result;
}

fn n0_body(uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, kernel_size: u32, axis: u32, step: f32, radius_mode: u32, radius: f32, address_mode: u32) -> vec4<f32> {
    let texel = vec2<f32>(1.0) / dims;

    var result: vec4<f32>;
    if radius_mode == 1u || radius_mode == 2u {
        var axis_dir: vec2<f32>;
        if axis == 0u {
            axis_dir = vec2<f32>(texel.x, 0.0);
        } else {
            axis_dir = vec2<f32>(0.0, texel.y);
        }
        if radius_mode == 2u {
            result = n0_sg_blur_linear(uv, axis_dir, radius);
        } else {
            result = n0_sg_blur_dynamic(uv, axis_dir, radius);
        }
    } else {
        var d: vec2<f32>;
        if axis == 0u {
            d = vec2<f32>(texel.x * step, 0.0);
        } else {
            d = vec2<f32>(0.0, texel.y * step);
        }
        if kernel_size == 0u {
            result = n0_sg_blur_9(uv, d);
        } else if kernel_size == 1u {
            result = n0_sg_blur_17(uv, d);
        } else {
            result = n0_sg_blur_25(uv, d);
        }
    }

    return result;
}

fn n1_body(c: vec4<f32>, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, weights: vec3<f32>) -> vec4<f32> {
    let g = dot(c.rgb, weights);
    return vec4<f32>(g, g, g, c.a);
}

fn n2_body(c: vec4<f32>, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, scale: f32, offset: f32, lo: f32, hi: f32, gamma: f32) -> vec4<f32> {
    let scaled = c.rgb * scale + vec3<f32>(offset);
    let clamped = clamp(scaled, vec3<f32>(lo), vec3<f32>(hi));
    let powered = pow(max(clamped, vec3<f32>(0.0)), vec3<f32>(gamma));
    return vec4<f32>(powered, c.a);
}

@compute @workgroup_size(16, 16)
fn cs_main(@builtin(global_invocation_id) id: vec3<u32>) {
    let dims = textureDimensions(dst_0);
    if id.x >= dims.x || id.y >= dims.y {
        return;
    }
    let coord = vec2<i32>(i32(id.x), i32(id.y));
    let uv = (vec2<f32>(id.xy) + 0.5) / vec2<f32>(dims);
    let r0 = q16(n0_body(uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n0_kernel_size, params.n0_axis, params.n0_step, params.n0_radius_mode, params.n0_radius, params.n0_address_mode));
    let r1 = n1_body(r0, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), vec3<f32>(params.n1_weights_x, params.n1_weights_y, params.n1_weights_z));
    let r2 = n2_body(r1, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n2_scale, params.n2_offset, params.n2_lo, params.n2_hi, params.n2_gamma);
    textureStore(dst_0, coord, r0);
    textureStore(dst_1, coord, r2);
}

=== generator:MetallicGlass node:46 ===
// @static_param: n0_amount
// @static_param: n0_mode
// @input_access: src_0 coincident
// @input_access: src_1 coincident
struct Params {
    n0_amount: f32,
    n0_mode: u32,
    n1_gain: f32,
    _pad0: u32,
}

@group(0) @binding(0) var<uniform> params: Params;
@group(0) @binding(1) var src_0: texture_2d<f32>;
@group(0) @binding(2) var src_1: texture_2d<f32>;
@group(0) @binding(3) var dst_0: texture_storage_2d<rgba16float, write>;
@group(0) @binding(4) var dst_1: texture_storage_2d<rgba16float, write>;

fn q16(v: vec4<f32>) -> vec4<f32> {
    return vec4<f32>(unpack2x16float(pack2x16float(v.xy)), unpack2x16float(pack2x16float(v.zw)));
}

fn overlay_channel(a: f32, b: f32) -> f32 {
    if a < 0.5 {
        return 2.0 * a * b;
    }
    return 1.0 - 2.0 * (1.0 - a) * (1.0 - b);
}

fn safe_div(a: f32, b: f32) -> f32 {
    if abs(b) < 1.0e-6 {
        return 0.0;
    }
    return a / b;
}

fn blend_rgb(a: vec3<f32>, b: vec3<f32>, mode: u32) -> vec3<f32> {
    switch mode {
        case 0u: { return b; }
        case 1u: { return 1.0 - (1.0 - a) * (1.0 - b); }
        case 2u: { return a + b; }
        case 3u: { return max(a, b); }
        case 4u: { return a * b; }
        case 5u: { return abs(a - b); }
        case 6u: {
            return vec3<f32>(
                overlay_channel(a.x, b.x),
                overlay_channel(a.y, b.y),
                overlay_channel(a.z, b.z),
            );
        }
        case 7u: {
            return vec3<f32>(safe_div(a.x, b.x), safe_div(a.y, b.y), safe_div(a.z, b.z));
        }
        default: { return b; }
    }
}

fn n0_body(a: vec4<f32>, b: vec4<f32>, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, amount: f32, mode: u32) -> vec4<f32> {
    let blended = blend_rgb(a.rgb, b.rgb, mode);
    let out_rgb = mix(a.rgb, blended, amount);
    // Branchless on purpose: an `if` here compiles differently in fused vs
    // standalone kernel contexts (FMA regrouping) and broke the fp32
    // bit-exact proof (precision contract §7.1's "match the exact arithmetic
    // form" gotcha). mix(x, y, 0.0) = x + (y-x)*0.0 = x exactly, so t_a = 0
    // IS alpha pass-through, in the original instruction shape.
    let t_a = select(0.0, amount, mode == 0u);
    let out_a = mix(a.a, b.a, t_a);
    return vec4<f32>(out_rgb, out_a);
}

fn n1_body(c: vec4<f32>, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, gain: f32) -> vec4<f32> {
    return vec4<f32>(c.rgb * gain, c.a);
}

@compute @workgroup_size(16, 16)
fn cs_main(@builtin(global_invocation_id) id: vec3<u32>) {
    let dims = textureDimensions(dst_0);
    if id.x >= dims.x || id.y >= dims.y {
        return;
    }
    let coord = vec2<i32>(i32(id.x), i32(id.y));
    let uv = (vec2<f32>(id.xy) + 0.5) / vec2<f32>(dims);
    let ext_0 = textureLoad(src_0, coord, 0);
    let ext_1 = textureLoad(src_1, coord, 0);
    let r0 = q16(n0_body(ext_0, ext_1, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n0_amount, params.n0_mode));
    let r1 = n1_body(r0, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n1_gain);
    textureStore(dst_0, coord, r1);
    textureStore(dst_1, coord, r0);
}

=== generator:MetallicGlass node:47 ===
// @static_param: n1_weights_x
// @static_param: n1_weights_y
// @static_param: n1_weights_z
// @input_access: src_0 gather
struct Params {
    n0_angle: f32,
    n1_weights_x: f32,
    n1_weights_y: f32,
    n1_weights_z: f32,
}

@group(0) @binding(0) var<uniform> params: Params;
@group(0) @binding(1) var src_0: texture_2d<f32>;
@group(0) @binding(2) var samp: sampler;
@group(0) @binding(3) var dst: texture_storage_2d<rgba16float, write>;

fn n0_body(tex_source: texture_2d<f32>, samp: sampler, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, angle: f32) -> vec4<f32> {
    let centered = uv - vec2<f32>(0.5);
    let ca = cos(angle);
    let sa = sin(angle);

    let rotated = vec2<f32>(
        centered.x * ca - centered.y * sa,
        centered.x * sa + centered.y * ca,
    );
    let folded = vec2<f32>(rotated.x, abs(rotated.y));
    let unrotated = vec2<f32>(
        folded.x * ca + folded.y * sa,
        -folded.x * sa + folded.y * ca,
    );

    let mirrored_uv = fract(unrotated + vec2<f32>(0.5));
    return textureSampleLevel(tex_source, samp, mirrored_uv, 0.0);
}

fn n1_body(c: vec4<f32>, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, weights: vec3<f32>) -> vec4<f32> {
    let g = dot(c.rgb, weights);
    return vec4<f32>(g, g, g, c.a);
}

@compute @workgroup_size(16, 16)
fn cs_main(@builtin(global_invocation_id) id: vec3<u32>) {
    let dims = textureDimensions(dst);
    if id.x >= dims.x || id.y >= dims.y {
        return;
    }
    let coord = vec2<i32>(i32(id.x), i32(id.y));
    let uv = (vec2<f32>(id.xy) + 0.5) / vec2<f32>(dims);
    let r0 = n0_body(src_0, samp, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n0_angle);
    let r1 = n1_body(r0, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), vec3<f32>(params.n1_weights_x, params.n1_weights_y, params.n1_weights_z));
    textureStore(dst, coord, r1);
}

=== generator:MetallicGlass node:48 ===
// @static_param: n0_bias
// @static_param: n0_k0
// @static_param: n0_k1
// @static_param: n0_k2
// @static_param: n0_k3
// @static_param: n0_k4
// @static_param: n0_k5
// @static_param: n0_k6
// @static_param: n0_k7
// @static_param: n0_k8
// @static_param: n0_normalise
// @static_param: n1_bias
// @static_param: n1_k0
// @static_param: n1_k1
// @static_param: n1_k2
// @static_param: n1_k3
// @static_param: n1_k4
// @static_param: n1_k5
// @static_param: n1_k6
// @static_param: n1_k7
// @static_param: n1_k8
// @static_param: n1_normalise
// @static_param: n2_default_a
// @static_param: n2_default_b
// @static_param: n2_default_g
// @static_param: n2_default_r
// @static_param: n5_max
// @static_param: n5_min
// @input_access: src_0 gather
struct Params {
    n0_k0: f32,
    n0_k1: f32,
    n0_k2: f32,
    n0_k3: f32,
    n0_k4: f32,
    n0_k5: f32,
    n0_k6: f32,
    n0_k7: f32,
    n0_k8: f32,
    n0_bias: f32,
    n0_normalise: u32,
    n1_k0: f32,
    n1_k1: f32,
    n1_k2: f32,
    n1_k3: f32,
    n1_k4: f32,
    n1_k5: f32,
    n1_k6: f32,
    n1_k7: f32,
    n1_k8: f32,
    n1_bias: f32,
    n1_normalise: u32,
    n2_default_r: f32,
    n2_default_g: f32,
    n2_default_b: f32,
    n2_default_a: f32,
    n4_gain: f32,
    n5_min: f32,
    n5_max: f32,
    _pad0: u32,
    _pad1: u32,
    _pad2: u32,
}

@group(0) @binding(0) var<uniform> params: Params;
@group(0) @binding(1) var src_0: texture_2d<f32>;
@group(0) @binding(2) var samp: sampler;
@group(0) @binding(3) var dst: texture_storage_2d<rgba16float, write>;

fn n0_body(
    t_source: texture_2d<f32>, samp: sampler, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>,
    k0: f32, k1: f32, k2: f32, k3: f32, k4: f32, k5: f32, k6: f32, k7: f32, k8: f32,
    bias: f32, normalise: u32,
) -> vec4<f32> {
    let texel = 1.0 / dims;

    let p00 = textureSampleLevel(t_source, samp, uv + vec2<f32>(-texel.x, -texel.y), 0.0).rgb;
    let p10 = textureSampleLevel(t_source, samp, uv + vec2<f32>( 0.0,     -texel.y), 0.0).rgb;
    let p20 = textureSampleLevel(t_source, samp, uv + vec2<f32>( texel.x, -texel.y), 0.0).rgb;
    let p01 = textureSampleLevel(t_source, samp, uv + vec2<f32>(-texel.x,  0.0    ), 0.0).rgb;
    let center_sample = textureSampleLevel(t_source, samp, uv, 0.0);
    let p11 = center_sample.rgb;
    let p21 = textureSampleLevel(t_source, samp, uv + vec2<f32>( texel.x,  0.0    ), 0.0).rgb;
    let p02 = textureSampleLevel(t_source, samp, uv + vec2<f32>(-texel.x,  texel.y), 0.0).rgb;
    let p12 = textureSampleLevel(t_source, samp, uv + vec2<f32>( 0.0,      texel.y), 0.0).rgb;
    let p22 = textureSampleLevel(t_source, samp, uv + vec2<f32>( texel.x,  texel.y), 0.0).rgb;

    var sum = p00 * k0 + p10 * k1 + p20 * k2
            + p01 * k3 + p11 * k4 + p21 * k5
            + p02 * k6 + p12 * k7 + p22 * k8;

    if normalise == 1u {
        let weight_sum = k0 + k1 + k2 + k3 + k4 + k5 + k6 + k7 + k8;
        if abs(weight_sum) > 1e-6 {
            sum = sum / weight_sum;
        }
    }

    sum = sum + vec3<f32>(bias);

    return vec4<f32>(sum, center_sample.a);
}

fn n1_body(
    t_source: texture_2d<f32>, samp: sampler, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>,
    k0: f32, k1: f32, k2: f32, k3: f32, k4: f32, k5: f32, k6: f32, k7: f32, k8: f32,
    bias: f32, normalise: u32,
) -> vec4<f32> {
    let texel = 1.0 / dims;

    let p00 = textureSampleLevel(t_source, samp, uv + vec2<f32>(-texel.x, -texel.y), 0.0).rgb;
    let p10 = textureSampleLevel(t_source, samp, uv + vec2<f32>( 0.0,     -texel.y), 0.0).rgb;
    let p20 = textureSampleLevel(t_source, samp, uv + vec2<f32>( texel.x, -texel.y), 0.0).rgb;
    let p01 = textureSampleLevel(t_source, samp, uv + vec2<f32>(-texel.x,  0.0    ), 0.0).rgb;
    let center_sample = textureSampleLevel(t_source, samp, uv, 0.0);
    let p11 = center_sample.rgb;
    let p21 = textureSampleLevel(t_source, samp, uv + vec2<f32>( texel.x,  0.0    ), 0.0).rgb;
    let p02 = textureSampleLevel(t_source, samp, uv + vec2<f32>(-texel.x,  texel.y), 0.0).rgb;
    let p12 = textureSampleLevel(t_source, samp, uv + vec2<f32>( 0.0,      texel.y), 0.0).rgb;
    let p22 = textureSampleLevel(t_source, samp, uv + vec2<f32>( texel.x,  texel.y), 0.0).rgb;

    var sum = p00 * k0 + p10 * k1 + p20 * k2
            + p01 * k3 + p11 * k4 + p21 * k5
            + p02 * k6 + p12 * k7 + p22 * k8;

    if normalise == 1u {
        let weight_sum = k0 + k1 + k2 + k3 + k4 + k5 + k6 + k7 + k8;
        if abs(weight_sum) > 1e-6 {
            sum = sum / weight_sum;
        }
    }

    sum = sum + vec3<f32>(bias);

    return vec4<f32>(sum, center_sample.a);
}

fn n2_body(c_r: vec4<f32>, c_g: vec4<f32>, c_b: vec4<f32>, c_a: vec4<f32>, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, default_r: f32, default_g: f32, default_b: f32, default_a: f32, use_r: u32, use_g: u32, use_b: u32, use_a: u32) -> vec4<f32> {
    var rgba = vec4<f32>(default_r, default_g, default_b, default_a);
    if use_r != 0u { rgba.r = c_r.r; }
    if use_g != 0u { rgba.g = c_g.r; }
    if use_b != 0u { rgba.b = c_b.r; }
    if use_a != 0u { rgba.a = c_a.r; }
    return rgba;
}

fn n3_body(c_in: vec4<f32>, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>) -> vec4<f32> {
    let v = c_in.rg;
    return vec4<f32>(length(v), 0.0, 0.0, 1.0);
}

fn n4_body(c: vec4<f32>, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, gain: f32) -> vec4<f32> {
    return vec4<f32>(c.rgb * gain, c.a);
}

fn n5_body(c: vec4<f32>, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, min_v: f32, max_v: f32) -> vec4<f32> {
    return vec4<f32>(clamp(c.rgb, vec3<f32>(min_v), vec3<f32>(max_v)), c.a);
}

@compute @workgroup_size(16, 16)
fn cs_main(@builtin(global_invocation_id) id: vec3<u32>) {
    let dims = textureDimensions(dst);
    if id.x >= dims.x || id.y >= dims.y {
        return;
    }
    let coord = vec2<i32>(i32(id.x), i32(id.y));
    let uv = (vec2<f32>(id.xy) + 0.5) / vec2<f32>(dims);
    let r0 = n0_body(src_0, samp, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n0_k0, params.n0_k1, params.n0_k2, params.n0_k3, params.n0_k4, params.n0_k5, params.n0_k6, params.n0_k7, params.n0_k8, params.n0_bias, params.n0_normalise);
    let r1 = n1_body(src_0, samp, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n1_k0, params.n1_k1, params.n1_k2, params.n1_k3, params.n1_k4, params.n1_k5, params.n1_k6, params.n1_k7, params.n1_k8, params.n1_bias, params.n1_normalise);
    let r2 = n2_body(r1, r0, vec4<f32>(0.0), vec4<f32>(0.0), uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n2_default_r, params.n2_default_g, params.n2_default_b, params.n2_default_a, 1u, 1u, 0u, 0u);
    let r3 = n3_body(r2, uv, vec2<f32>(dims));
    let r4 = n4_body(r3, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n4_gain);
    let r5 = n5_body(r4, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n5_min, params.n5_max);
    textureStore(dst, coord, r5);
}

=== generator:MetallicGlass node:49 ===
// @static_param: n0_amount
// @static_param: n0_mode
// @static_param: n1_scale
// @input_access: src_0 coincident
// @input_access: src_1 coincident
struct Params {
    n0_amount: f32,
    n0_mode: u32,
    n1_scale: f32,
    n1_offset: f32,
}

@group(0) @binding(0) var<uniform> params: Params;
@group(0) @binding(1) var src_0: texture_2d<f32>;
@group(0) @binding(2) var src_1: texture_2d<f32>;
@group(0) @binding(3) var dst_0: texture_storage_2d<rgba16float, write>;
@group(0) @binding(4) var dst_1: texture_storage_2d<rgba16float, write>;

fn q16(v: vec4<f32>) -> vec4<f32> {
    return vec4<f32>(unpack2x16float(pack2x16float(v.xy)), unpack2x16float(pack2x16float(v.zw)));
}

fn overlay_channel(a: f32, b: f32) -> f32 {
    if a < 0.5 {
        return 2.0 * a * b;
    }
    return 1.0 - 2.0 * (1.0 - a) * (1.0 - b);
}

fn safe_div(a: f32, b: f32) -> f32 {
    if abs(b) < 1.0e-6 {
        return 0.0;
    }
    return a / b;
}

fn blend_rgb(a: vec3<f32>, b: vec3<f32>, mode: u32) -> vec3<f32> {
    switch mode {
        case 0u: { return b; }
        case 1u: { return 1.0 - (1.0 - a) * (1.0 - b); }
        case 2u: { return a + b; }
        case 3u: { return max(a, b); }
        case 4u: { return a * b; }
        case 5u: { return abs(a - b); }
        case 6u: {
            return vec3<f32>(
                overlay_channel(a.x, b.x),
                overlay_channel(a.y, b.y),
                overlay_channel(a.z, b.z),
            );
        }
        case 7u: {
            return vec3<f32>(safe_div(a.x, b.x), safe_div(a.y, b.y), safe_div(a.z, b.z));
        }
        default: { return b; }
    }
}

fn n0_body(a: vec4<f32>, b: vec4<f32>, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, amount: f32, mode: u32) -> vec4<f32> {
    let blended = blend_rgb(a.rgb, b.rgb, mode);
    let out_rgb = mix(a.rgb, blended, amount);
    // Branchless on purpose: an `if` here compiles differently in fused vs
    // standalone kernel contexts (FMA regrouping) and broke the fp32
    // bit-exact proof (precision contract §7.1's "match the exact arithmetic
    // form" gotcha). mix(x, y, 0.0) = x + (y-x)*0.0 = x exactly, so t_a = 0
    // IS alpha pass-through, in the original instruction shape.
    let t_a = select(0.0, amount, mode == 0u);
    let out_a = mix(a.a, b.a, t_a);
    return vec4<f32>(out_rgb, out_a);
}

fn n1_body(c: vec4<f32>, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, scale: f32, offset: f32) -> vec4<f32> {
    return vec4<f32>(
        c.r * scale + offset,
        c.g * scale + offset,
        c.b * scale + offset,
        c.a,
    );
}

@compute @workgroup_size(16, 16)
fn cs_main(@builtin(global_invocation_id) id: vec3<u32>) {
    let dims = textureDimensions(dst_0);
    if id.x >= dims.x || id.y >= dims.y {
        return;
    }
    let coord = vec2<i32>(i32(id.x), i32(id.y));
    let uv = (vec2<f32>(id.xy) + 0.5) / vec2<f32>(dims);
    let ext_0 = textureLoad(src_0, coord, 0);
    let ext_1 = textureLoad(src_1, coord, 0);
    let r0 = q16(n0_body(ext_0, ext_1, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n0_amount, params.n0_mode));
    let r1 = n1_body(r0, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n1_scale, params.n1_offset);
    textureStore(dst_0, coord, r0);
    textureStore(dst_1, coord, r1);
}

=== generator:MriVolume node:15 ===
// @input_access: src_0 gather
struct Params {
    n0_amount: f32,
    n1_low: f32,
    n1_high: f32,
    n2_intensity: f32,
}

@group(0) @binding(0) var<uniform> params: Params;
@group(0) @binding(1) var src_0: texture_2d<f32>;
@group(0) @binding(2) var samp: sampler;
@group(0) @binding(3) var dst: texture_storage_2d<rgba16float, write>;

fn n0_body(in_tex: texture_2d<f32>, samp: sampler, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, amount: f32) -> vec4<f32> {
    let center = textureSampleLevel(in_tex, samp, uv, 0.0);
    if amount <= 0.0 {
        return center;
    }
    let dx = vec2<f32>(1.0) / dims;
    let s_l = textureSampleLevel(in_tex, samp, uv + vec2<f32>(-dx.x, 0.0), 0.0);
    let s_r = textureSampleLevel(in_tex, samp, uv + vec2<f32>( dx.x, 0.0), 0.0);
    let s_u = textureSampleLevel(in_tex, samp, uv + vec2<f32>(0.0, -dx.y), 0.0);
    let s_d = textureSampleLevel(in_tex, samp, uv + vec2<f32>(0.0,  dx.y), 0.0);
    let laplacian = 4.0 * center - (s_l + s_r + s_u + s_d);
    return center + laplacian * amount * 0.5;
}

fn n1_body(c: vec4<f32>, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, low: f32, high: f32) -> vec4<f32> {
    return vec4<f32>(
        smoothstep(low, high, c.r),
        smoothstep(low, high, c.g),
        smoothstep(low, high, c.b),
        c.a,
    );
}

fn n2_body(c: vec4<f32>, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, intensity: f32) -> vec4<f32> {
    let inverted = vec4<f32>(1.0 - c.r, 1.0 - c.g, 1.0 - c.b, c.a);
    return mix(c, inverted, intensity);
}

@compute @workgroup_size(16, 16)
fn cs_main(@builtin(global_invocation_id) id: vec3<u32>) {
    let dims = textureDimensions(dst);
    if id.x >= dims.x || id.y >= dims.y {
        return;
    }
    let coord = vec2<i32>(i32(id.x), i32(id.y));
    let uv = (vec2<f32>(id.xy) + 0.5) / vec2<f32>(dims);
    let r0 = n0_body(src_0, samp, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n0_amount);
    let r1 = n1_body(r0, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n1_low, params.n1_high);
    let r2 = n2_body(r1, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n2_intensity);
    textureStore(dst, coord, r2);
}

=== generator:OilyFluid node:50 ===
// @static_param: n0_offset_x
// @static_param: n0_offset_y
// @static_param: n0_output_channel
// @static_param: n0_scale_x
// @static_param: n0_scale_y
// @static_param: n10_amount
// @static_param: n10_mode
// @static_param: n12_angle
// @static_param: n13_amount
// @static_param: n13_mode
// @static_param: n14_boundary
// @static_param: n16_amount
// @static_param: n16_mode
// @static_param: n1_offset_x
// @static_param: n1_offset_y
// @static_param: n1_output_channel
// @static_param: n1_scale_x
// @static_param: n1_scale_y
// @static_param: n2_amount
// @static_param: n2_mode
// @static_param: n4_boundary
// @static_param: n6_channel
// @static_param: n6_scale_mode
// @static_param: n6_wrap_mode
// @static_param: n8_channel
// @static_param: n8_scale_mode
// @static_param: n8_wrap_mode
// @input_access: src_0 gather
// @input_access: src_1 coincident
// @input_access: src_2 gather_texel
// @precision_critical: src_2
// @input_access: src_3 gather
struct Params {
    n0_scale_x: f32,
    n0_scale_y: f32,
    n0_offset_x: f32,
    n0_offset_y: f32,
    n0_z: f32,
    n0_output_channel: u32,
    n1_scale_x: f32,
    n1_scale_y: f32,
    n1_offset_x: f32,
    n1_offset_y: f32,
    n1_z: f32,
    n1_output_channel: u32,
    n2_amount: f32,
    n2_mode: u32,
    n3_gain: f32,
    n4_dt: f32,
    n4_boundary: u32,
    n5_gain: f32,
    n6_channel: u32,
    n6_scale_mode: u32,
    n6_wrap_mode: u32,
    n8_channel: u32,
    n8_scale_mode: u32,
    n8_wrap_mode: u32,
    n10_amount: f32,
    n10_mode: u32,
    n11_gain: f32,
    n12_angle: f32,
    n13_amount: f32,
    n13_mode: u32,
    n14_dt: f32,
    n14_boundary: u32,
    n15_gain: f32,
    n16_amount: f32,
    n16_mode: u32,
    _pad0: u32,
}

@group(0) @binding(0) var<uniform> params: Params;
@group(0) @binding(1) var src_0: texture_2d<f32>;
@group(0) @binding(2) var src_1: texture_2d<f32>;
@group(0) @binding(3) var src_2: texture_2d<f32>;
@group(0) @binding(4) var src_3: texture_2d<f32>;
@group(0) @binding(5) var samp: sampler;
@group(0) @binding(6) var dst_0: texture_storage_2d<rgba16float, write>;
@group(0) @binding(7) var dst_1: texture_storage_2d<rgba16float, write>;

const NV_EPS: f32 = 1e-6;

fn q16(v: vec4<f32>) -> vec4<f32> {
