    return vec4<f32>(unpack2x16float(pack2x16float(v.xy)), unpack2x16float(pack2x16float(v.zw)));
}

fn wang_hash(seed_in: u32) -> u32 {
    var seed = seed_in;
    seed = (seed ^ 61u) ^ (seed >> 16u);
    seed = seed * 9u;
    seed = seed ^ (seed >> 4u);
    seed = seed * 0x27d4eb2du;
    seed = seed ^ (seed >> 15u);
    return seed;
}

fn perlin3_hash(ix: i32, iy: i32, iz: i32) -> u32 {
    let x = u32(ix + 10000) * 73856093u;
    let y = u32(iy + 10000) * 19349663u;
    let z = u32(iz + 10000) * 83492791u;
    return wang_hash(x ^ y ^ z);
}

fn perlin3_grad(h: u32) -> vec3<f32> {
    let sel = h & 15u;
    switch sel {
        case 0u:  { return vec3<f32>( 1.0,  1.0,  0.0); }
        case 1u:  { return vec3<f32>(-1.0,  1.0,  0.0); }
        case 2u:  { return vec3<f32>( 1.0, -1.0,  0.0); }
        case 3u:  { return vec3<f32>(-1.0, -1.0,  0.0); }
        case 4u:  { return vec3<f32>( 1.0,  0.0,  1.0); }
        case 5u:  { return vec3<f32>(-1.0,  0.0,  1.0); }
        case 6u:  { return vec3<f32>( 1.0,  0.0, -1.0); }
        case 7u:  { return vec3<f32>(-1.0,  0.0, -1.0); }
        case 8u:  { return vec3<f32>( 0.0,  1.0,  1.0); }
        case 9u:  { return vec3<f32>( 0.0, -1.0,  1.0); }
        case 10u: { return vec3<f32>( 0.0,  1.0, -1.0); }
        case 11u: { return vec3<f32>( 0.0, -1.0, -1.0); }
        case 12u: { return vec3<f32>( 1.0,  1.0,  0.0); }
        case 13u: { return vec3<f32>(-1.0,  1.0,  0.0); }
        case 14u: { return vec3<f32>( 0.0, -1.0,  1.0); }
        default:  { return vec3<f32>( 0.0, -1.0, -1.0); }
    }
}

fn perlin3_grad_dot(ix: i32, iy: i32, iz: i32, fx: f32, fy: f32, fz: f32) -> f32 {
    let h = perlin3_hash(ix, iy, iz);
    let g = perlin3_grad(h);
    return g.x * fx + g.y * fy + g.z * fz;
}

fn simplex_noise_3d(p: vec3<f32>) -> f32 {
    let i = floor(p);
    let f = p - i;
    let u = f * f * f * (f * (f * 6.0 - 15.0) + 10.0);

    let ix = i32(i.x);
    let iy = i32(i.y);
    let iz = i32(i.z);

    let n000 = perlin3_grad_dot(ix,     iy,     iz,     f.x,       f.y,       f.z);
    let n100 = perlin3_grad_dot(ix + 1, iy,     iz,     f.x - 1.0, f.y,       f.z);
    let n010 = perlin3_grad_dot(ix,     iy + 1, iz,     f.x,       f.y - 1.0, f.z);
    let n110 = perlin3_grad_dot(ix + 1, iy + 1, iz,     f.x - 1.0, f.y - 1.0, f.z);
    let n001 = perlin3_grad_dot(ix,     iy,     iz + 1, f.x,       f.y,       f.z - 1.0);
    let n101 = perlin3_grad_dot(ix + 1, iy,     iz + 1, f.x - 1.0, f.y,       f.z - 1.0);
    let n011 = perlin3_grad_dot(ix,     iy + 1, iz + 1, f.x,       f.y - 1.0, f.z - 1.0);
    let n111 = perlin3_grad_dot(ix + 1, iy + 1, iz + 1, f.x - 1.0, f.y - 1.0, f.z - 1.0);

    let nx00 = mix(n000, n100, u.x);
    let nx10 = mix(n010, n110, u.x);
    let nx01 = mix(n001, n101, u.x);
    let nx11 = mix(n011, n111, u.x);
    let nxy0 = mix(nx00, nx10, u.y);
    let nxy1 = mix(nx01, nx11, u.y);
    return mix(nxy0, nxy1, u.z);
}

fn overlay_channel(a: f32, b: f32) -> f32 {
    if a < 0.5 {
        return 2.0 * a * b;
    }
    return 1.0 - 2.0 * (1.0 - a) * (1.0 - b);
}

fn safe_div(a: f32, b: f32) -> f32 {
    if abs(b) < 1.0e-6 {
        return 0.0;
    }
    return a / b;
}

fn blend_rgb(a: vec3<f32>, b: vec3<f32>, mode: u32) -> vec3<f32> {
    switch mode {
        case 0u: { return b; }
        case 1u: { return 1.0 - (1.0 - a) * (1.0 - b); }
        case 2u: { return a + b; }
        case 3u: { return max(a, b); }
        case 4u: { return a * b; }
        case 5u: { return abs(a - b); }
        case 6u: {
            return vec3<f32>(
                overlay_channel(a.x, b.x),
                overlay_channel(a.y, b.y),
                overlay_channel(a.z, b.z),
            );
        }
        case 7u: {
            return vec3<f32>(safe_div(a.x, b.x), safe_div(a.y, b.y), safe_div(a.z, b.z));
        }
        default: { return b; }
    }
}

fn gcd_select_channel(c: vec4<f32>, idx: u32) -> f32 {
    switch idx {
        case 0u: { return c.r; }
        case 1u: { return c.g; }
        case 2u: { return c.b; }
        default: { return c.a; }
    }
}

// Resolve a neighbour texel index per `wrap_mode`: 0 (Clamp) clamps to the
// texture bounds — the ClampToEdge-sampler equivalent, exact because the
// offset is always precisely one texel from a fragment sampled at its own
// texel center. 1 (Repeat) modulo-wraps the index — the Repeat-address-
// sampler equivalent, exact for the same reason (a periodic sampler wrap at
// an exact one-texel-out-of-range UV lands on the exact opposite-edge texel
// center, identical to wrapping the integer index).

fn gcd_wrap_coord(c: vec2<i32>, dims_i: vec2<i32>, wrap_mode: u32) -> vec2<i32> {
    if wrap_mode == 1u {
        return ((c % dims_i) + dims_i) % dims_i;
    }
    return clamp(c, vec2<i32>(0, 0), dims_i - vec2<i32>(1, 1));
}

fn n0_body(uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, scale_x: f32, scale_y: f32, offset_x: f32, offset_y: f32, z: f32, output_channel: u32) -> vec4<f32> {
    let p = vec3<f32>(
        uv.x * scale_x + offset_x,
        uv.y * scale_y + offset_y,
        z,
    );
    let n = simplex_noise_3d(p);
    var out_col = vec4<f32>(0.0, 0.0, 0.0, 1.0);
    switch output_channel {
        case 0u: { out_col.r = n; }
        case 1u: { out_col.g = n; }
        case 2u: { out_col.b = n; }
        default: { out_col.a = n; }
    }
    return out_col;
}

fn n1_body(uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, scale_x: f32, scale_y: f32, offset_x: f32, offset_y: f32, z: f32, output_channel: u32) -> vec4<f32> {
    let p = vec3<f32>(
        uv.x * scale_x + offset_x,
        uv.y * scale_y + offset_y,
        z,
    );
    let n = simplex_noise_3d(p);
    var out_col = vec4<f32>(0.0, 0.0, 0.0, 1.0);
    switch output_channel {
        case 0u: { out_col.r = n; }
        case 1u: { out_col.g = n; }
        case 2u: { out_col.b = n; }
        default: { out_col.a = n; }
    }
    return out_col;
}

fn n2_body(a: vec4<f32>, b: vec4<f32>, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, amount: f32, mode: u32) -> vec4<f32> {
    let blended = blend_rgb(a.rgb, b.rgb, mode);
    let out_rgb = mix(a.rgb, blended, amount);
    // Branchless on purpose: an `if` here compiles differently in fused vs
    // standalone kernel contexts (FMA regrouping) and broke the fp32
    // bit-exact proof (precision contract §7.1's "match the exact arithmetic
    // form" gotcha). mix(x, y, 0.0) = x + (y-x)*0.0 = x exactly, so t_a = 0
    // IS alpha pass-through, in the original instruction shape.
    let t_a = select(0.0, amount, mode == 0u);
    let out_a = mix(a.a, b.a, t_a);
    return vec4<f32>(out_rgb, out_a);
}

fn n3_body(c: vec4<f32>, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, gain: f32) -> vec4<f32> {
    return vec4<f32>(c.rgb * gain, c.a);
}

fn n4_body(tex_in: texture_2d<f32>, samp: sampler, c_velocity: vec4<f32>, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, dt: f32, boundary: u32) -> vec4<f32> {
    let inv = vec2<f32>(1.0) / dims;
    let v = c_velocity.rg;
    let adv_uv = uv - v * dt * inv;
    return textureSampleLevel(tex_in, samp, adv_uv, 0.0);
}

fn n5_body(c: vec4<f32>, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, gain: f32) -> vec4<f32> {
    return vec4<f32>(c.rgb * gain, c.a);
}

fn n6_body(in_tex: texture_2d<f32>, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, channel: u32, scale_mode: u32, wrap_mode: u32) -> vec4<f32> {
    let dims_i = vec2<i32>(dims);
    let c = vec2<i32>(uv * dims);

    let cL = textureLoad(in_tex, gcd_wrap_coord(c - vec2<i32>(1, 0), dims_i, wrap_mode), 0);
    let cR = textureLoad(in_tex, gcd_wrap_coord(c + vec2<i32>(1, 0), dims_i, wrap_mode), 0);
    let cD = textureLoad(in_tex, gcd_wrap_coord(c - vec2<i32>(0, 1), dims_i, wrap_mode), 0);
    let cU = textureLoad(in_tex, gcd_wrap_coord(c + vec2<i32>(0, 1), dims_i, wrap_mode), 0);

    let diff_x = gcd_select_channel(cR, channel) - gcd_select_channel(cL, channel);
    let diff_y = gcd_select_channel(cU, channel) - gcd_select_channel(cD, channel);

    let scale_xy = select(
        vec2<f32>(0.5, 0.5),
        vec2<f32>(dims.x * 0.5, dims.y * 0.5),
        scale_mode == 1u,
    );
    let dx = diff_x * scale_xy.x;
    let dy = diff_y * scale_xy.y;

    return vec4<f32>(dx, dy, 0.0, 1.0);
}

fn n7_body(c_in: vec4<f32>, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>) -> vec4<f32> {
    let v = c_in.rg;
    let len = length(v);
    let n = select(vec2<f32>(0.0), v / len, len >= NV_EPS);
    return vec4<f32>(n, 0.0, 1.0);
}

fn n8_body(in_tex: texture_2d<f32>, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, channel: u32, scale_mode: u32, wrap_mode: u32) -> vec4<f32> {
    let dims_i = vec2<i32>(dims);
    let c = vec2<i32>(uv * dims);

    let cL = textureLoad(in_tex, gcd_wrap_coord(c - vec2<i32>(1, 0), dims_i, wrap_mode), 0);
    let cR = textureLoad(in_tex, gcd_wrap_coord(c + vec2<i32>(1, 0), dims_i, wrap_mode), 0);
    let cD = textureLoad(in_tex, gcd_wrap_coord(c - vec2<i32>(0, 1), dims_i, wrap_mode), 0);
    let cU = textureLoad(in_tex, gcd_wrap_coord(c + vec2<i32>(0, 1), dims_i, wrap_mode), 0);

    let diff_x = gcd_select_channel(cR, channel) - gcd_select_channel(cL, channel);
    let diff_y = gcd_select_channel(cU, channel) - gcd_select_channel(cD, channel);

    let scale_xy = select(
        vec2<f32>(0.5, 0.5),
        vec2<f32>(dims.x * 0.5, dims.y * 0.5),
        scale_mode == 1u,
    );
    let dx = diff_x * scale_xy.x;
    let dy = diff_y * scale_xy.y;

    return vec4<f32>(dx, dy, 0.0, 1.0);
}

fn n9_body(c_in: vec4<f32>, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>) -> vec4<f32> {
    let v = c_in.rg;
    let len = length(v);
    let n = select(vec2<f32>(0.0), v / len, len >= NV_EPS);
    return vec4<f32>(n, 0.0, 1.0);
}

fn n10_body(a: vec4<f32>, b: vec4<f32>, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, amount: f32, mode: u32) -> vec4<f32> {
    let blended = blend_rgb(a.rgb, b.rgb, mode);
    let out_rgb = mix(a.rgb, blended, amount);
    // Branchless on purpose: an `if` here compiles differently in fused vs
    // standalone kernel contexts (FMA regrouping) and broke the fp32
    // bit-exact proof (precision contract §7.1's "match the exact arithmetic
    // form" gotcha). mix(x, y, 0.0) = x + (y-x)*0.0 = x exactly, so t_a = 0
    // IS alpha pass-through, in the original instruction shape.
    let t_a = select(0.0, amount, mode == 0u);
    let out_a = mix(a.a, b.a, t_a);
    return vec4<f32>(out_rgb, out_a);
}

fn n11_body(c: vec4<f32>, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, gain: f32) -> vec4<f32> {
    return vec4<f32>(c.rgb * gain, c.a);
}

fn n12_body(c_in: vec4<f32>, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, angle: f32) -> vec4<f32> {
    let v = c_in.rg;
    let cos_a = cos(angle);
    let sin_a = sin(angle);
    let r = vec2<f32>(
        v.x * cos_a - v.y * sin_a,
        v.x * sin_a + v.y * cos_a,
    );
    return vec4<f32>(r, 0.0, 1.0);
}

fn n13_body(a: vec4<f32>, b: vec4<f32>, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, amount: f32, mode: u32) -> vec4<f32> {
    let blended = blend_rgb(a.rgb, b.rgb, mode);
    let out_rgb = mix(a.rgb, blended, amount);
    // Branchless on purpose: an `if` here compiles differently in fused vs
    // standalone kernel contexts (FMA regrouping) and broke the fp32
    // bit-exact proof (precision contract §7.1's "match the exact arithmetic
    // form" gotcha). mix(x, y, 0.0) = x + (y-x)*0.0 = x exactly, so t_a = 0
    // IS alpha pass-through, in the original instruction shape.
    let t_a = select(0.0, amount, mode == 0u);
    let out_a = mix(a.a, b.a, t_a);
    return vec4<f32>(out_rgb, out_a);
}

fn n14_body(tex_in: texture_2d<f32>, samp: sampler, c_velocity: vec4<f32>, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, dt: f32, boundary: u32) -> vec4<f32> {
    let inv = vec2<f32>(1.0) / dims;
    let v = c_velocity.rg;
    let adv_uv = uv - v * dt * inv;
    return textureSampleLevel(tex_in, samp, adv_uv, 0.0);
}

fn n15_body(c: vec4<f32>, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, gain: f32) -> vec4<f32> {
    return vec4<f32>(c.rgb * gain, c.a);
}

fn n16_body(a: vec4<f32>, b: vec4<f32>, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, amount: f32, mode: u32) -> vec4<f32> {
    let blended = blend_rgb(a.rgb, b.rgb, mode);
    let out_rgb = mix(a.rgb, blended, amount);
    // Branchless on purpose: an `if` here compiles differently in fused vs
    // standalone kernel contexts (FMA regrouping) and broke the fp32
    // bit-exact proof (precision contract §7.1's "match the exact arithmetic
    // form" gotcha). mix(x, y, 0.0) = x + (y-x)*0.0 = x exactly, so t_a = 0
    // IS alpha pass-through, in the original instruction shape.
    let t_a = select(0.0, amount, mode == 0u);
    let out_a = mix(a.a, b.a, t_a);
    return vec4<f32>(out_rgb, out_a);
}

@compute @workgroup_size(16, 16)
fn cs_main(@builtin(global_invocation_id) id: vec3<u32>) {
    let dims = textureDimensions(dst_0);
    if id.x >= dims.x || id.y >= dims.y {
        return;
    }
    let coord = vec2<i32>(i32(id.x), i32(id.y));
    let uv = (vec2<f32>(id.xy) + 0.5) / vec2<f32>(dims);
    let ext_1 = textureLoad(src_1, coord, 0);
    let r0 = n0_body(uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n0_scale_x, params.n0_scale_y, params.n0_offset_x, params.n0_offset_y, params.n0_z, params.n0_output_channel);
    let r1 = n1_body(uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n1_scale_x, params.n1_scale_y, params.n1_offset_x, params.n1_offset_y, params.n1_z, params.n1_output_channel);
    let r2 = n2_body(r1, r0, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n2_amount, params.n2_mode);
    let r3 = n3_body(r2, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n3_gain);
    let r4 = q16(n4_body(src_0, samp, ext_1, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n4_dt, params.n4_boundary));
    let r5 = q16(n5_body(r4, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n5_gain));
    let r6 = q16(n6_body(src_2, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n6_channel, params.n6_scale_mode, params.n6_wrap_mode));
    let r7 = q16(n7_body(r6, uv, vec2<f32>(dims)));
    let r8 = q16(n8_body(src_2, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n8_channel, params.n8_scale_mode, params.n8_wrap_mode));
    let r9 = q16(n9_body(r8, uv, vec2<f32>(dims)));
    let r10 = q16(n10_body(r9, r7, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n10_amount, params.n10_mode));
    let r11 = q16(n11_body(r10, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n11_gain));
    let r12 = q16(n12_body(r11, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n12_angle));
    let r13 = q16(n13_body(r5, r12, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n13_amount, params.n13_mode));
    let r14 = q16(n14_body(src_3, samp, r13, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n14_dt, params.n14_boundary));
    let r15 = q16(n15_body(r14, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n15_gain));
    let r16 = q16(n16_body(r15, r3, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n16_amount, params.n16_mode));
    textureStore(dst_0, coord, r13);
    textureStore(dst_1, coord, r16);
}

=== generator:OilyFluid node:51 ===
// @static_param: n0_aspect
// @static_param: n0_coord_space
// @static_param: n1_color_x_high_w
// @static_param: n1_color_x_high_x
// @static_param: n1_color_x_high_y
// @static_param: n1_color_x_high_z
// @static_param: n1_color_x_low_w
// @static_param: n1_color_x_low_x
// @static_param: n1_color_x_low_y
// @static_param: n1_color_x_low_z
// @static_param: n1_color_y_high_w
// @static_param: n1_color_y_high_x
// @static_param: n1_color_y_high_y
// @static_param: n1_color_y_high_z
// @static_param: n1_color_y_low_w
// @static_param: n1_color_y_low_x
// @static_param: n1_color_y_low_y
// @static_param: n1_color_y_low_z
// @static_param: n2_color_w
// @static_param: n2_color_x
// @static_param: n2_color_y
// @static_param: n2_color_z
// @static_param: n2_power
// @static_param: n2_view_x
// @static_param: n2_view_y
// @static_param: n2_view_z
// @static_param: n3_amount
// @static_param: n3_mode
// @static_param: n4_color_w
// @static_param: n4_color_x
// @static_param: n4_color_y
// @static_param: n4_color_z
// @static_param: n4_light_x
// @static_param: n4_light_y
// @static_param: n4_light_z
// @static_param: n4_power
// @static_param: n4_view_x
// @static_param: n4_view_y
// @static_param: n4_view_z
// @static_param: n5_amount
// @static_param: n5_mode
// @input_access: src_0 gather_texel
// @precision_critical: src_0
struct Params {
    n0_z_scale: f32,
    n0_aspect: f32,
    n0_coord_space: u32,
    n1_color_y_low_x: f32,
    n1_color_y_low_y: f32,
    n1_color_y_low_z: f32,
    n1_color_y_low_w: f32,
    n1_color_y_high_x: f32,
    n1_color_y_high_y: f32,
    n1_color_y_high_z: f32,
    n1_color_y_high_w: f32,
    n1_color_x_low_x: f32,
    n1_color_x_low_y: f32,
    n1_color_x_low_z: f32,
    n1_color_x_low_w: f32,
    n1_color_x_high_x: f32,
    n1_color_x_high_y: f32,
    n1_color_x_high_z: f32,
    n1_color_x_high_w: f32,
    n2_view_x: f32,
    n2_view_y: f32,
    n2_view_z: f32,
    n2_power: f32,
    n2_color_x: f32,
    n2_color_y: f32,
    n2_color_z: f32,
    n2_color_w: f32,
    n3_amount: f32,
    n3_mode: u32,
    n4_light_x: f32,
    n4_light_y: f32,
    n4_light_z: f32,
    n4_view_x: f32,
    n4_view_y: f32,
    n4_view_z: f32,
    n4_power: f32,
    n4_color_x: f32,
    n4_color_y: f32,
    n4_color_z: f32,
    n4_color_w: f32,
    n5_amount: f32,
    n5_mode: u32,
    _pad0: u32,
    _pad1: u32,
}

@group(0) @binding(0) var<uniform> params: Params;
@group(0) @binding(1) var src_0: texture_2d<f32>;
@group(0) @binding(2) var dst_0: texture_storage_2d<rgba16float, write>;
@group(0) @binding(3) var dst_1: texture_storage_2d<rgba16float, write>;

fn overlay_channel(a: f32, b: f32) -> f32 {
    if a < 0.5 {
        return 2.0 * a * b;
    }
    return 1.0 - 2.0 * (1.0 - a) * (1.0 - b);
}

fn safe_div(a: f32, b: f32) -> f32 {
    if abs(b) < 1.0e-6 {
        return 0.0;
    }
    return a / b;
}

fn blend_rgb(a: vec3<f32>, b: vec3<f32>, mode: u32) -> vec3<f32> {
    switch mode {
        case 0u: { return b; }
        case 1u: { return 1.0 - (1.0 - a) * (1.0 - b); }
        case 2u: { return a + b; }
        case 3u: { return max(a, b); }
        case 4u: { return a * b; }
        case 5u: { return abs(a - b); }
        case 6u: {
            return vec3<f32>(
                overlay_channel(a.x, b.x),
                overlay_channel(a.y, b.y),
                overlay_channel(a.z, b.z),
            );
        }
        case 7u: {
            return vec3<f32>(safe_div(a.x, b.x), safe_div(a.y, b.y), safe_div(a.z, b.z));
        }
        default: { return b; }
    }
}

fn n0_body(tex_in: texture_2d<f32>, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, z_scale: f32, aspect: f32, coord_space: u32) -> vec4<f32> {
    let dims_i = vec2<i32>(dims);
    let max_c = dims_i - vec2<i32>(1, 1);
    let c = vec2<i32>(uv * dims);

    let cL = clamp(c - vec2<i32>(1, 0), vec2<i32>(0, 0), max_c);
    let cR = clamp(c + vec2<i32>(1, 0), vec2<i32>(0, 0), max_c);
    let cD = clamp(c - vec2<i32>(0, 1), vec2<i32>(0, 0), max_c);
    let cU = clamp(c + vec2<i32>(0, 1), vec2<i32>(0, 0), max_c);

    let hL = textureLoad(tex_in, cL, 0).r;
    let hR = textureLoad(tex_in, cR, 0).r;
    let hD = textureLoad(tex_in, cD, 0).r;
    let hU = textureLoad(tex_in, cU, 0).r;
    let gx = (hR - hL) * 0.5;
    let gy = (hU - hD) * 0.5 * aspect;
    let z = max(z_scale, 1e-4);

    var n: vec3<f32>;
    if coord_space == 1u {
        n = normalize(vec3<f32>(-gx, z, -gy));
    } else {
        n = normalize(vec3<f32>(-gx, -gy, z));
    }
    return vec4<f32>(n, 1.0);
}

fn n1_body(
    c_normal: vec4<f32>,
    uv: vec2<f32>,
    dims: vec2<f32>,
    color_y_low: vec4<f32>,
    color_y_high: vec4<f32>,
    color_x_low: vec4<f32>,
    color_x_high: vec4<f32>,
) -> vec4<f32> {
    let n = c_normal.rgb;
    let mc = n.xy * 0.5 + 0.5;
    let base = mix(color_y_low.rgb, color_y_high.rgb, clamp(mc.y, 0.0, 1.0));
    let side = mix(color_x_low.rgb, color_x_high.rgb, clamp(mc.x, 0.0, 1.0));
    let col = (base + side) * 0.5;
    return vec4<f32>(col, 1.0);
}

fn n2_body(
    c_normal: vec4<f32>,
    uv: vec2<f32>,
    dims: vec2<f32>,
    view_x: f32,
    view_y: f32,
    view_z: f32,
    power: f32,
    color: vec4<f32>,
) -> vec4<f32> {
    let n = c_normal.rgb;
    let v = normalize(vec3<f32>(view_x, view_y, view_z) + vec3<f32>(1e-8));
    let face = max(dot(n, v), 0.0);
    let f = pow(1.0 - face, max(power, 1e-4));
    return vec4<f32>(color.rgb * f, f);
}

fn n3_body(a: vec4<f32>, b: vec4<f32>, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, amount: f32, mode: u32) -> vec4<f32> {
    let blended = blend_rgb(a.rgb, b.rgb, mode);
    let out_rgb = mix(a.rgb, blended, amount);
    // Branchless on purpose: an `if` here compiles differently in fused vs
    // standalone kernel contexts (FMA regrouping) and broke the fp32
    // bit-exact proof (precision contract §7.1's "match the exact arithmetic
    // form" gotcha). mix(x, y, 0.0) = x + (y-x)*0.0 = x exactly, so t_a = 0
    // IS alpha pass-through, in the original instruction shape.
    let t_a = select(0.0, amount, mode == 0u);
    let out_a = mix(a.a, b.a, t_a);
    return vec4<f32>(out_rgb, out_a);
}

fn n4_body(
    c_normal: vec4<f32>,
    uv: vec2<f32>,
    dims: vec2<f32>,
    light_x: f32,
    light_y: f32,
    light_z: f32,
    view_x: f32,
    view_y: f32,
    view_z: f32,
    power: f32,
    color: vec4<f32>,
) -> vec4<f32> {
    let n = c_normal.rgb;
    let l = normalize(vec3<f32>(light_x, light_y, light_z) + vec3<f32>(1e-8));
    let v = normalize(vec3<f32>(view_x, view_y, view_z) + vec3<f32>(1e-8));
    let h = normalize(l + v);
    let spec = pow(max(dot(n, h), 0.0), max(power, 1e-4));
    return vec4<f32>(color.rgb * spec, spec);
}

fn n5_body(a: vec4<f32>, b: vec4<f32>, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, amount: f32, mode: u32) -> vec4<f32> {
    let blended = blend_rgb(a.rgb, b.rgb, mode);
    let out_rgb = mix(a.rgb, blended, amount);
    // Branchless on purpose: an `if` here compiles differently in fused vs
    // standalone kernel contexts (FMA regrouping) and broke the fp32
    // bit-exact proof (precision contract §7.1's "match the exact arithmetic
    // form" gotcha). mix(x, y, 0.0) = x + (y-x)*0.0 = x exactly, so t_a = 0
    // IS alpha pass-through, in the original instruction shape.
    let t_a = select(0.0, amount, mode == 0u);
    let out_a = mix(a.a, b.a, t_a);
    return vec4<f32>(out_rgb, out_a);
}

@compute @workgroup_size(16, 16)
fn cs_main(@builtin(global_invocation_id) id: vec3<u32>) {
    let dims = textureDimensions(dst_0);
    if id.x >= dims.x || id.y >= dims.y {
        return;
    }
    let coord = vec2<i32>(i32(id.x), i32(id.y));
    let uv = (vec2<f32>(id.xy) + 0.5) / vec2<f32>(dims);
    let r0 = n0_body(src_0, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n0_z_scale, params.n0_aspect, params.n0_coord_space);
    let r1 = n1_body(r0, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), vec4<f32>(params.n1_color_y_low_x, params.n1_color_y_low_y, params.n1_color_y_low_z, params.n1_color_y_low_w), vec4<f32>(params.n1_color_y_high_x, params.n1_color_y_high_y, params.n1_color_y_high_z, params.n1_color_y_high_w), vec4<f32>(params.n1_color_x_low_x, params.n1_color_x_low_y, params.n1_color_x_low_z, params.n1_color_x_low_w), vec4<f32>(params.n1_color_x_high_x, params.n1_color_x_high_y, params.n1_color_x_high_z, params.n1_color_x_high_w));
    let r2 = n2_body(r0, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n2_view_x, params.n2_view_y, params.n2_view_z, params.n2_power, vec4<f32>(params.n2_color_x, params.n2_color_y, params.n2_color_z, params.n2_color_w));
    let r3 = n3_body(r1, r2, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n3_amount, params.n3_mode);
    let r4 = n4_body(r0, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n4_light_x, params.n4_light_y, params.n4_light_z, params.n4_view_x, params.n4_view_y, params.n4_view_z, params.n4_power, vec4<f32>(params.n4_color_x, params.n4_color_y, params.n4_color_z, params.n4_color_w));
    let r5 = n5_body(r3, r4, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n5_amount, params.n5_mode);
    textureStore(dst_0, coord, r0);
    textureStore(dst_1, coord, r5);
}

=== generator:OilyFluid node:52 ===
// @input_access: src_0 gather
// @input_access: src_1 coincident
struct Params {
    n0_amount: f32,
    _pad0: u32,
    _pad1: u32,
    _pad2: u32,
}

@group(0) @binding(0) var<uniform> params: Params;
@group(0) @binding(1) var src_0: texture_2d<f32>;
@group(0) @binding(2) var src_1: texture_2d<f32>;
@group(0) @binding(3) var samp: sampler;
@group(0) @binding(4) var dst: texture_storage_2d<rgba16float, write>;

fn n0_body(in_tex: texture_2d<f32>, samp: sampler, velocity: vec4<f32>, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, amount: f32) -> vec4<f32> {
    let inv = vec2<f32>(1.0) / dims;
    let v = velocity.rg;
    let off = v * amount * inv;
    let s_r = textureSampleLevel(in_tex, samp, uv - off, 0.0).r;
    let s_c = textureSampleLevel(in_tex, samp, uv, 0.0);
    let s_b = textureSampleLevel(in_tex, samp, uv + off, 0.0).b;
    return vec4<f32>(s_r, s_c.g, s_b, s_c.a);
}

fn n1_body(c: vec4<f32>, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>) -> vec4<f32> {
    return vec4<f32>(abs(c.r), abs(c.g), abs(c.b), c.a);
}

@compute @workgroup_size(16, 16)
fn cs_main(@builtin(global_invocation_id) id: vec3<u32>) {
    let dims = textureDimensions(dst);
    if id.x >= dims.x || id.y >= dims.y {
        return;
    }
    let coord = vec2<i32>(i32(id.x), i32(id.y));
    let uv = (vec2<f32>(id.xy) + 0.5) / vec2<f32>(dims);
    let ext_1 = textureLoad(src_1, coord, 0);
    let r0 = n0_body(src_0, samp, ext_1, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n0_amount);
    let r1 = n1_body(r0, uv, vec2<f32>(dims));
    textureStore(dst, coord, r1);
}

=== generator:OilyFluid node:53 ===
// @static_param: n0_aspect
// @static_param: n0_coord_space
// @static_param: n0_z_scale
// @static_param: n1_ambient
// @static_param: n1_light_x
// @static_param: n1_light_y
// @static_param: n1_light_z
// @input_access: src_0 gather_texel
// @precision_critical: src_0
struct Params {
    n0_z_scale: f32,
    n0_aspect: f32,
    n0_coord_space: u32,
    n1_light_x: f32,
    n1_light_y: f32,
    n1_light_z: f32,
    n1_ambient: f32,
    _pad0: u32,
}

@group(0) @binding(0) var<uniform> params: Params;
@group(0) @binding(1) var src_0: texture_2d<f32>;
@group(0) @binding(2) var dst: texture_storage_2d<rgba16float, write>;

fn n0_body(tex_in: texture_2d<f32>, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, z_scale: f32, aspect: f32, coord_space: u32) -> vec4<f32> {
    let dims_i = vec2<i32>(dims);
    let max_c = dims_i - vec2<i32>(1, 1);
    let c = vec2<i32>(uv * dims);

    let cL = clamp(c - vec2<i32>(1, 0), vec2<i32>(0, 0), max_c);
    let cR = clamp(c + vec2<i32>(1, 0), vec2<i32>(0, 0), max_c);
    let cD = clamp(c - vec2<i32>(0, 1), vec2<i32>(0, 0), max_c);
    let cU = clamp(c + vec2<i32>(0, 1), vec2<i32>(0, 0), max_c);

    let hL = textureLoad(tex_in, cL, 0).r;
    let hR = textureLoad(tex_in, cR, 0).r;
    let hD = textureLoad(tex_in, cD, 0).r;
    let hU = textureLoad(tex_in, cU, 0).r;
    let gx = (hR - hL) * 0.5;
    let gy = (hU - hD) * 0.5 * aspect;
    let z = max(z_scale, 1e-4);

    var n: vec3<f32>;
    if coord_space == 1u {
        n = normalize(vec3<f32>(-gx, z, -gy));
    } else {
        n = normalize(vec3<f32>(-gx, -gy, z));
    }
    return vec4<f32>(n, 1.0);
}

fn n1_body(n_color: vec4<f32>, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, light_x: f32, light_y: f32, light_z: f32, ambient: f32) -> vec4<f32> {
    let n = n_color.rgb;
    let l = normalize(vec3<f32>(light_x, light_y, light_z) + vec3<f32>(1e-8));
    let lambert = max(dot(n, l), 0.0);
    let lit = lambert * (1.0 - ambient) + ambient;
    return vec4<f32>(vec3<f32>(lit), 1.0);
}

@compute @workgroup_size(16, 16)
fn cs_main(@builtin(global_invocation_id) id: vec3<u32>) {
    let dims = textureDimensions(dst);
    if id.x >= dims.x || id.y >= dims.y {
        return;
    }
    let coord = vec2<i32>(i32(id.x), i32(id.y));
    let uv = (vec2<f32>(id.xy) + 0.5) / vec2<f32>(dims);
    let r0 = n0_body(src_0, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n0_z_scale, params.n0_aspect, params.n0_coord_space);
    let r1 = n1_body(r0, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n1_light_x, params.n1_light_y, params.n1_light_z, params.n1_ambient);
    textureStore(dst, coord, r1);
}

=== generator:OilyFluid node:54 ===
// @static_param: n0_dt
// @static_param: n0_steps
// @static_param: n1_high
// @static_param: n1_low
// @input_access: src_0 gather
// @input_access: src_1 gather
struct Params {
    n0_steps: i32,
    n0_dt: f32,
    n1_low: f32,
    n1_high: f32,
}

@group(0) @binding(0) var<uniform> params: Params;
@group(0) @binding(1) var src_0: texture_2d<f32>;
@group(0) @binding(2) var src_1: texture_2d<f32>;
@group(0) @binding(3) var samp: sampler;
@group(0) @binding(4) var dst: texture_storage_2d<rgba16float, write>;

fn n0_body(tex_source: texture_2d<f32>, s_source: sampler, tex_velocity: texture_2d<f32>, s_velocity: sampler, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, steps: i32, dt: f32) -> vec4<f32> {
    let inv = vec2<f32>(1.0) / dims;
    let step_uv = dt * inv;
    let n = min(u32(steps), 64u);

    var sum: f32 = textureSampleLevel(tex_source, s_source, uv, 0.0).r;
    var w_total: f32 = 1.0;
    let inv_steps = 1.0 / f32(max(n, 1u));

    var walker = uv;
    for (var i: u32 = 1u; i <= n; i = i + 1u) {
        let v = textureSampleLevel(tex_velocity, s_velocity, walker, 0.0).rg;
        let vn = v / max(length(v), 1e-4);
        walker = walker + vn * step_uv;
        let w = 1.0 - f32(i) * inv_steps;
        sum = sum + textureSampleLevel(tex_source, s_source, walker, 0.0).r * w;
        w_total = w_total + w;
    }

    walker = uv;
    for (var i: u32 = 1u; i <= n; i = i + 1u) {
        let v = textureSampleLevel(tex_velocity, s_velocity, walker, 0.0).rg;
        let vn = v / max(length(v), 1e-4);
        walker = walker - vn * step_uv;
        let w = 1.0 - f32(i) * inv_steps;
        sum = sum + textureSampleLevel(tex_source, s_source, walker, 0.0).r * w;
        w_total = w_total + w;
    }

    let acc = sum / max(w_total, 1e-4);
    return vec4<f32>(acc, 0.0, 0.0, 1.0);
}

fn n1_body(c: vec4<f32>, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, low: f32, high: f32) -> vec4<f32> {
    return vec4<f32>(
        smoothstep(low, high, c.r),
        smoothstep(low, high, c.g),
        smoothstep(low, high, c.b),
        c.a,
    );
}

@compute @workgroup_size(16, 16)
fn cs_main(@builtin(global_invocation_id) id: vec3<u32>) {
    let dims = textureDimensions(dst);
    if id.x >= dims.x || id.y >= dims.y {
        return;
    }
    let coord = vec2<i32>(i32(id.x), i32(id.y));
    let uv = (vec2<f32>(id.xy) + 0.5) / vec2<f32>(dims);
    let r0 = n0_body(src_0, samp, src_1, samp, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n0_steps, params.n0_dt);
    let r1 = n1_body(r0, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n1_low, params.n1_high);
    textureStore(dst, coord, r1);
}

=== generator:OilyFluid node:55 ===
// @static_param: n2_saturation
// @static_param: n2_value
// @static_param: n4_max
// @static_param: n4_min
// @input_access: src_0 coincident
struct Params {
    n0_gain: f32,
    n1_saturation: f32,
    n2_hue: f32,
    n2_saturation: f32,
    n2_value: f32,
    n3_contrast: f32,
    n4_min: f32,
    n4_max: f32,
}

@group(0) @binding(0) var<uniform> params: Params;
@group(0) @binding(1) var src_0: texture_2d<f32>;
@group(0) @binding(2) var dst: texture_storage_2d<rgba16float, write>;

fn rgb2hsv(c: vec3<f32>) -> vec3<f32> {
    let K = vec4<f32>(0.0, -1.0 / 3.0, 2.0 / 3.0, -1.0);
    let p = mix(vec4<f32>(c.b, c.g, K.w, K.z), vec4<f32>(c.g, c.b, K.x, K.y), step(c.b, c.g));
    let q = mix(vec4<f32>(p.x, p.y, p.w, c.r), vec4<f32>(c.r, p.y, p.z, p.x), step(p.x, c.r));
    let d = q.x - min(q.w, q.y);
    let e = 1.0e-10;
    return vec3<f32>(abs(q.z + (q.w - q.y) / (6.0 * d + e)), d / (q.x + e), q.x);
}

fn hsv2rgb(c: vec3<f32>) -> vec3<f32> {
    let K = vec4<f32>(1.0, 2.0 / 3.0, 1.0 / 3.0, 3.0);
    let p = abs(fract(vec3<f32>(c.x, c.x, c.x) + K.xyz) * 6.0 - K.www);
    return c.z * mix(K.xxx, clamp(p - K.xxx, vec3<f32>(0.0), vec3<f32>(1.0)), c.y);
}

fn n0_body(c: vec4<f32>, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, gain: f32) -> vec4<f32> {
    return vec4<f32>(c.rgb * gain, c.a);
}

fn n1_body(c: vec4<f32>, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, saturation: f32) -> vec4<f32> {
    let luma = dot(c.rgb, vec3<f32>(0.2126, 0.7152, 0.0722));
    return vec4<f32>(mix(vec3<f32>(luma), c.rgb, saturation), c.a);
}

fn n2_body(c: vec4<f32>, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, hue: f32, saturation: f32, value: f32) -> vec4<f32> {
    var hsv = rgb2hsv(max(c.rgb, vec3<f32>(0.0)));
    hsv.x = fract(hsv.x + hue / 360.0);
    hsv.y = clamp(hsv.y * saturation, 0.0, 1.0);
    hsv.z = hsv.z * value;
    return vec4<f32>(hsv2rgb(hsv), c.a);
}

fn n3_body(c: vec4<f32>, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, contrast: f32) -> vec4<f32> {
    return vec4<f32>((c.rgb - vec3<f32>(0.5)) * contrast + vec3<f32>(0.5), c.a);
}

fn n4_body(c: vec4<f32>, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, min_v: f32, max_v: f32) -> vec4<f32> {
    return vec4<f32>(clamp(c.rgb, vec3<f32>(min_v), vec3<f32>(max_v)), c.a);
}

@compute @workgroup_size(16, 16)
fn cs_main(@builtin(global_invocation_id) id: vec3<u32>) {
    let dims = textureDimensions(dst);
    if id.x >= dims.x || id.y >= dims.y {
        return;
    }
    let coord = vec2<i32>(i32(id.x), i32(id.y));
    let uv = (vec2<f32>(id.xy) + 0.5) / vec2<f32>(dims);
    let ext_0 = textureLoad(src_0, coord, 0);
    let r0 = n0_body(ext_0, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n0_gain);
    let r1 = n1_body(r0, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n1_saturation);
    let r2 = n2_body(r1, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n2_hue, params.n2_saturation, params.n2_value);
    let r3 = n3_body(r2, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n3_contrast);
    let r4 = n4_body(r3, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n4_min, params.n4_max);
    textureStore(dst, coord, r4);
}

=== generator:ParticleText node:5 ===
// @reset_gated
// FluidSim2D seed pattern — open family.
// Writes particle positions directly into the aliased Array<Particle>
// based on `pattern` (0-6). Bit-equivalent to the legacy fluid_seed.wgsl.
// Adding an 8th pattern: append a `case` to the switch.
//
// Patterns (legacy):
//   0 — CLT Gaussian center cluster (spread 0.052)
//   1 — Horizontal lines (6 lines)
//   2 — Vertical lines (6 lines)
//   3 — Concentric rings (3 rings, radii 0.1/0.2/0.3)
//   4 — Diagonal cross
//   5 — Archimedean spiral (4 turns, max r=0.4)
//   6 — Edge ring (r=0.45)
//
// For i >= active_count: held dead at the centre nozzle (life=0).
// The downstream array_feedback copies this seed buffer into its
// state.prev on first allocation and on reset_trigger edge.

struct Particle {
    position: vec3<f32>,
    velocity: vec3<f32>,
    life: f32,
    age: f32,
    color: vec4<f32>,
};

struct U {
    pattern: u32,
    trigger_count: u32,
    active_count: u32,
    _pad0: u32,
};

@group(0) @binding(0) var<uniform> u: U;
@group(0) @binding(1) var<storage, read_write> particles: array<Particle>;

const TAU: f32 = 6.28318530718;

fn wang_hash(seed_in: u32) -> u32 {
    var seed = seed_in;
    seed = (seed ^ 61u) ^ (seed >> 16u);
    seed = seed * 9u;
    seed = seed ^ (seed >> 4u);
    seed = seed * 0x27d4eb2du;
    seed = seed ^ (seed >> 15u);
    return seed;
}

fn hash_float(seed: u32) -> f32 {
    return f32(wang_hash(seed)) / 4294967296.0;
}

fn hash_float2(seed: u32) -> vec2<f32> {
    let h1 = wang_hash(seed);
    let h2 = wang_hash(h1);
    return vec2<f32>(f32(h1), f32(h2)) / 4294967296.0;
}

@compute @workgroup_size(256, 1, 1)
fn cs_main(@builtin(global_invocation_id) id: vec3<u32>) {
    let i = id.x;
    if i >= arrayLength(&particles) {
        return;
    }

    var p: Particle;
    p.velocity = vec3<f32>(0.0);
    p.age = -1.0;
    p.color = vec4<f32>(0.005, 0.005, 0.005, 1.0);

    // Excess particles: held dead at the centre nozzle, slight
    // random radial scatter so they don't all sit on one pixel.
    if i >= u.active_count {
        let spread_hash_a = f32(wang_hash(i * 1664525u + 12345u)) / 4294967296.0;
        let spread_hash_b = f32(wang_hash(wang_hash(i * 1664525u + 12345u))) / 4294967296.0;
        let spread_r = spread_hash_a * 0.05;
        let spread_a = spread_hash_b * 6.28318;
        p.position = vec3<f32>(
            0.5 + cos(spread_a) * spread_r,
            0.5 + sin(spread_a) * spread_r,
            0.0,
        );
        p.life = 0.0;
        particles[i] = p;
        return;
    }

    let seed = i * 1664525u + u.trigger_count * 747796405u;
    var x: f32;
    var y: f32;

    switch u.pattern {
        case 0u: {
            // CLT Gaussian centre cluster — sum of 4 uniform hashes.
            var sx = 0.0;
            var sy = 0.0;
            var s = seed;
            for (var j = 0; j < 4; j++) {
                let h = hash_float2(s);
                sx += h.x;
                sy += h.y;
                s = wang_hash(s);
            }
            x = 0.5 + (sx - 2.0) * 0.052;
            y = 0.5 + (sy - 2.0) * 0.052;
        }
        case 1u: {
            let line_idx = i % 6u;
            x = hash_float(seed);
            y = (f32(line_idx) + 0.5) / 6.0;
        }
        case 2u: {
            let line_idx = i % 6u;
            x = (f32(line_idx) + 0.5) / 6.0;
            y = hash_float(seed);
        }
        case 3u: {
            let ring_idx = i % 3u;
            let angle = hash_float(seed) * TAU;
            let radius = 0.1 + f32(ring_idx) * 0.1;
            x = 0.5 + cos(angle) * radius;
            y = 0.5 + sin(angle) * radius;
        }
        case 4u: {
            let t = hash_float(seed);
            let spread = hash_float(seed + 1u) * 0.03;
            if (i & 1u) != 0u {
                x = t + spread;
                y = t - spread;
            } else {
                x = t + spread;
                y = (1.0 - t) - spread;
            }
        }
        case 5u: {
            let norm = f32(i) / f32(u.active_count);
            let angle = norm * 4.0 * TAU;
            let radius = norm * 0.4;
            let spread = hash_float(seed) * 0.015;
            x = 0.5 + cos(angle) * (radius + spread);
            y = 0.5 + sin(angle) * (radius + spread);
        }
        case 6u: {
            let angle = hash_float(seed) * TAU;
            let spread = (hash_float(seed + 1u) - 0.5) * 0.03;
            x = 0.5 + cos(angle) * (0.45 + spread);
            y = 0.5 + sin(angle) * (0.45 + spread);
        }
        default: {
            let pos = hash_float2(seed);
            x = pos.x;
            y = pos.y;
        }
    }

    p.position = vec3<f32>(fract(x + 1.0), fract(y + 1.0), 0.0);
    p.life = 1.0;
    particles[i] = p;
}

=== generator:ParticleText node:67 ===
// @static_param: n0_channel
// @static_param: n0_scale_mode
// @static_param: n0_wrap_mode
// @static_param: n1_angle
// @input_access: src_0 gather_texel
// @precision_critical: src_0
struct Params {
    n0_channel: u32,
    n0_scale_mode: u32,
    n0_wrap_mode: u32,
    n1_angle: f32,
    n2_gain: f32,
    _pad0: u32,
    _pad1: u32,
    _pad2: u32,
}

@group(0) @binding(0) var<uniform> params: Params;
@group(0) @binding(1) var src_0: texture_2d<f32>;
@group(0) @binding(2) var dst: texture_storage_2d<rgba16float, write>;

fn gcd_select_channel(c: vec4<f32>, idx: u32) -> f32 {
    switch idx {
        case 0u: { return c.r; }
        case 1u: { return c.g; }
        case 2u: { return c.b; }
        default: { return c.a; }
    }
}

// Resolve a neighbour texel index per `wrap_mode`: 0 (Clamp) clamps to the
// texture bounds — the ClampToEdge-sampler equivalent, exact because the
// offset is always precisely one texel from a fragment sampled at its own
// texel center. 1 (Repeat) modulo-wraps the index — the Repeat-address-
// sampler equivalent, exact for the same reason (a periodic sampler wrap at
// an exact one-texel-out-of-range UV lands on the exact opposite-edge texel
// center, identical to wrapping the integer index).

fn gcd_wrap_coord(c: vec2<i32>, dims_i: vec2<i32>, wrap_mode: u32) -> vec2<i32> {
    if wrap_mode == 1u {
        return ((c % dims_i) + dims_i) % dims_i;
    }
    return clamp(c, vec2<i32>(0, 0), dims_i - vec2<i32>(1, 1));
}

fn n0_body(in_tex: texture_2d<f32>, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, channel: u32, scale_mode: u32, wrap_mode: u32) -> vec4<f32> {
    let dims_i = vec2<i32>(dims);
    let c = vec2<i32>(uv * dims);

    let cL = textureLoad(in_tex, gcd_wrap_coord(c - vec2<i32>(1, 0), dims_i, wrap_mode), 0);
    let cR = textureLoad(in_tex, gcd_wrap_coord(c + vec2<i32>(1, 0), dims_i, wrap_mode), 0);
    let cD = textureLoad(in_tex, gcd_wrap_coord(c - vec2<i32>(0, 1), dims_i, wrap_mode), 0);
    let cU = textureLoad(in_tex, gcd_wrap_coord(c + vec2<i32>(0, 1), dims_i, wrap_mode), 0);

    let diff_x = gcd_select_channel(cR, channel) - gcd_select_channel(cL, channel);
    let diff_y = gcd_select_channel(cU, channel) - gcd_select_channel(cD, channel);

    let scale_xy = select(
        vec2<f32>(0.5, 0.5),
        vec2<f32>(dims.x * 0.5, dims.y * 0.5),
        scale_mode == 1u,
    );
    let dx = diff_x * scale_xy.x;
    let dy = diff_y * scale_xy.y;

    return vec4<f32>(dx, dy, 0.0, 1.0);
}

fn n1_body(c_in: vec4<f32>, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, angle: f32) -> vec4<f32> {
    let v = c_in.rg;
    let cos_a = cos(angle);
    let sin_a = sin(angle);
    let r = vec2<f32>(
        v.x * cos_a - v.y * sin_a,
        v.x * sin_a + v.y * cos_a,
    );
    return vec4<f32>(r, 0.0, 1.0);
}

fn n2_body(c: vec4<f32>, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, gain: f32) -> vec4<f32> {
    return vec4<f32>(c.rgb * gain, c.a);
}

@compute @workgroup_size(16, 16)
fn cs_main(@builtin(global_invocation_id) id: vec3<u32>) {
    let dims = textureDimensions(dst);
    if id.x >= dims.x || id.y >= dims.y {
        return;
    }
    let coord = vec2<i32>(i32(id.x), i32(id.y));
    let uv = (vec2<f32>(id.xy) + 0.5) / vec2<f32>(dims);
    let r0 = n0_body(src_0, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n0_channel, params.n0_scale_mode, params.n0_wrap_mode);
    let r1 = n1_body(r0, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n1_angle);
    let r2 = n2_body(r1, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n2_gain);
    textureStore(dst, coord, r2);
}

=== generator:ParticleText node:68 ===
struct Element {
    position: vec3<f32>,
    velocity: vec3<f32>,
    life: f32,
    age: f32,
    color: vec4<f32>,
}

struct Element2 {
    x: f32,
    y: f32,
}

struct Params {
    n0_strength: f32,
    n0_active_count: i32,
    n1_active_count: i32,
    n2_amplitude: f32,
    n2_modulator_gain: f32,
    n2_z: f32,
    n2_noise_scale: f32,
    n2_active_count: i32,
    n3_active_count: i32,
    n3_speed: f32,
    n4_active_count: i32,
    n0_frame_count: u32,
    n3_dt_scaled: f32,
    _pad0: u32,
    _pad1: u32,
    _pad2: u32,
}

// @derived_uniform_member: n0_frame_count words=1 node.anti_clump_particles
// @derived_uniform_member: n3_dt_scaled words=1 node.move_particles
@group(0) @binding(0) var<uniform> params: Params;
@group(0) @binding(1) var<storage, read_write> src_0: array<Element>;
@group(0) @binding(2) var src_1: texture_2d<f32>;
@group(0) @binding(3) var src_2: texture_2d<f32>;
@group(0) @binding(4) var samp: sampler;
// @dispatch_count_param: n0_active_count

const SNF_SIMPLEX_GRAD2_X: array<f32, 8> = array<f32, 8>(
     1.0,  0.7071,  0.0, -0.7071,
    -1.0, -0.7071,  0.0,  0.7071
);
const SNF_SIMPLEX_GRAD2_Y: array<f32, 8> = array<f32, 8>(
     0.0,  0.7071,  1.0,  0.7071,
     0.0, -0.7071, -1.0, -0.7071
);

fn acp_wang_hash(seed_in: u32) -> u32 {
    var seed = seed_in;
    seed = (seed ^ 61u) ^ (seed >> 16u);
    seed = seed * 9u;
    seed = seed ^ (seed >> 4u);
    seed = seed * 0x27d4eb2du;
    seed = seed ^ (seed >> 15u);
    return seed;
}

fn acp_hash_float2(seed: u32) -> vec2<f32> {
    let h1 = acp_wang_hash(seed);
    let h2 = acp_wang_hash(h1);
    return vec2<f32>(f32(h1), f32(h2)) / 4294967296.0;
}

fn snf_wang_hash(seed_in: u32) -> u32 {
    var seed = seed_in;
    seed = (seed ^ 61u) ^ (seed >> 16u);
    seed = seed * 9u;
    seed = seed ^ (seed >> 4u);
    seed = seed * 0x27d4eb2du;
    seed = seed ^ (seed >> 15u);
    return seed;
}

fn snf_simplex_noise_2d(v: vec2<f32>) -> f32 {
    let F2: f32 = 0.36602540378;
    let G2: f32 = 0.21132486540;

    let s = (v.x + v.y) * F2;
    let i = floor(v + s);
    let t = (i.x + i.y) * G2;
    let x0 = v - (i - t);

    let i1 = select(vec2<f32>(0.0, 1.0), vec2<f32>(1.0, 0.0), x0.x > x0.y);
    let x1 = x0 - i1 + G2;
    let x2 = x0 - 1.0 + 2.0 * G2;

    let h0 = snf_wang_hash(u32(i.x + 10000.0) * 73856093u ^ u32(i.y + 10000.0) * 19349663u);
    let h1 = snf_wang_hash(u32(i.x + i1.x + 10000.0) * 73856093u ^ u32(i.y + i1.y + 10000.0) * 19349663u);
    let h2 = snf_wang_hash(u32(i.x + 1.0 + 10000.0) * 73856093u ^ u32(i.y + 1.0 + 10000.0) * 19349663u);

    let g0 = vec2<f32>(SNF_SIMPLEX_GRAD2_X[h0 & 7u], SNF_SIMPLEX_GRAD2_Y[h0 & 7u]);
    let g1 = vec2<f32>(SNF_SIMPLEX_GRAD2_X[h1 & 7u], SNF_SIMPLEX_GRAD2_Y[h1 & 7u]);
    let g2 = vec2<f32>(SNF_SIMPLEX_GRAD2_X[h2 & 7u], SNF_SIMPLEX_GRAD2_Y[h2 & 7u]);

    let t0 = 0.5 - dot(x0, x0);
    let t1 = 0.5 - dot(x1, x1);
    let t2 = 0.5 - dot(x2, x2);

    let n0 = select(t0 * t0 * t0 * t0 * dot(g0, x0), 0.0, t0 < 0.0);
    let n1 = select(t1 * t1 * t1 * t1 * dot(g1, x1), 0.0, t1 < 0.0);
    let n2 = select(t2 * t2 * t2 * t2 * dot(g2, x2), 0.0, t2 < 0.0);

    return clamp((n0 + n1 + n2) * 35.0 + 0.5, 0.0, 1.0);
}

fn n0_body(
    idx: u32,
    count: u32,
    e_in: Element,
    tex_strength_modulator: texture_2d<f32>,
    samp: sampler,
    strength: f32,
    active_count: i32,
    frame_count: u32,
    use_strength_modulator: u32,
) -> Element {
    var p = e_in;
    if strength <= 0.0 {
        return p;
    }
    if p.life <= 0.0 {
        return p;
    }

    let uv = vec2<f32>(p.position.x, p.position.y);
    var weight: f32 = 1.0;
    if use_strength_modulator != 0u {
        let m = textureSampleLevel(tex_strength_modulator, samp, uv, 0.0).r;
        weight = m / (1.0 + m);
    }

    let seed = idx * 1664525u + frame_count * 747796405u;
    let kick = (acp_hash_float2(seed) - 0.5) * strength * weight;

    p.position = vec3<f32>(p.position.x + kick.x, p.position.y + kick.y, 0.0);
    return p;
}

fn n1_body(
    idx: u32,
    count: u32,
    e_particles: Element,
    tex_in: texture_2d<f32>,
    samp: sampler,
    active_count: i32,
) -> Element2 {
    let uv = vec2<f32>(e_particles.position.x, e_particles.position.y);
    let sample = textureSampleLevel(tex_in, samp, uv, 0.0);
    return Element2(sample.x, sample.y);
}

fn n2_body(
    idx: u32,
    count: u32,
    e_in: Element2,
    e_particles: Element,
    tex_amplitude_modulator: texture_2d<f32>,
    samp: sampler,
    amplitude: f32,
    modulator_gain: f32,
    z: f32,
    noise_scale: f32,
    active_count: i32,
    use_amplitude_modulator: u32,
) -> Element2 {
    if e_particles.life <= 0.0 {
        return e_in;
    }

    let uv = vec2<f32>(e_particles.position.x, e_particles.position.y);
    var local_amp = amplitude;
    if use_amplitude_modulator != 0u {
        let m = textureSampleLevel(tex_amplitude_modulator, samp, uv, 0.0).r;
        let capped = m / (1.0 + m);
        local_amp = amplitude * (1.0 + capped * modulator_gain);
    }

    let noise_uv = uv * noise_scale + z;
    let n_x = snf_simplex_noise_2d(noise_uv);
    let n_y = snf_simplex_noise_2d(noise_uv + 100.0);
    let noise_force = (vec2<f32>(n_x, n_y) - 0.5) * 2.0 * local_amp;

    return Element2(e_in.x + noise_force.x, e_in.y + noise_force.y);
}

fn n3_body(
    idx: u32,
    count: u32,
    e_in: Element,
    e_forces: Element2,
    active_count: i32,
    speed: f32,
    dt_scaled: f32,
) -> Element {
    var p = e_in;
    if p.life <= 0.0 {
        return p;
    }
    let step = vec2<f32>(e_forces.x, e_forces.y) * speed * dt_scaled;
    p.position = vec3<f32>(p.position.x + step.x, p.position.y + step.y, 0.0);
    return p;
}

fn n4_body(idx: u32, count: u32, e_in: Element, active_count: i32) -> Element {
    var p = e_in;
    if p.life <= 0.0 {
        return p;
    }
    p.position = vec3<f32>(
        fract(p.position.x + 1.0),
        fract(p.position.y + 1.0),
        0.0,
    );
    return p;
}

@compute @workgroup_size(256)
fn cs_main(@builtin(global_invocation_id) gid: vec3<u32>) {
    let idx = gid.x;
    let count = arrayLength(&src_0);
    if idx >= count {
        return;
    }
    if idx >= u32(max(params.n0_active_count, 0)) {
        return;
    }
    let e_0 = src_0[idx];
    let r0 = n0_body(idx, count, e_0, src_1, samp, params.n0_strength, params.n0_active_count, params.n0_frame_count, 1u);
    let r1 = n1_body(idx, count, e_0, src_2, samp, params.n1_active_count);
    let r2 = n2_body(idx, count, r1, e_0, src_1, samp, params.n2_amplitude, params.n2_modulator_gain, params.n2_z, params.n2_noise_scale, params.n2_active_count, 1u);
    let r3 = n3_body(idx, count, r0, r2, params.n3_active_count, params.n3_speed, params.n3_dt_scaled);
    let r4 = n4_body(idx, count, r3, params.n4_active_count);
    src_0[idx] = r4;
}

=== generator:ParticleText node:69 ===
// @static_param: n0_rotation
// @static_param: n0_translate_x
// @static_param: n0_translate_y
// @static_param: n1_curve
// @static_param: n2_row0_w
// @static_param: n2_row0_x
// @static_param: n2_row0_y
// @static_param: n2_row0_z
// @static_param: n2_row1_w
// @static_param: n2_row1_x
// @static_param: n2_row1_y
// @static_param: n2_row1_z
// @static_param: n2_row2_w
// @static_param: n2_row2_x
// @static_param: n2_row2_y
// @static_param: n2_row2_z
// @static_param: n2_row3_w
// @static_param: n2_row3_x
// @static_param: n2_row3_y
// @static_param: n2_row3_z
// @input_access: src_0 gather
struct Params {
    n0_translate_x: f32,
    n0_translate_y: f32,
    n0_scale: f32,
    n0_rotation: f32,
    n1_intensity: f32,
    n1_contrast: f32,
    n1_curve: u32,
    n2_row0_x: f32,
    n2_row0_y: f32,
    n2_row0_z: f32,
    n2_row0_w: f32,
    n2_row1_x: f32,
    n2_row1_y: f32,
    n2_row1_z: f32,
    n2_row1_w: f32,
    n2_row2_x: f32,
    n2_row2_y: f32,
    n2_row2_z: f32,
    n2_row2_w: f32,
    n2_row3_x: f32,
    n2_row3_y: f32,
    n2_row3_z: f32,
    n2_row3_w: f32,
    _pad0: u32,
}

@group(0) @binding(0) var<uniform> params: Params;
@group(0) @binding(1) var src_0: texture_2d<f32>;
@group(0) @binding(2) var samp: sampler;
@group(0) @binding(3) var dst: texture_storage_2d<rgba16float, write>;

fn n0_body(tex_in: texture_2d<f32>, s_in: sampler, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, translate_x: f32, translate_y: f32, scale: f32, rotation: f32) -> vec4<f32> {
    let aspect_ratio = dims.x / dims.y;
    let rot = -(rotation * 3.14159265358979323846 / 180.0);

    var p = uv - vec2<f32>(0.5, 0.5);

    p.x = p.x * aspect_ratio;

    let cos_r = cos(rot);
    let sin_r = sin(rot);
    p = vec2<f32>(
        p.x * cos_r - p.y * sin_r,
        p.x * sin_r + p.y * cos_r,
    );

    p.x = p.x / aspect_ratio;

    p = p / max(scale, 0.01);
    p = p - vec2<f32>(translate_x, translate_y);
    p = p + vec2<f32>(0.5, 0.5);

    if (p.x < 0.0 || p.x > 1.0 || p.y < 0.0 || p.y > 1.0) {
        return vec4<f32>(0.0, 0.0, 0.0, 0.0);
    }

    return textureSampleLevel(tex_in, s_in, p, 0.0);
}

fn n1_body(c: vec4<f32>, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, intensity: f32, contrast: f32, curve: u32) -> vec4<f32> {
    let x = c.rgb * intensity * contrast;
    var mapped: vec3<f32>;
    if curve == 2u {
        mapped = log2(vec3<f32>(1.0) + x) / log2(65.0);
    } else if curve == 1u {
        mapped = x / (x + vec3<f32>(1.0));
    } else {
        mapped = x * (1.0 + x / vec3<f32>(9.0)) / (1.0 + x);
    }
    return vec4<f32>(mapped, c.a);
}

fn n2_body(
    c: vec4<f32>,
    uv: vec2<f32>,
    dims: vec2<f32>,
    row0: vec4<f32>,
    row1: vec4<f32>,
    row2: vec4<f32>,
    row3: vec4<f32>,
) -> vec4<f32> {
    return vec4<f32>(dot(row0, c), dot(row1, c), dot(row2, c), dot(row3, c));
}

@compute @workgroup_size(16, 16)
fn cs_main(@builtin(global_invocation_id) id: vec3<u32>) {
    let dims = textureDimensions(dst);
    if id.x >= dims.x || id.y >= dims.y {
        return;
    }
    let coord = vec2<i32>(i32(id.x), i32(id.y));
    let uv = (vec2<f32>(id.xy) + 0.5) / vec2<f32>(dims);
    let r0 = n0_body(src_0, samp, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n0_translate_x, params.n0_translate_y, params.n0_scale, params.n0_rotation);
    let r1 = n1_body(r0, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n1_intensity, params.n1_contrast, params.n1_curve);
    let r2 = n2_body(r1, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), vec4<f32>(params.n2_row0_x, params.n2_row0_y, params.n2_row0_z, params.n2_row0_w), vec4<f32>(params.n2_row1_x, params.n2_row1_y, params.n2_row1_z, params.n2_row1_w), vec4<f32>(params.n2_row2_x, params.n2_row2_y, params.n2_row2_z, params.n2_row2_w), vec4<f32>(params.n2_row3_x, params.n2_row3_y, params.n2_row3_z, params.n2_row3_w));
    textureStore(dst, coord, r2);
}

=== generator:StarField node:20 ===
// @static_param: n0_jitter
// @static_param: n0_out_scale
// @static_param: n10_mode
// @static_param: n11_offset
// @static_param: n12_row0_w
// @static_param: n12_row0_x
// @static_param: n12_row0_y
// @static_param: n12_row0_z
// @static_param: n12_row1_w
// @static_param: n12_row1_x
// @static_param: n12_row1_y

// @static_param: n12_row2_w
// @static_param: n12_row2_x
// @static_param: n12_row2_y
// @static_param: n12_row2_z
// @static_param: n12_row3_w
// @static_param: n12_row3_x
// @static_param: n12_row3_y
// @static_param: n12_row3_z
// @static_param: n1_row0_w
// @static_param: n1_row0_x
// @static_param: n1_row0_y
// @static_param: n1_row0_z
// @static_param: n1_row1_w
// @static_param: n1_row1_x
// @static_param: n1_row1_y
// @static_param: n1_row1_z
// @static_param: n1_row2_w
// @static_param: n1_row2_x
// @static_param: n1_row2_y
// @static_param: n1_row2_z
// @static_param: n1_row3_w
// @static_param: n1_row3_x
// @static_param: n1_row3_y
// @static_param: n1_row3_z
// @static_param: n2_high
// @static_param: n3_offset
// @static_param: n3_scale
// @static_param: n4_offset

// @static_param: n5_mode
// @static_param: n5_phase
// @static_param: n6_offset
// @static_param: n6_scale
// @static_param: n7_offset
// @static_param: n7_scale
// @static_param: n9_amount
// @static_param: n9_mode
struct Params {
    n0_scale: f32,
    n0_offset_x: f32,
    n0_offset_y: f32,
    n0_jitter: f32,
    n0_out_scale: f32,
    n1_row0_x: f32,
    n1_row0_y: f32,
    n1_row0_z: f32,
    n1_row0_w: f32,
    n1_row1_x: f32,
    n1_row1_y: f32,
    n1_row1_z: f32,
    n1_row1_w: f32,
    n1_row2_x: f32,
    n1_row2_y: f32,
    n1_row2_z: f32,
    n1_row2_w: f32,
    n1_row3_x: f32,
    n1_row3_y: f32,
    n1_row3_z: f32,
    n1_row3_w: f32,
    n2_low: f32,
    n2_high: f32,
    n3_scale: f32,
    n3_offset: f32,
    n4_scale: f32,
    n4_offset: f32,
    n5_freq: f32,
    n5_phase: f32,
    n5_mode: u32,
    n6_scale: f32,
    n6_offset: f32,
    n7_scale: f32,
    n7_offset: f32,
    n8_exponent: f32,
    n9_amount: f32,
    n9_mode: u32,
    n10_amount: f32,
    n10_mode: u32,
    n11_scale: f32,
    n11_offset: f32,
    n12_row0_x: f32,
    n12_row0_y: f32,
    n12_row0_z: f32,
    n12_row0_w: f32,
    n12_row1_x: f32,
    n12_row1_y: f32,
    n12_row1_z: f32,
    n12_row1_w: f32,
    n12_row2_x: f32,
    n12_row2_y: f32,
    n12_row2_z: f32,
    n12_row2_w: f32,
    n12_row3_x: f32,
    n12_row3_y: f32,
    n12_row3_z: f32,
    n12_row3_w: f32,
    _pad0: u32,
    _pad1: u32,
    _pad2: u32,
}

@group(0) @binding(0) var<uniform> params: Params;
@group(0) @binding(1) var dst: texture_storage_2d<rgba16float, write>;

struct N0BodyOutputs {
    out: vec4<f32>,
    cell_id: vec4<f32>,
}


fn wang_hash(seed_in: u32) -> u32 {
    var seed = seed_in;
    seed = (seed ^ 61u) ^ (seed >> 16u);
    seed = seed * 9u;
    seed = seed ^ (seed >> 4u);
    seed = seed * 0x27d4eb2du;
    seed = seed ^ (seed >> 15u);
    return seed;
}

fn voronoi_cell_point(cell: vec2<i32>, jitter: f32) -> vec2<f32> {
    // Two independent hashes for X and Y jitter.
    let hx = wang_hash(u32(cell.x + 10000) * 73856093u ^ u32(cell.y + 10000) * 19349663u);
    let hy = wang_hash(u32(cell.x + 10000) * 83492791u ^ u32(cell.y + 10000) * 28411627u);
    let jx = f32(hx & 0xFFFFu) / 65535.0;
    let jy = f32(hy & 0xFFFFu) / 65535.0;
    return vec2<f32>(cell) + vec2<f32>(0.5, 0.5) + (vec2<f32>(jx, jy) - 0.5) * jitter;
}

fn tt_trig(x: f32, mode: u32) -> f32 {
    if mode == 0u { return sin(x); }
    if mode == 1u { return cos(x); }
    let t = tan(x);
    return clamp(t, -32.0, 32.0);
}

fn overlay_channel(a: f32, b: f32) -> f32 {
    if a < 0.5 {
        return 2.0 * a * b;
    }
    return 1.0 - 2.0 * (1.0 - a) * (1.0 - b);
}

fn safe_div(a: f32, b: f32) -> f32 {
    if abs(b) < 1.0e-6 {
        return 0.0;
    }
    return a / b;
}

fn blend_rgb(a: vec3<f32>, b: vec3<f32>, mode: u32) -> vec3<f32> {
    switch mode {
        case 0u: { return b; }
        case 1u: { return 1.0 - (1.0 - a) * (1.0 - b); }
        case 2u: { return a + b; }
        case 3u: { return max(a, b); }
        case 4u: { return a * b; }
        case 5u: { return abs(a - b); }
        case 6u: {
            return vec3<f32>(
                overlay_channel(a.x, b.x),
                overlay_channel(a.y, b.y),
                overlay_channel(a.z, b.z),
            );
        }
        case 7u: {
            return vec3<f32>(safe_div(a.x, b.x), safe_div(a.y, b.y), safe_div(a.z, b.z));
        }
        default: { return b; }
    }
}

fn n0_body(uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, scale: f32, offset_x: f32, offset_y: f32, jitter: f32, out_scale: f32) -> N0BodyOutputs {
    let p = uv * scale + vec2<f32>(offset_x, offset_y);
    let cell = vec2<i32>(floor(p));

    var f1 = 1e9;
    var f2 = 1e9;
    var f1_cell = cell;
    for (var dy = -1; dy <= 1; dy = dy + 1) {
        for (var dx = -1; dx <= 1; dx = dx + 1) {
            let neighbor = cell + vec2<i32>(dx, dy);
            let fp = voronoi_cell_point(neighbor, jitter);
            let d = length(p - fp);
            if d < f1 {
                f2 = f1;
                f1 = d;
                f1_cell = neighbor;
            } else if d < f2 {
                f2 = d;
            }
        }
    }

    // Per-cell stable random — independent hash mix from the jitter hashes so
    // cell_hash decorrelates from the per-cell jitter offset.
    let cell_hash = f32(wang_hash(
        u32(f1_cell.x + 10000) * 12345701u ^ u32(f1_cell.y + 10000) * 39916801u,
    ) & 0xFFFFu) / 65535.0;

    let r = f1 * out_scale;
    let g = f2 * out_scale;
    let b = (f2 - f1) * out_scale;

    return N0BodyOutputs(
        vec4<f32>(r, g, b, cell_hash),
        vec4<f32>(f32(f1_cell.x), f32(f1_cell.y), 0.0, 1.0),
    );
}

fn n1_body(
    c: vec4<f32>,
    uv: vec2<f32>,
    dims: vec2<f32>,
    row0: vec4<f32>,
    row1: vec4<f32>,
    row2: vec4<f32>,
    row3: vec4<f32>,
) -> vec4<f32> {
    return vec4<f32>(dot(row0, c), dot(row1, c), dot(row2, c), dot(row3, c));
}

fn n2_body(c: vec4<f32>, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, low: f32, high: f32) -> vec4<f32> {
    return vec4<f32>(
        smoothstep(low, high, c.r),
        smoothstep(low, high, c.g),
        smoothstep(low, high, c.b),
        c.a,
    );
}

fn n3_body(c: vec4<f32>, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, scale: f32, offset: f32) -> vec4<f32> {
    return vec4<f32>(
        c.r * scale + offset,
        c.g * scale + offset,
        c.b * scale + offset,
        c.a,
    );
}

fn n4_body(c: vec4<f32>, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, scale: f32, offset: f32) -> vec4<f32> {
    return vec4<f32>(
        c.r * scale + offset,
        c.g * scale + offset,
        c.b * scale + offset,
        c.a,
    );
}

fn n5_body(c_in: vec4<f32>, c_freq_tex: vec4<f32>, c_phase_tex: vec4<f32>, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, freq: f32, phase: f32, mode: u32, use_freq_tex: u32, use_phase_tex: u32) -> vec4<f32> {
    let s = c_in;

    var f = freq;
    if use_freq_tex == 1u {
        f = c_freq_tex.r;
    }
    var p = phase;
    if use_phase_tex == 1u {
        p = c_phase_tex.r;
    }

    return vec4<f32>(
        tt_trig(s.r * f + p, mode),
        tt_trig(s.g * f + p, mode),
        tt_trig(s.b * f + p, mode),
        s.a,
    );
}

fn n6_body(c: vec4<f32>, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, scale: f32, offset: f32) -> vec4<f32> {
    return vec4<f32>(
        c.r * scale + offset,
        c.g * scale + offset,
        c.b * scale + offset,
        c.a,
    );
}

fn n7_body(c: vec4<f32>, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, scale: f32, offset: f32) -> vec4<f32> {
    return vec4<f32>(
        c.r * scale + offset,
        c.g * scale + offset,
        c.b * scale + offset,
        c.a,
    );
}

fn n8_body(c: vec4<f32>, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, exponent: f32) -> vec4<f32> {
    return vec4<f32>(
        pow(max(c.r, 0.0), exponent),
        pow(max(c.g, 0.0), exponent),
        pow(max(c.b, 0.0), exponent),
        c.a,
    );
}

fn n9_body(a: vec4<f32>, b: vec4<f32>, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, amount: f32, mode: u32) -> vec4<f32> {
    let blended = blend_rgb(a.rgb, b.rgb, mode);
    let out_rgb = mix(a.rgb, blended, amount);
    // Branchless on purpose: an `if` here compiles differently in fused vs
    // standalone kernel contexts (FMA regrouping) and broke the fp32
    // bit-exact proof (precision contract §7.1's "match the exact arithmetic
    // form" gotcha). mix(x, y, 0.0) = x + (y-x)*0.0 = x exactly, so t_a = 0
    // IS alpha pass-through, in the original instruction shape.
    let t_a = select(0.0, amount, mode == 0u);
    let out_a = mix(a.a, b.a, t_a);
    return vec4<f32>(out_rgb, out_a);
}

fn n10_body(a: vec4<f32>, b: vec4<f32>, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, amount: f32, mode: u32) -> vec4<f32> {
    let blended = blend_rgb(a.rgb, b.rgb, mode);
    let out_rgb = mix(a.rgb, blended, amount);
    // Branchless on purpose: an `if` here compiles differently in fused vs
    // standalone kernel contexts (FMA regrouping) and broke the fp32
    // bit-exact proof (precision contract §7.1's "match the exact arithmetic
    // form" gotcha). mix(x, y, 0.0) = x + (y-x)*0.0 = x exactly, so t_a = 0
    // IS alpha pass-through, in the original instruction shape.
    let t_a = select(0.0, amount, mode == 0u);
    let out_a = mix(a.a, b.a, t_a);
    return vec4<f32>(out_rgb, out_a);
}

fn n11_body(c: vec4<f32>, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, scale: f32, offset: f32) -> vec4<f32> {
    return vec4<f32>(
        c.r * scale + offset,
        c.g * scale + offset,
        c.b * scale + offset,
        c.a,
    );
}

fn n12_body(
    c: vec4<f32>,
    uv: vec2<f32>,
    dims: vec2<f32>,
    row0: vec4<f32>,
    row1: vec4<f32>,
    row2: vec4<f32>,
    row3: vec4<f32>,
) -> vec4<f32> {
    return vec4<f32>(dot(row0, c), dot(row1, c), dot(row2, c), dot(row3, c));
}

@compute @workgroup_size(16, 16)
fn cs_main(@builtin(global_invocation_id) id: vec3<u32>) {
    let dims = textureDimensions(dst);
    if id.x >= dims.x || id.y >= dims.y {
        return;
    }
    let coord = vec2<i32>(i32(id.x), i32(id.y));
    let uv = (vec2<f32>(id.xy) + 0.5) / vec2<f32>(dims);
    let r0 = n0_body(uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n0_scale, params.n0_offset_x, params.n0_offset_y, params.n0_jitter, params.n0_out_scale);
    let r1 = n1_body(r0.out, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), vec4<f32>(params.n1_row0_x, params.n1_row0_y, params.n1_row0_z, params.n1_row0_w), vec4<f32>(params.n1_row1_x, params.n1_row1_y, params.n1_row1_z, params.n1_row1_w), vec4<f32>(params.n1_row2_x, params.n1_row2_y, params.n1_row2_z, params.n1_row2_w), vec4<f32>(params.n1_row3_x, params.n1_row3_y, params.n1_row3_z, params.n1_row3_w));
    let r2 = n2_body(r1, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n2_low, params.n2_high);
    let r3 = n3_body(r1, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n3_scale, params.n3_offset);
    let r4 = n4_body(r1, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n4_scale, params.n4_offset);
    let r5 = n5_body(r3, vec4<f32>(0.0), r4, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n5_freq, params.n5_phase, params.n5_mode, 0u, 1u);
    let r6 = n6_body(r5, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n6_scale, params.n6_offset);
    let r7 = n7_body(r0.out, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n7_scale, params.n7_offset);
    let r8 = n8_body(r7, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n8_exponent);
    let r9 = n9_body(r8, r2, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n9_amount, params.n9_mode);
    let r10 = n10_body(r9, r6, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n10_amount, params.n10_mode);
    let r11 = n11_body(r10, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n11_scale, params.n11_offset);
    let r12 = n12_body(r11, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), vec4<f32>(params.n12_row0_x, params.n12_row0_y, params.n12_row0_z, params.n12_row0_w), vec4<f32>(params.n12_row1_x, params.n12_row1_y, params.n12_row1_z, params.n12_row1_w), vec4<f32>(params.n12_row2_x, params.n12_row2_y, params.n12_row2_z, params.n12_row2_w), vec4<f32>(params.n12_row3_x, params.n12_row3_y, params.n12_row3_z, params.n12_row3_w));
    textureStore(dst, coord, r12);
}

=== generator:StrangeAttractor node:4 ===
// Strange-attractor simulate kernel — JSON-editable.
//
// Five ODE families (Lorenz / Rössler / Aizawa / Thomas / Halvorsen)
// selected by attractor_type. RK2 midpoint integration, 8 substeps
// per frame. Per-attractor intrinsic constants (centre, scale, base
// timestep) live as const arrays indexed by attractor_type.
//
// Adding a new attractor: append a case to ode(), append entries to
// CENTER_Z / SCALE / BASE_DT, bump the const indices the const arrays
// expect (extend the arrays in lockstep). Increase the outer-card
// `type` slider max.
//
// First-frame init: seed_particles zeroes velocity. We detect this per
// particle via near-zero magnitude, then hash-seed near the attractor
// centre and warm up to converge onto the manifold (with phase stagger
// so particles span the full cycle from frame 1).
//
// NaN / divergence guard: any particle whose 3D state escapes a large
// radius (numerical instability at extreme chaos values) teleports
// back to centre. Replaces the bundled monolith's 50-step escape
// respawn — one comparison per substep instead of an inner loop.

struct Particle {
    position: vec3<f32>,
    velocity: vec3<f32>,
    life: f32,
    age: f32,
    color: vec4<f32>,
};

struct U {
    attractor_type: u32,
    active_count: u32,
    _pad0: u32,
    _pad1: u32,
    chaos: f32,
    cam_angle: f32,
    cam_tilt: f32,
    aspect: f32,
    dt_multiplier: f32,
    uv_scale: f32,
    _pad2: f32,
    _pad3: f32,
};

@group(0) @binding(0) var<uniform> u: U;
@group(0) @binding(1) var<storage, read_write> particles: array<Particle>;

const STEPS_PER_FRAME: i32 = 8;
const SEED_MIN_TIME: f32 = 10.0;
const SEED_WARMUP_MIN: i32 = 50;
const MAX_RADIUS_SQ: f32 = 1.0e6;

fn wang_hash(seed_in: u32) -> u32 {
    var seed = seed_in;
    seed = (seed ^ 61u) ^ (seed >> 16u);
    seed = seed * 9u;
    seed = seed ^ (seed >> 4u);
    seed = seed * 0x27d4eb2du;
    seed = seed ^ (seed >> 15u);
    return seed;
}

fn hash_float3(seed: u32) -> vec3<f32> {
    let h1 = wang_hash(seed);
    let h2 = wang_hash(h1);
    let h3 = wang_hash(h2);
    return vec3<f32>(f32(h1), f32(h2), f32(h3)) / 4294967296.0;
}

fn attractor_center_z(atype: u32) -> f32 {
    switch atype {
        case 0u: { return 25.0; }
        case 1u: { return 2.0; }
        case 2u: { return 0.5; }
        case 3u: { return 0.0; }
        default: { return 0.0; }
    }
}

fn attractor_scale(atype: u32) -> f32 {
    switch atype {
        case 0u: { return 25.0; }
        case 1u: { return 10.0; }
        case 2u: { return 1.2; }
        case 3u: { return 4.0; }
        default: { return 12.0; }
    }
}

fn attractor_base_dt(atype: u32) -> f32 {
    switch atype {
        case 0u: { return 0.003; }
        case 1u: { return 0.008; }
        case 2u: { return 0.008; }
        case 3u: { return 0.03; }
        default: { return 0.004; }
    }
}

fn lorenz(p: vec3<f32>, c: f32) -> vec3<f32> {
    let sigma = 10.0 + c * 4.0;
    let rho = 28.0 + c * 8.0;
    let beta = 2.6667 + c * 0.5;
    return vec3<f32>(sigma * (p.y - p.x), p.x * (rho - p.z) - p.y, p.x * p.y - beta * p.z);
}

fn rossler(p: vec3<f32>, c: f32) -> vec3<f32> {
    let a = 0.2 + c * 0.15;
    let b = 0.2 + c * 0.1;
    let cc = 5.7 + c * 3.0;
    return vec3<f32>(-p.y - p.z, p.x + a * p.y, b + p.z * (p.x - cc));
}

fn aizawa(p: vec3<f32>, c: f32) -> vec3<f32> {
    let a = 0.95 + c * 0.1;
    let b = 0.7 + c * 0.2;
    let d = 3.5 + c * 1.0;
    let e = 0.25;
    let f = 0.1;
    return vec3<f32>(
        (p.z - b) * p.x - d * p.y,
        d * p.x + (p.z - b) * p.y,
        0.6 + a * p.z - (p.z * p.z * p.z) / 3.0
            - (p.x * p.x + p.y * p.y) * (1.0 + e * p.z)
            + f * p.z * p.x * p.x * p.x,
    );
}

fn thomas(p: vec3<f32>, c: f32) -> vec3<f32> {
    let b = 0.208186 - c * 0.05;
    return vec3<f32>(sin(p.y) - b * p.x, sin(p.z) - b * p.y, sin(p.x) - b * p.z);
}

fn halvorsen(p: vec3<f32>, c: f32) -> vec3<f32> {
    let a = 1.89 + c * 0.5;
    return vec3<f32>(
        -a * p.x - 4.0 * p.y - 4.0 * p.z - p.y * p.y,
        -a * p.y - 4.0 * p.z - 4.0 * p.x - p.z * p.z,
        -a * p.z - 4.0 * p.x - 4.0 * p.y - p.x * p.x,
    );
}

fn ode(atype: u32, p: vec3<f32>, c: f32) -> vec3<f32> {
    switch atype {
        case 0u: { return lorenz(p, c); }
        case 1u: { return rossler(p, c); }
        case 2u: { return aizawa(p, c); }
        case 3u: { return thomas(p, c); }
        default: { return halvorsen(p, c); }
    }
}

fn attractor_step(atype: u32, p: vec3<f32>, dt: f32, c: f32) -> vec3<f32> {
    let dp = ode(atype, p, c);
    let mid = p + dp * (dt * 0.5);
    let dp2 = ode(atype, mid, c);
    return p + dp2 * dt;
}

fn project_point(p: vec3<f32>, center: vec3<f32>, scl: f32,
                 cam_angle: f32, tilt: f32, aspect: f32, uv_scale: f32) -> vec2<f32> {
    let q = (p - center) / scl;
    let ca = cos(cam_angle);
    let sa = sin(cam_angle);
    let rx = q.x * ca - q.z * sa;
    let rz_rot = q.x * sa + q.z * ca;
    let ct = cos(tilt);
    let st = sin(tilt);
    let ry = q.y * ct - rz_rot * st;
    let rz = q.y * st + rz_rot * ct;
    let depth = rz + 2.5;
    let persp_scale = 2.0 / (uv_scale * max(depth, 0.3));
    let sx = rx * persp_scale / aspect;
    let sy = ry * persp_scale;
    return vec2<f32>(sx * 0.5 + 0.5, sy * 0.5 + 0.5);
}

@compute @workgroup_size(256, 1, 1)
fn cs_main(@builtin(global_invocation_id) id: vec3<u32>) {
    let i = id.x;
    if i >= u.active_count {
        return;
    }

    let atype = u.attractor_type;
    let center = vec3<f32>(0.0, 0.0, attractor_center_z(atype));
    let scl = attractor_scale(atype);
    let dt = attractor_base_dt(atype) * u.dt_multiplier;

    var p = particles[i];
    var state = p.velocity;

    // First-frame init: seed_particles zeroes velocity. Detect via
    // near-zero magnitude (post-integration state always has |v| > 0).
    if dot(state, state) < 1.0e-12 {
        let seed = i * 1664525u + 747796405u;
        let rnd = hash_float3(seed) * 2.0 - 1.0;
        state = center + rnd * scl * 0.15;

        let warm_dt = dt * 2.0;
        let converge_steps = clamp(i32(SEED_MIN_TIME / warm_dt) + 1, SEED_WARMUP_MIN, 2000);
        let phase_steps = converge_steps * i32(i % 997u) / 997;
        let warmup_steps = min(converge_steps + phase_steps, 4000);
        for (var w = 0; w < warmup_steps; w++) {
            state = attractor_step(atype, state, warm_dt, u.chaos);
        }
    }

    // Per-frame RK2 substeps.
    for (var s = 0; s < STEPS_PER_FRAME; s++) {
        state = attractor_step(atype, state, dt, u.chaos);
        if any(state != state) || dot(state, state) > MAX_RADIUS_SQ {
            state = center;
        }
    }

    p.velocity = state;
    p.position = vec3<f32>(
        project_point(state, center, scl, u.cam_angle, u.cam_tilt, u.aspect, u.uv_scale),
        0.0,
    );
    p.life = 1.0;
    p.color = vec4<f32>(0.005, 0.005, 0.005, 1.0);
    particles[i] = p;
}

=== generator:StrangeAttractor node:20 ===
// @static_param: n0_rotation
// @static_param: n0_translate_x
// @static_param: n0_translate_y
// @static_param: n2_row0_w
// @static_param: n2_row0_x
// @static_param: n2_row0_y
// @static_param: n2_row0_z
// @static_param: n2_row1_w
// @static_param: n2_row1_x
// @static_param: n2_row1_y
// @static_param: n2_row1_z
// @static_param: n2_row2_w
// @static_param: n2_row2_x
// @static_param: n2_row2_y
// @static_param: n2_row2_z
// @static_param: n2_row3_w
// @static_param: n2_row3_x
// @static_param: n2_row3_y
// @static_param: n2_row3_z
// @input_access: src_0 gather
struct Params {
    n0_translate_x: f32,
    n0_translate_y: f32,
    n0_scale: f32,
    n0_rotation: f32,
    n1_intensity: f32,
    n2_row0_x: f32,
    n2_row0_y: f32,
    n2_row0_z: f32,
    n2_row0_w: f32,
    n2_row1_x: f32,
    n2_row1_y: f32,
    n2_row1_z: f32,
    n2_row1_w: f32,
    n2_row2_x: f32,
    n2_row2_y: f32,
    n2_row2_z: f32,
    n2_row2_w: f32,
    n2_row3_x: f32,
    n2_row3_y: f32,
    n2_row3_z: f32,
    n2_row3_w: f32,
    _pad0: u32,
    _pad1: u32,
    _pad2: u32,
}

@group(0) @binding(0) var<uniform> params: Params;
@group(0) @binding(1) var src_0: texture_2d<f32>;
@group(0) @binding(2) var samp: sampler;
@group(0) @binding(3) var dst: texture_storage_2d<rgba16float, write>;

fn n0_body(tex_in: texture_2d<f32>, s_in: sampler, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, translate_x: f32, translate_y: f32, scale: f32, rotation: f32) -> vec4<f32> {
    let aspect_ratio = dims.x / dims.y;
    let rot = -(rotation * 3.14159265358979323846 / 180.0);

    var p = uv - vec2<f32>(0.5, 0.5);

    p.x = p.x * aspect_ratio;

    let cos_r = cos(rot);
    let sin_r = sin(rot);
    p = vec2<f32>(
        p.x * cos_r - p.y * sin_r,
        p.x * sin_r + p.y * cos_r,
    );

    p.x = p.x / aspect_ratio;

    p = p / max(scale, 0.01);
    p = p - vec2<f32>(translate_x, translate_y);
    p = p + vec2<f32>(0.5, 0.5);

    if (p.x < 0.0 || p.x > 1.0 || p.y < 0.0 || p.y > 1.0) {
        return vec4<f32>(0.0, 0.0, 0.0, 0.0);
    }

    return textureSampleLevel(tex_in, s_in, p, 0.0);
}

fn n1_body(c: vec4<f32>, uv: vec2<f32>, dims: vec2<f32>, intensity: f32) -> vec4<f32> {
    let inverted = vec4<f32>(1.0 - c.r, 1.0 - c.g, 1.0 - c.b, c.a);
    return mix(c, inverted, intensity);
}

fn n2_body(
    c: vec4<f32>,
    uv: vec2<f32>,
    dims: vec2<f32>,
    row0: vec4<f32>,
    row1: vec4<f32>,
    row2: vec4<f32>,
    row3: vec4<f32>,
) -> vec4<f32> {
    return vec4<f32>(dot(row0, c), dot(row1, c), dot(row2, c), dot(row3, c));
}

@compute @workgroup_size(16, 16)
fn cs_main(@builtin(global_invocation_id) id: vec3<u32>) {
    let dims = textureDimensions(dst);
    if id.x >= dims.x || id.y >= dims.y {
        return;
    }
    let coord = vec2<i32>(i32(id.x), i32(id.y));
    let uv = (vec2<f32>(id.xy) + 0.5) / vec2<f32>(dims);
    let r0 = n0_body(src_0, samp, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n0_translate_x, params.n0_translate_y, params.n0_scale, params.n0_rotation);
    let r1 = n1_body(r0, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), params.n1_intensity);
    let r2 = n2_body(r1, uv, vec2<f32>(dims), vec4<f32>(params.n2_row0_x, params.n2_row0_y, params.n2_row0_z, params.n2_row0_w), vec4<f32>(params.n2_row1_x, params.n2_row1_y, params.n2_row1_z, params.n2_row1_w), vec4<f32>(params.n2_row2_x, params.n2_row2_y, params.n2_row2_z, params.n2_row2_w), vec4<f32>(params.n2_row3_x, params.n2_row3_y, params.n2_row3_z, params.n2_row3_w));
    textureStore(dst, coord, r2);
}
